authors_text: Md Mahfuzur Rahman Siddiquee,Dong Yang,Yufan He,Daguang Xu,Andriy Myronenko
title: Automated segmentation of intracranial hemorrhages from 3D CT
title_zh: 3D CT 颅内出血自动分割
comment: INSTANCE22 challenge report, MICCAI2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.09546
comments: INSTANCE22 challenge report, MICCAI2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.09546
abstract: Intracranial hemorrhage segmentation challenge (INSTANCE 2022) offers a platform for researchers to compare their solutions to segmentation of hemorrhage stroke regions from 3D CTs. In this work, we describe our solution to INSTANCE 2022. We use a 2D segmentation network, SegResNet from MONAI, operating slice-wise without resampling. The final submission is an ensemble of 18 models. Our solution (team name NVAUTO) achieves the top place in terms of Dice metric (0.721), and overall rank 2. It is implemented with Auto3DSeg.
summary: Intracranial hemorrhage segmentation challenge (INSTANCE 2022) offers a platform for researchers to compare their solutions to segmentation of hemorrhage stroke regions from 3D CTs. In this work, we describe our solution to INSTANCE 2022. We use a 2D segmentation network, SegResNet from MONAI, operating slice-wise without resampling. The final submission is an ensemble of 18 models. Our solution (team name NVAUTO) achieves the top place in terms of Dice metric (0.721), and overall rank 2. It is implemented with Auto3DSeg.
abstract_zh: 颅内出血分割挑战（INSTANCE 2022）为研究人员提供了一个平台，将他们的解决方案与 3D CT 出血中风区域的分割进行比较。在这项工作中，我们描述了 INSTANCE 2022 的解决方案。我们使用 MONAI 的 2D 分割网络 SegResNet，按切片进行操作而无需重新采样。最终提交的作品是由 18 个模型组成的整体。我们的解决方案（团队名称 NVAUTO）在 Dice 指标 (0.721) 方面名列前茅，总体排名第 2。它是使用 Auto3DSeg 实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是开发一种自动化分割3D CT图像中颅内出血区域的方法，并在INSTANCE 2022挑战赛中进行验证。
AI.motivation: 为了应对颅内出血分割的挑战，提升分割准确性以辅助临床诊断。
AI.method: 采用2D分割网络SegResNet（来自MONAI），对3D CT图像进行逐切片处理，无需重采样，并通过集成18个模型提升性能，使用Auto3DSeg框架实现。
AI.result: 在INSTANCE 2022挑战赛中，Dice指标达到0.721（排名第一），综合排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 证明了基于2D网络的集成方法在3D颅内出血分割中的有效性，Auto3DSeg框架为相关研究提供了实用工具。

authors_text: Jacob G. Hunter,Matthew Konishi,Neera Jain,Kumar Akash,Xingwei Wu,Teruhisa Misu,Tahira Reid
title: The Interaction Gap: A Step Toward Understanding Trust in Autonomous Vehicles Between Encounters
title_zh: 交互差距：理解自动驾驶汽车在两次相遇之间的信任的一步
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Shared autonomous vehicles (SAVs) will be introduced in greater numbers over the coming decade. Due to rapid advances in shared mobility and the slower development of fully autonomous vehicles (AVs), SAVs will likely be deployed before privately-owned AVs. Moreover, existing shared mobility services are transitioning their vehicle fleets toward those with increasingly higher levels of driving automation. Consequently, people who use shared vehicles on an "as needed" basis will have infrequent interactions with automated driving, thereby experiencing interaction gaps. Using human trust data of 25 participants, we show that interaction gaps can affect human trust in automated driving. Participants engaged in a simulator study consisting of two interactions separated by a one-week interaction gap. A moderate, inverse correlation was found between the change in trust during the initial interaction and the interaction gap, suggesting people "forget" some of their gained trust or distrust in automation during an interaction gap.
summary: Shared autonomous vehicles (SAVs) will be introduced in greater numbers over the coming decade. Due to rapid advances in shared mobility and the slower development of fully autonomous vehicles (AVs), SAVs will likely be deployed before privately-owned AVs. Moreover, existing shared mobility services are transitioning their vehicle fleets toward those with increasingly higher levels of driving automation. Consequently, people who use shared vehicles on an "as needed" basis will have infrequent interactions with automated driving, thereby experiencing interaction gaps. Using human trust data of 25 participants, we show that interaction gaps can affect human trust in automated driving. Participants engaged in a simulator study consisting of two interactions separated by a one-week interaction gap. A moderate, inverse correlation was found between the change in trust during the initial interaction and the interaction gap, suggesting people "forget" some of their gained trust or distrust in automation during an interaction gap.
abstract_zh: 未来十年，将会有更多共享自动驾驶汽车 (SAV) 被引入。由于共享出行的快速发展和全自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的发展缓慢，SAV 可能会先于私人拥有的 AV 进行部署。此外，现有的共享出行服务正在将其车队转向驾驶自动化水平越来越高的车队。因此，“按需”使用共享车辆的人们与自动驾驶的互动并不频繁，从而出现互动空白。使用 25 名参与者的人类信任数据，我们表明交互差距会影响人类对自动驾驶的信任。参与者参与了一项模拟器研究，该研究包括两次互动，间隔一周的互动间隔。在初始交互期间的信任变化与交互间隙之间发现了适度的负相关关系，这表明人们“忘记”了在交互间隙期间对自动化获得的一些信任或不信任。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了共享自动驾驶车辆（SAVs）在用户间歇性使用场景下，交互间隔对人类信任自动驾驶系统的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着SAVs的普及，用户将面临更少的自动驾驶交互机会，可能导致信任度波动，但现有研究缺乏对此类'交互间隔'影响的信任机制分析。
AI.method: 通过25名参与者的模拟器实验，设置两次自动驾驶交互任务并间隔一周，测量信任度变化并分析相关性。
AI.result: 发现初始交互中信任度变化与间隔期存在中等程度负相关，表明用户在间隔期间会遗忘部分信任或不信任的体验。
AI.conclusion: 交互间隔会显著影响用户对自动驾驶的信任稳定性，未来需设计应对间隔期信任衰减的系统策略。

authors_text: David Lipshutz,Cengiz Pehlevan,Dmitri B. Chklovskii
title: Interneurons accelerate learning dynamics in recurrent neural networks for statistical adaptation
title_zh: 中间神经元加速循环神经网络中的学习动态以实现统计适应
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures
comments: 16 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Early sensory systems in the brain rapidly adapt to fluctuating input statistics, which requires recurrent communication between neurons. Mechanistically, such recurrent communication is often indirect and mediated by local interneurons. In this work, we explore the computational benefits of mediating recurrent communication via interneurons compared with direct recurrent connections. To this end, we consider two mathematically tractable recurrent linear neural networks that statistically whiten their inputs -- one with direct recurrent connections and the other with interneurons that mediate recurrent communication. By analyzing the corresponding continuous synaptic dynamics and numerically simulating the networks, we show that the network with interneurons is more robust to initialization than the network with direct recurrent connections in the sense that the convergence time for the synaptic dynamics in the network with interneurons (resp. direct recurrent connections) scales logarithmically (resp. linearly) with the spectrum of their initialization. Our results suggest that interneurons are computationally useful for rapid adaptation to changing input statistics. Interestingly, the network with interneurons is an overparameterized solution of the whitening objective for the network with direct recurrent connections, so our results can be viewed as a recurrent linear neural network analogue of the implicit acceleration phenomenon observed in overparameterized feedforward linear neural networks.
summary: Early sensory systems in the brain rapidly adapt to fluctuating input statistics, which requires recurrent communication between neurons. Mechanistically, such recurrent communication is often indirect and mediated by local interneurons. In this work, we explore the computational benefits of mediating recurrent communication via interneurons compared with direct recurrent connections. To this end, we consider two mathematically tractable recurrent linear neural networks that statistically whiten their inputs -- one with direct recurrent connections and the other with interneurons that mediate recurrent communication. By analyzing the corresponding continuous synaptic dynamics and numerically simulating the networks, we show that the network with interneurons is more robust to initialization than the network with direct recurrent connections in the sense that the convergence time for the synaptic dynamics in the network with interneurons (resp. direct recurrent connections) scales logarithmically (resp. linearly) with the spectrum of their initialization. Our results suggest that interneurons are computationally useful for rapid adaptation to changing input statistics. Interestingly, the network with interneurons is an overparameterized solution of the whitening objective for the network with direct recurrent connections, so our results can be viewed as a recurrent linear neural network analogue of the implicit acceleration phenomenon observed in overparameterized feedforward linear neural networks.
abstract_zh: 大脑中的早期感觉系统快速适应波动的输入统计数据，这需要神经元之间的反复通信。从机制上讲，这种反复的交流通常是间接的，并由局部中间神经元介导。在这项工作中，我们探讨了与直接循环连接相比，通过中间神经元介导循环通信的计算优势。为此，我们考虑两个数学上易于处理的循环线性神经网络，它们在统计上白化其输入——一个具有直接循环连接，另一个具有介导循环通信的中间神经元。通过分析相应的连续突触动力学并对网络进行数值模拟，我们表明，具有中间神经元的网络比具有直接循环连接的网络对初始化更加鲁棒，因为具有中间神经元的网络（或直接循环连接）的突触动力学的收敛时间随其初始化频谱呈对数（或线性）缩放。我们的结果表明，中间神经元在计算上对于快速适应不断变化的输入统计数据非常有用。有趣的是，具有中间神经元的网络是具有直接循环连接的网络的白化目标的过参数化解决方案，因此我们的结果可以被视为在过参数化前馈线性神经网络中观察到的隐式加速现象的循环线性神经网络类似物。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了通过中间神经元介导的循环通信在循环神经网络中加速学习动态的计算优势，对比直接循环连接的效果。
AI.motivation: 早期感觉系统需要快速适应输入统计波动，而这种适应依赖神经元间的循环通信。中间神经元在其中起中介作用，但其计算优势尚未明确。
AI.method: 构建两种数学可解的循环线性网络模型：一种采用直接循环连接，另一种通过中间神经元介导通信。通过分析突触动态并进行数值模拟对比两者的性能差异。
AI.result: 中间神经元网络比直接连接网络更鲁棒，其收敛时间与初始化谱呈对数关系（直接连接呈线性关系）。中间神经元网络是直接连接网络的过参数化解，类比前馈网络的隐式加速现象。
AI.conclusion: 中间神经元通过提升鲁棒性和过参数化特性，为循环网络快速适应输入统计变化提供了计算优势。

tldr: 该论文研究了通过中间神经元介导的循环通信在循环神经网络中加速学习动态的计算优势，对比直接循环连接的效果。
motivation: 早期感觉系统需要快速适应输入统计波动，而这种适应依赖神经元间的循环通信。中间神经元在其中起中介作用，但其计算优势尚未明确。
method: 构建两种数学可解的循环线性网络模型：一种采用直接循环连接，另一种通过中间神经元介导通信。通过分析突触动态并进行数值模拟对比两者的性能差异。
result: 中间神经元网络比直接连接网络更鲁棒，其收敛时间与初始化谱呈对数关系（直接连接呈线性关系）。中间神经元网络是直接连接网络的过参数化解，类比前馈网络的隐式加速现象。
conclusion: 中间神经元通过提升鲁棒性和过参数化特性，为循环网络快速适应输入统计变化提供了计算优势。
search_text: Interneurons accelerate learning dynamics in recurrent neural networks for statistical adaptation 中间神经元加速循环神经网络中的学习动态以实现统计适应 Early sensory systems in the brain rapidly adapt to fluctuating input statistics, which requires recurrent communication between neurons. Mechanistically, such recurrent communication is often indirect and mediated by local interneurons. In this work, we explore the computational benefits of mediating recurrent communication via interneurons compared with direct recurrent connections. To this end, we consider two mathematically tractable recurrent linear neural networks that statistically whiten their inputs -- one with direct recurrent connections and the other with interneurons that mediate recurrent communication. By analyzing the corresponding continuous synaptic dynamics and numerically simulating the networks, we show that the network with interneurons is more robust to initialization than the network with direct recurrent connections in the sense that the convergence time for the synaptic dynamics in the network with interneurons (resp. direct recurrent connections) scales logarithmically (resp. linearly) with the spectrum of their initialization. Our results suggest that interneurons are computationally useful for rapid adaptation to changing input statistics. Interestingly, the network with interneurons is an overparameterized solution of the whitening objective for the network with direct recurrent connections, so our results can be viewed as a recurrent linear neural network analogue of the implicit acceleration phenomenon observed in overparameterized feedforward linear neural networks. 大脑中的早期感觉系统快速适应波动的输入统计数据，这需要神经元之间的反复通信。从机制上讲，这种反复的交流通常是间接的，并由局部中间神经元介导。在这项工作中，我们探讨了与直接循环连接相比，通过中间神经元介导循环通信的计算优势。为此，我们考虑两个数学上易于处理的循环线性神经网络，它们在统计上白化其输入——一个具有直接循环连接，另一个具有介导循环通信的中间神经元。通过分析相应的连续突触动力学并对网络进行数值模拟，我们表明，具有中间神经元的网络比具有直接循环连接的网络对初始化更加鲁棒，因为具有中间神经元的网络（或直接循环连接）的突触动力学的收敛时间随其初始化频谱呈对数（或线性）缩放。我们的结果表明，中间神经元在计算上对于快速适应不断变化的输入统计数据非常有用。有趣的是，具有中间神经元的网络是具有直接循环连接的网络的白化目标的过参数化解决方案，因此我们的结果可以被视为在过参数化前馈线性神经网络中观察到的隐式加速现象的循环线性神经网络类似物。 该论文研究了通过中间神经元介导的循环通信在循环神经网络中加速学习动态的计算优势，对比直接循环连接的效果。 David Lipshutz,Cengiz Pehlevan,Dmitri B. Chklovskii q-bio.NC,cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Sarvesh Gharat,Bhaskar Bose,Abhimanyu Borthakur,Rakesh Mazumder
title: An Image Processing approach to identify solar plages observed at 393.37 nm by the Kodaikanal Solar Observatory
title_zh: 一种图像处理方法，用于识别科代卡纳尔太阳天文台在 393.37 nm 处观测到的太阳斑
comment: Accepted: RAS Techniques and Instruments
comments: Accepted: RAS Techniques and Instruments
abstract: Solar plages, which are bright regions on the Sun's surface, are an important indicator of solar activity. In this study, we propose an automated algorithm for identifying solar plages in Ca K wavelength solar data obtained from the Kodaikanal Solar Observatory. The algorithm successfully annotates all visually identifiable plages in an image and outputs the corresponding calculated plage index. We perform a time series analysis of the plage index (rolling mean) across multiple solar cycles to test the algorithm's reliability and robustness. The results show a strong correlation between the calculated plage index and those reported in a previous study. The correlation coefficients obtained for all the solar cycles are higher than 0.90, indicating the reliability of the model. We also suggest that adjusting the hyperparameters appropriately for a specific image using our web-based app can increase the model's efficiency. The algorithm has been deployed on the Streamlit Community Cloud platform, where users can upload images and customize the hyperparameters for desired results. The input data used in this study is freely available from the KSO data archive, and the code and the generated data are publicly available on our GitHub repository. Our proposed algorithm provides an efficient and reliable method for identifying solar plages, which can aid the study of solar activity and its impact on the Earth's climate, technology, and space weather.
summary: Solar plages, which are bright regions on the Sun's surface, are an important indicator of solar activity. In this study, we propose an automated algorithm for identifying solar plages in Ca K wavelength solar data obtained from the Kodaikanal Solar Observatory. The algorithm successfully annotates all visually identifiable plages in an image and outputs the corresponding calculated plage index. We perform a time series analysis of the plage index (rolling mean) across multiple solar cycles to test the algorithm's reliability and robustness. The results show a strong correlation between the calculated plage index and those reported in a previous study. The correlation coefficients obtained for all the solar cycles are higher than 0.90, indicating the reliability of the model. We also suggest that adjusting the hyperparameters appropriately for a specific image using our web-based app can increase the model's efficiency. The algorithm has been deployed on the Streamlit Community Cloud platform, where users can upload images and customize the hyperparameters for desired results. The input data used in this study is freely available from the KSO data archive, and the code and the generated data are publicly available on our GitHub repository. Our proposed algorithm provides an efficient and reliable method for identifying solar plages, which can aid the study of solar activity and its impact on the Earth's climate, technology, and space weather.
abstract_zh: 太阳斑是太阳表面的明亮区域，是太阳活动的重要指标。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种自动算法，用于识别从科代卡纳尔太阳天文台获得的 Ca K 波长太阳数据中的太阳斑。该算法成功注释了图像中所有视觉上可识别的斑块，并输出相应的计算斑块指数。我们对多个太阳周期的斑块指数（滚动平均值）进行时间序列分析，以测试算法的可靠性和鲁棒性。结果显示计算出的斑块指数与先前研究中报告的斑块指数之间存在很强的相关性。所有太阳周期的相关系数均高于0.90，表明模型的可靠性。我们还建议使用我们的基于网络的应用程序针对特定图像适当调整超参数可以提高模型的效率。该算法已部署在 Streamlit 社区云平台上，用户可以上传图像并自定义超参数以获得所需的结果。本研究中使用的输入数据可从 KSO 数据档案免费获取，代码和生成的数据可在我们的 GitHub 存储库上公开获取。我们提出的算法提供了一种有效且可靠的方法来识别太阳斑，这可以帮助研究太阳活动及其对地球气候、技术和空间天气的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化算法，用于通过印度科达利坎尔太阳观测站的Ca K波长数据识别太阳 plage（光斑）并计算 plage 指数。
AI.motivation: 太阳 plage 是太阳活动的重要指标，传统人工识别方法效率低且主观性强，需开发高效可靠的自动化方法以支持太阳活动研究及其对地球气候、技术的影响分析。
AI.method: 基于图像处理算法自动标注可见 plage 区域并计算 plage 指数，通过时间序列分析（滚动均值）验证算法在多个太阳周期中的稳定性；提供网页应用调整超参数以优化模型效率，算法部署于 Streamlit 平台，数据与代码开源。
AI.result: 算法计算的 plage 指数与前人研究结果相关系数均高于 0.90，验证了模型可靠性；用户可通过网页自定义参数提升效率。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为太阳 plage 识别提供了高效可靠的方法，有助于深化太阳活动研究及其对地球环境的影响分析。

authors_text: Jiageng Zhu,Hanchen Xie,Wael Abd-Almageed
title: SW-VAE: Weakly Supervised Learn Disentangled Representation Via Latent Factor Swapping
title_zh: SW-VAE：弱监督通过潜在因子交换学习解缠结表示
abstract: Representation disentanglement is an important goal of representation learning that benefits various downstream tasks. To achieve this goal, many unsupervised learning representation disentanglement approaches have been developed. However, the training process without utilizing any supervision signal have been proved to be inadequate for disentanglement representation learning. Therefore, we propose a novel weakly-supervised training approach, named as SW-VAE, which incorporates pairs of input observations as supervision signals by using the generative factors of datasets. Furthermore, we introduce strategies to gradually increase the learning difficulty during training to smooth the training process. As shown on several datasets, our model shows significant improvement over state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on representation disentanglement tasks.
summary: Representation disentanglement is an important goal of representation learning that benefits various downstream tasks. To achieve this goal, many unsupervised learning representation disentanglement approaches have been developed. However, the training process without utilizing any supervision signal have been proved to be inadequate for disentanglement representation learning. Therefore, we propose a novel weakly-supervised training approach, named as SW-VAE, which incorporates pairs of input observations as supervision signals by using the generative factors of datasets. Furthermore, we introduce strategies to gradually increase the learning difficulty during training to smooth the training process. As shown on several datasets, our model shows significant improvement over state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on representation disentanglement tasks.
abstract_zh: 表示解开是表示学习的一个重要目标，有利于各种下游任务。为了实现这一目标，人们开发了许多无监督学习表示解缠方法。然而，不利用任何监督信号的训练过程已被证明不足以进行解纠缠表示学习。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的弱监督训练方法，称为 SW-VAE，它通过使用数据集的生成因子将输入观察对作为监督信号。此外，我们引入了在训练过程中逐渐增加学习难度的策略，以平滑训练过程。如多个数据集所示，我们的模型在表征解缠任务方面比最先进的 (SOTA) 方法有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督学习方法SW-VAE，通过潜在因子交换机制学习解耦表示。
AI.motivation: 无监督方法因缺乏监督信号难以有效学习解耦表示，需引入弱监督信号提升性能。
AI.method: 利用数据集生成因素作为监督信号，结合输入观察对，并采用渐进式难度提升策略训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，解耦表示效果显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SW-VAE通过弱监督信号与渐进式训练策略，有效解决了解耦表示学习的难题。

authors_text: Mirgahney Mohamed,Lourdes Agapito
title: GNPM: Geometric-Aware Neural Parametric Models
title_zh: GNPM：几何感知神经参数模型

comments: 10 pages, 8 figures
abstract: We propose Geometric Neural Parametric Models (GNPM), a learned parametric model that takes into account the local structure of data to learn disentangled shape and pose latent spaces of 4D dynamics, using a geometric-aware architecture on point clouds. Temporally consistent 3D deformations are estimated without the need for dense correspondences at training time, by exploiting cycle consistency. Besides its ability to learn dense correspondences, GNPMs also enable latent-space manipulations such as interpolation and shape/pose transfer. We evaluate GNPMs on various datasets of clothed humans, and show that it achieves comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods that require dense correspondences during training.
summary: We propose Geometric Neural Parametric Models (GNPM), a learned parametric model that takes into account the local structure of data to learn disentangled shape and pose latent spaces of 4D dynamics, using a geometric-aware architecture on point clouds. Temporally consistent 3D deformations are estimated without the need for dense correspondences at training time, by exploiting cycle consistency. Besides its ability to learn dense correspondences, GNPMs also enable latent-space manipulations such as interpolation and shape/pose transfer. We evaluate GNPMs on various datasets of clothed humans, and show that it achieves comparable performance to state-of-the-art methods that require dense correspondences during training.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了几何神经参数模型（GNPM），这是一种学习参数模型，它考虑数据的局部结构，使用点云上的几何感知架构来学习解开的形状和构成 4D 动力学的潜在空间。通过利用循环一致性，可以估计时间一致的 3D 变形，而无需在训练时进行密集对应。除了学习密集对应关系的能力之外，GNPM 还可以实现潜在空间操作，例如插值和形状/姿势转移。我们在各种穿着人类的数据集上评估 GNPM，并表明它的性能与训练期间需要密集对应的最先进方法相当。

AI.tldr: 提出一种几何感知的神经参数模型（GNPM），用于学习4D动态的解耦形状和姿态潜在空间，无需训练时的密集对应关系。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖密集对应关系进行3D变形估计，但获取密集对应关系困难且计算成本高，因此需要一种无需密集对应关系的高效方法。
AI.method: 采用几何感知架构处理点云数据，利用循环一致性实现时间一致的3D变形估计，并通过潜在空间操作实现形状和姿态的迁移。
AI.result: 在多个穿着人类的数据集上，GNPM的性能与需要密集对应关系的最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: GNPM在无需密集对应关系的情况下实现了高精度的3D变形估计，适用于动态建模和潜在空间操作，为相关领域提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Michael Kraus,Romana Rust,Maximilian Rietschel,Daniel Hall
title: Improved Perception of AEC Construction Details via Immersive Teaching in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 通过虚拟现实沉浸式教学改善 AEC 施工细节的感知
abstract: This work proposes, implements and tests an immersive framework upon Virtual Reality (VR) for comprehension, knowledge development and learning process assisting an improved perception of complex spatial arrangements in AEC in comparison to the traditional 2D projection drawing-based method. The research focuses on the prototypical example of construction details as a traditionally difficult teaching task for conveying geometric and semantic information to students. Our mixed-methods study analyses test results of two test panel groups upon different questions about geometric and functional aspects of the construction detail as well as surveys and interviews of participating lecturers, students and laypersons towards their experience using the VR tool. The quantitative analysis of the test results prove that for participants with little pre-existing knowledge (such as novice students), a significantly better learning score for the test group is detected. Moreover, both groups rated the VR experience as an enjoyable and engaging way of learning. Analysis of survey results towards the VR experience reveals, that students, lecturers and professionals alike enjoyed the VR experience more than traditional learning of the construction detail. During the post-experiment qualitative evaluation in the form of interviews, the panel expressed an improved understanding, increased enthusiasm for the topic, and greater desire for other topics to be presented using VR tools. The expressed better understanding of design concepts after the VR experience by the students is statistically significant on average in the exam results. The results support our core assumption, that the presentation of contextual 3D models is a promising teaching approach to illustrate content.

The research focuses on the prototypical example of construction details as a traditionally difficult teaching task for conveying geometric and semantic information to students. Our mixed-methods study analyses test results of two test panel groups upon different questions about geometric and functional aspects of the construction detail as well as surveys and interviews of participating lecturers, students and laypersons towards their experience using the VR tool. Moreover, both groups rated the VR experience as an enjoyable and engaging way of learning. Analysis of survey results towards the VR experience reveals, that students, lecturers and professionals alike enjoyed the VR experience more than traditional learning of the construction detail. During the post-experiment qualitative evaluation in the form of interviews, the panel expressed an improved understanding, increased enthusiasm for the topic, and greater desire for other topics to be presented using VR tools. The expressed better understanding of design concepts after the VR experience by the students is statistically significant on average in the exam results. The results support our core assumption, that the presentation of contextual 3D models is a promising teaching approach to illustrate content.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出、实施和测试了基于虚拟现实 (VR) 的沉浸式框架，用于理解、知识开发和学习过程，与传统的基于 2D 投影绘图的方法相比，有助于改善 AEC 中复杂空间布置的感知。该研究的重点是建筑细节的原型示例，这是向学生传达几何和语义信息的传统教学任务。我们的混合方法研究分析了两个测试小组针对建筑细节的几何和功能方面的不同问题的测试结果，以及对参与的讲师、学生和外行人员使用 VR 工具的体验进行的调查和采访。测试结果的定量分析证明，对于预先具备很少知识的参与者（例如新手学生），测试组的学习成绩明显更好。此外，两个小组都将 VR 体验视为一种令人愉快且引人入胜的学习方式。对 VR 体验的调查结果分析表明，与传统的建筑细节学习相比，学生、讲师和专业人士更喜欢 VR 体验。在以访谈形式进行的实验后定性评估中，专家组表达了对主题的理解有所提高，对主题的热情增加，以及对使用 VR 工具呈现其他主题的更大愿望。平均而言，学生在体验 VR 后对设计概念的理解在考试结果中具有显着的统计意义。结果支持我们的核心假设，即情境 3D 模型的呈现是一种很有前景的说明内容的教学方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟现实（VR）的沉浸式教学框架，旨在提升建筑、工程和施工（AEC）领域复杂空间结构的感知与学习效果，并与传统2D图纸教学方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 传统2D图纸难以有效传递建筑构造细节的几何与语义信息，学生学习效果有限，需探索更直观的教学工具以提升理解与兴趣。
AI.method: 通过混合研究方法，对比两组测试小组（VR组与传统2D组）在几何与功能问题上的表现，结合问卷调查与访谈分析参与者对VR工具的体验反馈。
AI.result: VR组在知识掌握测试中得分显著更高，尤其是初学者；所有参与群体均认为VR学习方式更有趣且更具沉浸感，学生对设计概念的理解在考试中呈现统计学显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于上下文的3D模型展示是提升AEC领域教学效果的可行方法，VR技术能有效增强学生对复杂构造细节的理解与学习积极性。

authors_text: Elena Grigorescu,Young-San Lin,Sandeep Silwal,Maoyuan Song,Samson Zhou
title: Learning-Augmented Algorithms for Online Linear and Semidefinite Programming
title_zh: 在线线性和半定规划的学习增强算法
comment: 44 pages, 3 figures. To appear in NeurIPS 2022
comments: 44 pages, 3 figures. To appear in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Semidefinite programming (SDP) is a unifying framework that generalizes both linear programming and quadratically-constrained quadratic programming, while also yielding efficient solvers, both in theory and in practice. However, there exist known impossibility results for approximating the optimal solution when constraints for covering SDPs arrive in an online fashion. In this paper, we study online covering linear and semidefinite programs in which the algorithm is augmented with advice from a possibly erroneous predictor. We show that if the predictor is accurate, we can efficiently bypass these impossibility results and achieve a constant-factor approximation to the optimal solution, i.e., consistency. On the other hand, if the predictor is inaccurate, under some technical conditions, we achieve results that match both the classical optimal upper bounds and the tight lower bounds up to constant factors, i.e., robustness. More broadly, we introduce a framework that extends both (1) the online set cover problem augmented with machine-learning predictors, studied by Bamas, Maggiori, and Svensson (NeurIPS 2020), and (2) the online covering SDP problem, initiated by Elad, Kale, and Naor (ICALP 2016). Specifically, we obtain general online learning-augmented algorithms for covering linear programs with fractional advice and constraints, and initiate the study of learning-augmented algorithms for covering SDP problems. Our techniques are based on the primal-dual framework of Buchbinder and Naor (Mathematics of Operations Research, 34, 2009) and can be further adjusted to handle constraints where the variables lie in a bounded region, i.e., box constraints.

On the other hand, if the predictor is inaccurate, under some technical conditions, we achieve results that match both the classical optimal upper bounds and the tight lower bounds up to constant factors, i.e., robustness. More broadly, we introduce a framework that extends both (1) the online set cover problem augmented with machine-learning predictors, studied by Bamas, Maggiori, and Svensson (NeurIPS 2020), and (2) the online covering SDP problem, initiated by Elad, Kale, and Naor (ICALP 2016). Specifically, we obtain general online learning-augmented algorithms for covering linear programs with fractional advice and constraints, and initiate the study of learning-augmented algorithms for covering SDP problems. Our techniques are based on the primal-dual framework of Buchbinder and Naor (Mathematics of Operations Research, 34, 2009) and can be further adjusted to handle constraints where the variables lie in a bounded region, i.e., box constraints.
abstract_zh: 半定规划 (SDP) 是一个统一的框架，它概括了线性规划和二次约束二次规划，同时在理论和实践中也产生了高效的求解器。然而，当覆盖 SDP 的约束以在线方式到达时，存在已知的不可能结果来逼近最佳解决方案。在本文中，我们在线研究线性和半定程序，其中算法根据可能错误的预测器的建议进行了增强。我们证明，如果预测器是准确的，我们可以有效地绕过这些不可能的结果，并实现最佳解决方案的常数因子近似，即一致性。另一方面，如果预测器不准确，则在某些技术条件下，我们会获得与经典最优上限和严格下限达到恒定因子（即鲁棒性）相匹配的结果。更广泛地说，我们引入了一个框架，该框架扩展了（1）由 Bamas、Maggiori 和 Svensson 研究的通过机器学习预测器增强的在线集合覆盖问题（NeurIPS 2020），以及（2）由 Elad、Kale 和 Naor 发起的在线覆盖 SDP 问题（ICALP 2016）。具体来说，我们获得了用于覆盖带有分数建议和约束的线性程序的通用在线学习增强算法，并启动了用于覆盖SDP问题的学习增强算法的研究。我们的技术基于 Buchbinder 和 Naor 的原对偶框架（运筹学数学，34，2009），并且可以进一步调整以处理变量位于有界区域的约束，即框约束。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了结合机器学习预测器的在线覆盖线性及半定规划问题，提出了一种增强算法框架以应对预测器准确或不准确的情况。
AI.motivation: 传统在线半定规划（SDP）存在无法近似最优解的理论限制，而引入机器学习预测器可能突破这一限制，但需解决预测误差带来的鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 基于对偶上升框架，结合机器学习预测器的建议，设计适用于分数建议和约束的在线学习增强算法，并扩展至半定规划场景。
AI.result: 当预测器准确时，算法可实现常数因子近似（一致性）；预测器不准确时，在技术条件下达到经典上界和下界的常数因子匹配（鲁棒性）。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种通用框架，统一了在线集合覆盖和在线覆盖SDP问题，并为学习增强算法在更广泛约束下的应用奠定了基础。

search_text: Learning-Augmented Algorithms for Online Linear and Semidefinite Programming 在线线性和半定规划的学习增强算法 Semidefinite programming (SDP) is a unifying framework that generalizes both linear programming and quadratically-constrained quadratic programming, while also yielding efficient solvers, both in theory and in practice. However, there exist known impossibility results for approximating the optimal solution when constraints for covering SDPs arrive in an online fashion. In this paper, we study online covering linear and semidefinite programs in which the algorithm is augmented with advice from a possibly erroneous predictor. We show that if the predictor is accurate, we can efficiently bypass these impossibility results and achieve a constant-factor approximation to the optimal solution, i.e., consistency. On the other hand, if the predictor is inaccurate, under some technical conditions, we achieve results that match both the classical optimal upper bounds and the tight lower bounds up to constant factors, i.e., robustness. More broadly, we introduce a framework that extends both (1) the online set cover problem augmented with machine-learning predictors, studied by Bamas, Maggiori, and Svensson (NeurIPS 2020), and (2) the online covering SDP problem, initiated by Elad, Kale, and Naor (ICALP 2016). Specifically, we obtain general online learning-augmented algorithms for covering linear programs with fractional advice and constraints, and initiate the study of learning-augmented algorithms for covering SDP problems. Our techniques are based on the primal-dual framework of Buchbinder and Naor (Mathematics of Operations Research, 34, 2009) and can be further adjusted to handle constraints where the variables lie in a bounded region, i.e., box constraints. 半定规划 (SDP) 是一个统一的框架，它概括了线性规划和二次约束二次规划，同时在理论和实践中也产生了高效的求解器。然而，当覆盖 SDP 的约束以在线方式到达时，存在已知的不可能结果来逼近最佳解决方案。在本文中，我们在线研究线性和半定程序，其中算法根据可能错误的预测器的建议进行了增强。我们证明，如果预测器是准确的，我们可以有效地绕过这些不可能的结果，并实现最佳解决方案的常数因子近似，即一致性。另一方面，如果预测器不准确，则在某些技术条件下，我们会获得与经典最优上限和严格下限达到恒定因子（即鲁棒性）相匹配的结果。更广泛地说，我们引入了一个框架，该框架扩展了（1）由 Bamas、Maggiori 和 Svensson 研究的通过机器学习预测器增强的在线集合覆盖问题（NeurIPS 2020），以及（2）由 Elad、Kale 和 Naor 发起的在线覆盖 SDP 问题（ICALP 2016）。具体来说，我们获得了用于覆盖带有分数建议和约束的线性程序的通用在线学习增强算法，并启动了用于覆盖SDP问题的学习增强算法的研究。我们的技术基于 Buchbinder 和 Naor 的原对偶框架（运筹学数学，34，2009），并且可以进一步调整以处理变量位于有界区域的约束，即框约束。 本文研究了结合机器学习预测器的在线覆盖线性及半定规划问题，提出了一种增强算法框架以应对预测器准确或不准确的情况。 Elena Grigorescu,Young-San Lin,Sandeep Silwal,Maoyuan Song,Samson Zhou cs.DS,cs.LG,math.OC

authors_text: Benjamin S. Bucknall,Shiri Dori-Hacohen
title: Current and Near-Term AI as a Potential Existential Risk Factor
title_zh: 当前和近期人工智能作为潜在的存在风险因素
comment: ef:AIES '22: Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society
comments: ef:AIES '22: Proceedings of the 2022 AAAI/ACM Conference on AI, Ethics, and Society
abstract: There is a substantial and ever-growing corpus of evidence and literature exploring the impacts of Artificial intelligence (AI) technologies on society, politics, and humanity as a whole. A separate, parallel body of work has explored existential risks to humanity, including but not limited to that stemming from unaligned Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). In this paper, we problematise the notion that current and near-term artificial intelligence technologies have the potential to contribute to existential risk by acting as intermediate risk factors, and that this potential is not limited to the unaligned AGI scenario. We propose the hypothesis that certain already-documented effects of AI can act as existential risk factors, magnifying the likelihood of previously identified sources of existential risk. Moreover, future developments in the coming decade hold the potential to significantly exacerbate these risk factors, even in the absence of artificial general intelligence. Our main contribution is a (non-exhaustive) exposition of potential AI risk factors and the causal relationships between them, focusing on how AI can affect power dynamics and information security. This exposition demonstrates that there exist causal pathways from AI systems to existential risks that do not presuppose hypothetical future AI capabilities.
summary: There is a substantial and ever-growing corpus of evidence and literature exploring the impacts of Artificial intelligence (AI) technologies on society, politics, and humanity as a whole. A separate, parallel body of work has explored existential risks to humanity, including but not limited to that stemming from unaligned Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). In this paper, we problematise the notion that current and near-term artificial intelligence technologies have the potential to contribute to existential risk by acting as intermediate risk factors, and that this potential is not limited to the unaligned AGI scenario. We propose the hypothesis that certain already-documented effects of AI can act as existential risk factors, magnifying the likelihood of previously identified sources of existential risk. Moreover, future developments in the coming decade hold the potential to significantly exacerbate these risk factors, even in the absence of artificial general intelligence. Our main contribution is a (non-exhaustive) exposition of potential AI risk factors and the causal relationships between them, focusing on how AI can affect power dynamics and information security. This exposition demonstrates that there exist causal pathways from AI systems to existential risks that do not presuppose hypothetical future AI capabilities.
abstract_zh: 有大量且不断增长的证据和文献探索人工智能 (AI) 技术对社会、政治和整个人类的影响。一项独立、平行的工作探索了人类面临的生存风险，包括但不限于来自不统一的通用人工智能 (AGI) 的风险。在本文中，我们对以下观点提出了质疑：当前和近期的人工智能技术有可能通过充当中间风险因素而导致存在风险，并且这种潜力不仅限于未对齐的 AGI 场景。我们提出这样的假设：人工智能的某些已记录的影响可以作为存在风险因素，放大先前确定的存在风险来源的可能性。此外，即使没有通用人工智能，未来十年的发展也有可能显着加剧这些风险因素。我们的主要贡献是（非详尽）阐述潜在的人工智能风险因素及其之间的因果关系，重点关注人工智能如何影响权力动态和信息安全。这一论述表明，存在从人工智能系统到存在风险的因果路径，这些路径并不以假设的未来人工智能能力为前提。

AI.tldr: 探讨当前和近期内人工智能技术可能成为存在风险的中间因素，并分析其因果关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于未对齐的AGI风险，而忽视了当前AI技术可能通过其他途径加剧存在风险的潜力。
AI.method: 通过非详尽列举和因果分析，探讨AI对权力结构和信息安全的影响，建立AI系统与存在风险之间的因果路径。
AI.result: AI技术可能通过影响权力动态和信息安全等途径，放大已有的存在风险，且未来十年的发展可能进一步加剧这些风险。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI技术本身可能独立构成存在风险，需提前采取治理措施以应对潜在威胁。

authors_text: Jimmy Tobin,Qisheng Li,Subhashini Venugopalan,Katie Seaver,Richard Cave,Katrin Tomanek
title: Assessing ASR Model Quality on Disordered Speech using BERTScore
title_zh: 使用 BERTScore 评估无序语音的 ASR 模型质量
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2022 Workshop on Speech for Social Good
comments: Accepted to Interspeech 2022 Workshop on Speech for Social Good
abstract: Word Error Rate (WER) is the primary metric used to assess automatic speech recognition (ASR) model quality. It has been shown that ASR models tend to have much higher WER on speakers with speech impairments than typical English speakers. It is hard to determine if models can be be useful at such high error rates. This study investigates the use of BERTScore, an evaluation metric for text generation, to provide a more informative measure of ASR model quality and usefulness. Both BERTScore and WER were compared to prediction errors manually annotated by Speech Language Pathologists for error type and assessment. BERTScore was found to be more correlated with human assessment of error type and assessment. BERTScore was specifically more robust to orthographic changes (contraction and normalization errors) where meaning was preserved. Furthermore, BERTScore was a better fit of error assessment than WER, as measured using an ordinal logistic regression and the Akaike's Information Criterion (AIC). Overall, our findings suggest that BERTScore can complement WER when assessing ASR model performance from a practical perspective, especially for accessibility applications where models are useful even at lower accuracy than for typical speech.
summary: Word Error Rate (WER) is the primary metric used to assess automatic speech recognition (ASR) model quality. It has been shown that ASR models tend to have much higher WER on speakers with speech impairments than typical English speakers. It is hard to determine if models can be be useful at such high error rates. This study investigates the use of BERTScore, an evaluation metric for text generation, to provide a more informative measure of ASR model quality and usefulness. BERTScore was found to be more correlated with human assessment of error type and assessment. BERTScore was specifically more robust to orthographic changes (contraction and normalization errors) where meaning was preserved. Furthermore, BERTScore was a better fit of error assessment than WER, as measured using an ordinal logistic regression and the Akaike's Information Criterion (AIC). abstract_zh: 字错误率 (WER) 是用于评估自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型质量的主要指标。研究表明，ASR 模型对于有语言障碍的说话者的 WER 往往比典型的英语说话者高得多。很难确定模型在如此高的错误率下是否有用。本研究调查了 BERTScore（一种文本生成评估指标）的使用，以提供更丰富的信息来衡量 ASR 模型的质量和实用性。将 BERTScore 和 WER 与语音语言病理学家手动注释的预测错误进行比较，以了解错误类型和评估。发现 BERTcore 与人类对错误类型和评估的评估更相关。特别是，BERTScore 对于保留意义的拼写变化（缩写和标准化错误）更加稳健。此外，根据序数逻辑回归和 Akaike 信息准则 (AIC) 进行测量，BERTScore 比 WER 更适合错误评估。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，从实际角度评估 ASR 模型性能时，BERTScore 可以补充 WER，特别是对于可访问性应用程序，其中模型即使在精度低于典型语音的情况下也很有用。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了使用BERTScore评估自动语音识别（ASR）模型在失序语音上的质量，以补充传统的词错误率（WER）。
AI.motivation: 传统的词错误率（WER）在评估ASR模型对有言语障碍的说话人表现时存在局限性，因此需要更准确和实用的评估方法。
AI.method: 论文通过对比BERTScore和WER，并结合语言病理学家对错误类型和评估的标注，分析其与人工评估的相关性。
AI.result: BERTScore比WER更符合人工评估结果，尤其在处理正字法变化时表现出更强的鲁棒性，且在误差评估中更优。
AI.conclusion: BERTScore可以作为WER的补充，用于更全面地评估ASR模型的实际性能，尤其是在需要可访问性的应用中。

search_text: Assessing ASR Model Quality on Disordered Speech using BERTScore 使用 BERTScore 评估无序语音的 ASR 模型质量 Word Error Rate (WER) is the primary metric used to assess automatic speech recognition (ASR) model quality. It has been shown that ASR models tend to have much higher WER on speakers with speech impairments than typical English speakers. It is hard to determine if models can be be useful at such high error rates. This study investigates the use of BERTScore, an evaluation metric for text generation, to provide a more informative measure of ASR model quality and usefulness. Both BERTScore and WER were compared to prediction errors manually annotated by Speech Language Pathologists for error type and assessment. BERTScore was found to be more correlated with human assessment of error type and assessment. BERTScore was specifically more robust to orthographic changes (contraction and normalization errors) where meaning was preserved. Furthermore, BERTScore was a better fit of error assessment than WER, as measured using an ordinal logistic regression and the Akaike's Information Criterion (AIC). Overall, our findings suggest that BERTScore can complement WER when assessing ASR model performance from a practical perspective, especially for accessibility applications where models are useful even at lower accuracy than for typical speech. 字错误率 (WER) 是用于评估自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型质量的主要指标。研究表明，ASR 模型对于有语言障碍的说话者的 WER 往往比典型的英语说话者高得多。很难确定模型在如此高的错误率下是否有用。本研究调查了 BERTScore（一种文本生成评估指标）的使用，以提供更丰富的信息来衡量 ASR 模型的质量和实用性。将 BERTScore 和 WER 与语音语言病理学家手动注释的预测错误进行比较，以了解错误类型和评估。发现 BERTcore 与人类对错误类型和评估的评估更相关。特别是，BERTScore 对于保留意义的拼写变化（缩写和标准化错误）更加稳健。此外，根据序数逻辑回归和 Akaike 信息准则 (AIC) 进行测量，BERTScore 比 WER 更适合错误评估。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，从实际角度评估 ASR 模型性能时，BERTScore 可以补充 WER，特别是对于可访问性应用程序，其中模型即使在精度低于典型语音的情况下也很有用。 该论文研究了使用BERTScore评估自动语音识别（ASR）模型在失序语音上的质量，以补充传统的词错误率（WER）。 Jimmy Tobin,Qisheng Li,Subhashini Venugopalan,Katie Seaver,Richard Cave,Katrin Tomanek eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Shahabedin Sagheb,Ye-Ji Mun,Neema Ahmadian,Benjamin A. Christie,Andrea Bajcsy,Katherine Driggs-Campbell,Dylan P. Losey
title: Towards Robots that Influence Humans over Long-Term Interaction
title_zh: 走向通过长期互动影响人类的机器人
abstract: When humans interact with robots influence is inevitable. Consider an autonomous car driving near a human: the speed and steering of the autonomous car will affect how the human drives. Prior works have developed frameworks that enable robots to influence humans towards desired behaviors. But while these approaches are effective in the short-term (i.e., the first few human-robot interactions), here we explore long-term influence (i.e., repeated interactions between the same human and robot). Our central insight is that humans are dynamic: people adapt to robots, and behaviors which are influential now may fall short once the human learns to anticipate the robot's actions. With this insight, we experimentally demonstrate that a prevalent game-theoretic formalism for generating influential robot behaviors becomes less effective over repeated interactions. Next, we propose three modifications to Stackelberg games that make the robot's policy both influential and unpredictable. We finally test these modifications across simulations and user studies: our results suggest that robots which purposely make their actions harder to anticipate are better able to maintain influence over long-term interaction. See videos here: https://youtu.be/ydO83cgjZ2Q
summary: When humans interact with robots influence is inevitable. Consider an autonomous car driving near a human: the speed and steering of the autonomous car will affect how the human drives. Prior works have developed frameworks that enable robots to influence humans towards desired behaviors. But while these approaches are effective in the short-term (i.e., the first few human-robot interactions), here we explore long-term influence (i.e., repeated interactions between the same human and robot). Our central insight is that humans are dynamic: people adapt to robots, and behaviors which are influential now may fall short once the human learns to anticipate the robot's actions. With this insight, we experimentally demonstrate that a prevalent game-theoretic formalism for generating influential robot behaviors becomes less effective over repeated interactions. Next, we propose three modifications to Stackelberg games that make the robot's policy both influential and unpredictable. We finally test these modifications across simulations and user studies: our results suggest that robots which purposely make their actions harder to anticipate are better able to maintain influence over long-term interaction. See videos here: https://youtu.be/ydO83cgjZ2Q
abstract_zh: 当人类与机器人互动时，影响是不可避免的。考虑一辆靠近人类行驶的自动驾驶汽车：自动驾驶汽车的速度和转向将影响人类的驾驶方式。之前的工作已经开发了框架，使机器人能够影响人类实现期望的行为。但是，虽然这些方法在短期内有效（即最初的几次人机交互），但在这里我们探讨长期影响（即同一个人和机器人之间的重复交互）。我们的核心观点是人类是动态的：人们适应机器人，一旦人类学会预测机器人的行为，现在有影响力的行为可能会失效。有了这种洞察力，我们通过实验证明，用于生成有影响力的机器人行为的流行博弈论形式主义在重复交互中变得不那么有效。接下来，我们提出对 Stackelberg 博弈的三项修改，使机器人的策略既具有影响力又不可预测。最后，我们通过模拟和用户研究来测试这些修改：我们的结果表明，故意使其行为难以预测的机器人能够更好地保持对长期交互的影响。在此处观看视频：https://youtu.be/ydO83cgjZ2Q

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发能够在长期人机交互中持续影响人类行为的机器人策略，通过使机器人行为更具不可预测性来维持影响力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在短期交互中有效，但长期交互中人类会适应机器人行为导致影响力下降，需寻找新的策略应对动态人类适应性。
AI.method: 对Stackelberg博弈框架进行三方面改进，使机器人策略同时具备影响力和不可预测性，并通过模拟和用户实验验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，刻意增加行为不可预测性的机器人能更有效维持长期交互中的影响力，用户研究支持该结论。
AI.conclusion: 在长期人机交互中，机器人需通过不可预测的行为策略来对抗人类学习适应过程，从而保持有效影响力。

authors_text: Xixi Li,Jingsong Yuan
title: DeepVARwT: Deep Learning for a VAR Model with Trend
title_zh: DeepVARwT：具有趋势的 VAR 模型的深度学习
abstract: The vector autoregressive (VAR) model has been used to describe the dependence within and across multiple time series. This is a model for stationary time series which can be extended to allow the presence of a deterministic trend in each series. Detrending the data either parametrically or nonparametrically before fitting the VAR model gives rise to more errors in the latter part. In this study, we propose a new approach called DeepVARwT that employs deep learning methodology for maximum likelihood estimation of the trend and the dependence structure at the same time. A Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network is used for this purpose. To ensure the stability of the model, we enforce the causality condition on the autoregressive coefficients using the transformation of Ansley & Kohn (1986). We provide a simulation study and an application to real data. In the simulation study, we use realistic trend functions generated from real data and compare the estimates with true function/parameter values. In the real data application, we compare the prediction performance of this model with state-of-the-art models in the literature.
summary: The vector autoregressive (VAR) model has been used to describe the dependence within and across multiple time series. This is a model for stationary time series which can be extended to allow the presence of a deterministic trend in each series. Detrending the data either parametrically or nonparametrically before fitting the VAR model gives rise to more errors in the latter part. In this study, we propose a new approach called DeepVARwT that employs deep learning methodology for maximum likelihood estimation of the trend and the dependence structure at the same time. A Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network is used for this purpose. To ensure the stability of the model, we enforce the causality condition on the autoregressive coefficients using the transformation of Ansley & Kohn (1986). We provide a simulation study and an application to real data. In the simulation study, we use realistic trend functions generated from real data and compare the estimates with true function/parameter values. In the real data application, we compare the prediction performance of this model with state-of-the-art models in the literature.
abstract_zh: 矢量自回归 (VAR) 模型已用于描述多个时间序列内部和多个时间序列之间的依赖性。这是一个平稳时间序列的模型，可以扩展以允许每个序列中存在确定性趋势。在拟合 VAR 模型之前对数据进行参数化或非参数化趋势处理会在后一部分中产生更多错误。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种称为 DeepVARwT 的新方法，它采用深度学习方法同时对趋势和依赖结构进行最大似然估计。长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络用于此目的。为了确保模型的稳定性，我们使用 Ansley & Kohn (1986) 的变换对自回归系数强制执行因果关系条件。我们提供模拟研究和实际数据的应用。在模拟研究中，我们使用根据真实数据生成的真实趋势函数，并将估计值与真实函数/参数值进行比较。在实际数据应用中，我们将该模型的预测性能与文献中最先进的模型进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepVARwT方法，结合深度学习同时估计VAR模型中的趋势和依赖结构。
AI.motivation: 传统VAR模型在处理含确定性趋势的时间序列时，需先进行去趋势处理，但此过程易引入误差。
AI.method: 采用LSTM网络同时估计趋势与自回归系数，并通过Ansley & Kohn变换确保模型稳定性。
AI.result: 模拟研究显示估计值接近真实参数，实际数据应用中预测性能优于现有先进模型。
AI.conclusion: DeepVARwT方法在趋势估计与预测精度上表现优异，为VAR模型提供了新解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: DeepVARwT方法在趋势估计与预测精度上表现优异，为VAR模型提供了新解决方案。

In the real data application, we compare the prediction performance of this model with state-of-the-art models in the literature. 矢量自回归 (VAR) 模型已用于描述多个时间序列内部和多个时间序列之间的依赖性。这是一个平稳时间序列的模型，可以扩展以允许每个序列中存在确定性趋势。在拟合 VAR 模型之前对数据进行参数化或非参数化趋势处理会在后一部分中产生更多错误。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种称为 DeepVARwT 的新方法，它采用深度学习方法同时对趋势和依赖结构进行最大似然估计。长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络用于此目的。为了确保模型的稳定性，我们使用 Ansley & Kohn (1986) 的变换对自回归系数强制执行因果关系条件。我们提供模拟研究和实际数据的应用。在模拟研究中，我们使用根据真实数据生成的真实趋势函数，并将估计值与真实函数/参数值进行比较。在实际数据应用中，我们将该模型的预测性能与文献中最先进的模型进行了比较。 本文提出DeepVARwT方法，结合深度学习同时估计VAR模型中的趋势和依赖结构。 Xixi Li,Jingsong Yuan stat.ME,cs.AI

authors_text: Alvaro H. C. Correia,Gennaro Gala,Erik Quaeghebeur,Cassio de Campos,Robert Peharz
title: Continuous Mixtures of Tractable Probabilistic Models
title_zh: 可处理概率模型的连续混合
abstract: Probabilistic models based on continuous latent spaces, such as variational autoencoders, can be understood as uncountable mixture models where components depend continuously on the latent code. They have proven to be expressive tools for generative and probabilistic modelling, but are at odds with tractable probabilistic inference, that is, computing marginals and conditionals of the represented probability distribution. Meanwhile, tractable probabilistic models such as probabilistic circuits (PCs) can be understood as hierarchical discrete mixture models, and thus are capable of performing exact inference efficiently but often show subpar performance in comparison to continuous latent-space models. In this paper, we investigate a hybrid approach, namely continuous mixtures of tractable models with a small latent dimension. While these models are analytically intractable, they are well amenable to numerical integration schemes based on a finite set of integration points. With a large enough number of integration points the approximation becomes de-facto exact. Moreover, for a finite set of integration points, the integration method effectively compiles the continuous mixture into a standard PC. In experiments, we show that this simple scheme proves remarkably effective, as PCs learnt this way set new state of the art for tractable models on many standard density estimation benchmarks.
summary: Probabilistic models based on continuous latent spaces, such as variational autoencoders, can be understood as uncountable mixture models where components depend continuously on the latent code. They have proven to be expressive tools for generative and probabilistic modelling, but are at odds with tractable probabilistic inference, that is, computing marginals and conditionals of the represented probability distribution. Meanwhile, tractable probabilistic models such as probabilistic circuits (PCs) can be understood as hierarchical discrete mixture models, and thus are capable of performing exact inference efficiently but often show subpar performance in comparison to continuous latent-space models. In this paper, we investigate a hybrid approach, namely continuous mixtures of tractable models with a small latent dimension. While these models are analytically intractable, they are well amenable to numerical integration schemes based on a finite set of integration points. With a large enough number of integration points the approximation becomes de-facto exact. Moreover, for a finite set of integration points, the integration method effectively compiles the continuous mixture into a standard PC. In experiments, we show that this simple scheme proves remarkably effective, as PCs learnt this way set new state of the art for tractable models on many standard density estimation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 基于连续潜在空间的概率模型，例如变分自动编码器，可以理解为不可数混合模型，其中组件连续依赖于潜在代码。它们已被证明是生成和概率建模的表达工具，但与易于处理的概率推理（即计算所表示的概率分布的边际和条件）不一致。同时，概率电路（PC）等易于处理的概率模型可以理解为分层离散混合模型，因此能够有效地执行精确推理，但与连续潜在空间模型相比，通常表现出较差的性能。在本文中，我们研究了一种混合方法，即具有小潜在维度的易处理模型的连续混合。虽然这些模型在分析上很难处理，但它们很适合基于有限积分点集的数值积分方案。有了足够多的积分点，近似值实际上就变得精确了。此外，对于有限的积分点集，积分方法有效地将连续混合编译成标准 PC。在实验中，我们表明这种简单的方案被证明非常有效，因为电脑以这种方式学习，为许多标准密度估计基准上的易处理模型设置了新的技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合方法，将可处理的概率模型与连续潜在空间模型结合，以解决生成建模中的表达性与可计算性矛盾。
AI.motivation: 连续潜在空间模型（如VAE）具有强大的表达能力但难以精确推理，而可处理模型（如概率电路）虽能高效推理但表现欠佳，需寻求两者平衡。
AI.method: 通过引入小维度连续混合模型，利用数值积分方案将连续混合近似为离散概率电路，实现精确推理与高性能的统一。
AI.result: 该方法在多个标准密度估计基准测试中达到可处理模型的新最优水平，验证了混合架构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 连续混合模型通过数值积分转化为概率电路，成功融合了连续模型的表达能力与离散模型的可计算性优势。

authors_text: Yan Li,Guanghui Lan,Tuo Zhao
title: First-order Policy Optimization for Robust Markov Decision Process
title_zh: 鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程的一阶策略优化
abstract: We consider the problem of solving robust Markov decision process (MDP), which involves a set of discounted, finite state, finite action space MDPs with uncertain transition kernels. The goal of planning is to find a robust policy that optimizes the worst-case values against the transition uncertainties, and thus encompasses the standard MDP planning as a special case. For $(\mathbf{s},\mathbf{a})$-rectangular uncertainty sets, we establish several structural observations on the robust objective, which facilitates the development of a policy-based first-order method, namely the robust policy mirror descent (RPMD). An $\mathcal{O}(\log(1/ε))$ iteration complexity for finding an $ε$-optimal policy is established with linearly increasing stepsizes. We further develop a stochastic variant of the robust policy mirror descent method, named SRPMD, when the first-order information is only available through online interactions with the nominal environment. We show that the optimality gap converges linearly up to the noise level, and consequently establish an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/ε^2)$ sample complexity by developing a temporal difference learning method for policy evaluation. Both iteration and sample complexities are also discussed for RPMD with a constant stepsize. To the best of our knowledge, all the aforementioned results appear to be new for policy-based first-order methods applied to the robust MDP problem.
summary: We consider the problem of solving robust Markov decision process (MDP), which involves a set of discounted, finite state, finite action space MDPs with uncertain transition kernels. The goal of planning is to find a robust policy that optimizes the worst-case values against the transition uncertainties, and thus encompasses the standard MDP planning as a special case. For $(\mathbf{s},\mathbf{a})$-rectangular uncertainty sets, we establish several structural observations on the robust objective, which facilitates the development of a policy-based first-order method, namely the robust policy mirror descent (RPMD). An $\mathcal{O}(\log(1/ε))$ iteration complexity for finding an $ε$-optimal policy is established with linearly increasing stepsizes. We further develop a stochastic variant of the robust policy mirror descent method, named SRPMD, when the first-order information is only available through online interactions with the nominal environment. We show that the optimality gap converges linearly up to the noise level, and consequently establish an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/ε^2)$ sample complexity by developing a temporal difference learning method for policy evaluation. Both iteration and sample complexities are also discussed for RPMD with a constant stepsize. To the best of our knowledge, all the aforementioned results appear to be new for policy-based first-order methods applied to the robust MDP problem.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑求解鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）的问题，其中涉及一组具有不确定转移核的折扣、有限状态、有限动作空间 MDP。规划的目标是找到一个稳健的策略，针对过渡不确定性优化最坏情况的值，从而将标准 MDP 规划作为一个特例。对于$(\mathbf{s},\mathbf{a})$-矩形不确定性集，我们建立了几个关于鲁棒目标的结构观察，这有助于开发基于策略的一阶方法，即鲁棒策略镜像下降（RPMD）。用于寻找 $ε$ 最优策略的 $\mathcal{O}(\log(1/ε))$ 迭代复杂度是通过线性增加的步长建立的。当一阶信息只能通过与名义环境的在线交互获得时，我们进一步开发了鲁棒策略镜像下降方法的随机变体，称为 SRPMD。我们证明最优性差距线性收敛到噪声水平，并因此通过开发用于策略评估的时间差异学习方法来建立 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/ε^2)$ 样本复杂度。还讨论了具有恒定步长的 RPMD 的迭代和样本复杂性。据我们所知，所有上述结果对于应用于鲁棒 MDP 问题的基于策略的一阶方法来说似乎都是新的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决具有转移不确定性的鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程问题，寻找优化最坏情况值的鲁棒策略。
AI.motivation: 传统MDP假设转移概率确定，但实际环境中存在不确定性，需设计鲁棒策略以应对最坏情况。
AI.method: 提出基于策略的一阶方法，包括确定性环境下的鲁棒策略镜像下降（RPMD）和随机环境下的随机鲁棒策略镜像下降（SRPMD），结合时间差分学习进行策略评估。
AI.result: 理论证明了RPMD在ε-最优策略下的迭代复杂度为O(log(1/ε))，SRPMD样本复杂度为O(1/ε²)，并分析了常数步长的情况。
AI.conclusion: 首次在鲁棒MDP中提出一阶策略优化方法，填补了该领域的研究空白，并提供了理论保证。

authors_text: Arun Jambulapati,Yang P. Liu,Aaron Sidford
title: Chaining, Group Leverage Score Overestimates, and Fast Spectral Hypergraph Sparsification
title_zh: 链接、组杠杆分数高估和快速谱超图稀疏化
abstract: We present an algorithm that given any $n$-vertex, $m$-edge, rank $r$ hypergraph constructs a spectral sparsifier with $O(n \varepsilon^{-2} \log n \log r)$ hyperedges in nearly-linear $\widetilde{O}(mr)$ time. This improves in both size and efficiency over a line of work (Bansal-Svensson-Trevisan 2019, Kapralov-Krauthgamer-Tardos-Yoshida 2021) for which the previous best size was $O(\min\{n \varepsilon^{-4} \log^3 n,nr^3 \varepsilon^{-2} \log n\})$ and runtime was $\widetilde{O}(mr + n^{O(1)})$. Independent Result: In an independent work, Lee (Lee 2022) also shows how to compute a spectral hypergraph sparsifier with $O(n \varepsilon^{-2} \log n \log r)$ hyperedges.

This improves in both size and efficiency over a line of work (Bansal-Svensson-Trevisan 2019, Kapralov-Krauthgamer-Tardos-Yoshida 2021) for which the previous best size was $O(\min\{n \varepsilon^{-4} \log^3 n,nr^3 \varepsilon^{-2} \log n\})$ and runtime was $\widetilde{O}(mr + n^{O(1)})$. abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法，给定任何 $n$ 顶点、$m$ 边、秩 $r$ 超图，在近线性 $\widetilde{O}(mr)$ 时间内构造一个具有 $O(n \varepsilon^{-2} \log n \log r)$ 超边的谱稀疏器。这比一系列工作（Bansal-Svensson-Trevisan 2019，Kapralov-Krauthgamer-Tardos-Yoshida 2021）的大小和效率都有所提高，之前的最佳大小为 $O(\min\{n \varepsilon^{-4} \log^3 n,nr^3 \varepsilon^{-2} \log n\})$ ，运行时间为$\widetilde{O}(mr + n^{O(1)})$。独立结果：在一项独立工作中，Lee (Lee 2022) 还展示了如何使用 $O(n \varepsilon^{-2} \log n \log r)$ 超边计算谱超图稀疏器。

AI.motivation: 现有超图谱稀疏化方法在稀疏化器规模或运行时间上存在不足，需改进算法以实现更优的效率和规模。
AI.method: 通过链式结构与组杠杆分数估计方法，设计了一种近线性时间复杂度的超图谱稀疏化算法。
AI.result: 构造出具有$O(n \arepsilon^{-2} \\log n \\log r)$超边的谱稀疏化器，时间复杂度为$\\widetilde{O}(mr)$，优于先前结果。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在稀疏化器规模和效率上均取得突破，与独立研究结果共同推动了超图谱稀疏化领域的发展。

authors_text: Junjiao Tian,James Seale Smith,Zsolt Kira
title: FedFOR: Stateless Heterogeneous Federated Learning with First-Order Regularization
title_zh: FedFOR：具有一阶正则化的无状态异构联邦学习
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) seeks to distribute model training across local clients without collecting data in a centralized data-center, hence removing data-privacy concerns. A major challenge for FL is data heterogeneity (where each client's data distribution can differ) as it can lead to weight divergence among local clients and slow global convergence. The current SOTA FL methods designed for data heterogeneity typically impose regularization to limit the impact of non-IID data and are stateful algorithms, i.e., they maintain local statistics over time. While effective, these approaches can only be used for a special case of FL involving only a small number of reliable clients. For the more typical applications of FL where the number of clients is large (e.g., edge-device and mobile applications), these methods cannot be applied, motivating the need for a stateless approach to heterogeneous FL which can be used for any number of clients. We derive a first-order gradient regularization to penalize inconsistent local updates due to local data heterogeneity. Specifically, to mitigate weight divergence, we introduce a first-order approximation of the global data distribution into local objectives, which intuitively penalizes updates in the opposite direction of the global update. The end result is a stateless FL algorithm that achieves 1) significantly faster convergence (i.e., fewer communication rounds) and 2) higher overall converged performance than SOTA methods under non-IID data distribution. Importantly, our approach does not impose unrealistic limits on the client size, enabling learning from a large number of clients as is typical in most FL applications.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) seeks to distribute model training across local clients without collecting data in a centralized data-center, hence removing data-privacy concerns. A major challenge for FL is data heterogeneity (where each client's data distribution can differ) as it can lead to weight divergence among local clients and slow global convergence. The current SOTA FL methods designed for data heterogeneity typically impose regularization to limit the impact of non-IID data and are stateful algorithms, i.e., they maintain local statistics over time. While effective, these approaches can only be used for a special case of FL involving only a small number of reliable clients. For the more typical applications of FL where the number of clients is large (e.g., edge-device and mobile applications), these methods cannot be applied, motivating the need for a stateless approach to heterogeneous FL which can be used for any number of clients. We derive a first-order gradient regularization to penalize inconsistent local updates due to local data heterogeneity. Specifically, to mitigate weight divergence, we introduce a first-order approximation of the global data distribution into local objectives, which intuitively penalizes updates in the opposite direction of the global update. The end result is a stateless FL algorithm that achieves 1) significantly faster convergence (i.e., fewer communication rounds) and 2) higher overall converged performance than SOTA methods under non-IID data distribution. Importantly, our approach does not impose unrealistic limits on the client size, enabling learning from a large number of clients as is typical in most FL applications.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 寻求在本地客户端之间分发模型训练，而不在集中式数据中心收集数据，从而消除数据隐私问题。 FL 面临的主要挑战是数据异构性（每个客户端的数据分布可能不同），因为它可能导致本地客户端之间的权重差异和全局收敛缓慢。目前针对数据异构性设计的 SOTA FL 方法通常会进行正则化以限制非独立同分布数据的影响，并且是有状态算法，即它们会随着时间的推移维护本地统计数据。这些方法虽然有效，但只能用于仅涉及少数可靠客户端的 FL 特殊情况。对于客户端数量较多的更典型的 FL 应用（例如，边缘设备和移动应用程序），这些方法无法应用，这就激发了对可用于任意数量客户端的异构 FL 的无状态方法的需求。我们推导出一阶梯度正则化来惩罚由于局部数据异构性而导致的不一致的局部更新。具体来说，为了减轻权重发散，我们将全局数据分布的一阶近似引入到局部目标中，这直观地惩罚了与全局更新相反方向的更新。最终结果是一种无状态 FL 算法，它实现了 1）明显更快的收敛（即更少的通信轮数）和 2）比非 IID 数据分布下的 SOTA 方法更高的整体收敛性能。重要的是，我们的方法不会对客户端规模施加不切实际的限制，从而能够像大多数 FL 应用程序中典型的那样从大量客户端中学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedFOR，一种无状态的异构联邦学习方法，通过一阶正则化解决非独立同分布数据下的权重分歧问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法依赖状态化算法且仅适用于少量可靠客户端，无法满足边缘设备等大规模客户端场景需求。
AI.method: 引入一阶梯度正则化，在本地目标函数中加入全局数据分布近似项，抑制与全局更新方向相反的本地更新。
AI.result: 在非独立同分布数据下实现比现有方法更快的收敛速度（通信轮次减少）和更高的模型性能。
AI.conclusion: FedFOR无需维护本地统计信息，可扩展至大规模客户端场景，为典型联邦学习应用提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: FedFOR: Stateless Heterogeneous Federated Learning with First-Order Regularization FedFOR：具有一阶正则化的无状态异构联邦学习 Federated Learning (FL) seeks to distribute model training across local clients without collecting data in a centralized data-center, hence removing data-privacy concerns. A major challenge for FL is data heterogeneity (where each client's data distribution can differ) as it can lead to weight divergence among local clients and slow global convergence. The current SOTA FL methods designed for data heterogeneity typically impose regularization to limit the impact of non-IID data and are stateful algorithms, i.e., they maintain local statistics over time. While effective, these approaches can only be used for a special case of FL involving only a small number of reliable clients. For the more typical applications of FL where the number of clients is large (e.g., edge-device and mobile applications), these methods cannot be applied, motivating the need for a stateless approach to heterogeneous FL which can be used for any number of clients. We derive a first-order gradient regularization to penalize inconsistent local updates due to local data heterogeneity. Specifically, to mitigate weight divergence, we introduce a first-order approximation of the global data distribution into local objectives, which intuitively penalizes updates in the opposite direction of the global update. The end result is a stateless FL algorithm that achieves 1) significantly faster convergence (i.e., fewer communication rounds) and 2) higher overall converged performance than SOTA methods under non-IID data distribution. Importantly, our approach does not impose unrealistic limits on the client size, enabling learning from a large number of clients as is typical in most FL applications. 联邦学习 (FL) 寻求在本地客户端之间分发模型训练，而不在集中式数据中心收集数据，从而消除数据隐私问题。 FL 面临的主要挑战是数据异构性（每个客户端的数据分布可能不同），因为它可能导致本地客户端之间的权重差异和全局收敛缓慢。目前针对数据异构性设计的 SOTA FL 方法通常会进行正则化以限制非独立同分布数据的影响，并且是有状态算法，即它们会随着时间的推移维护本地统计数据。这些方法虽然有效，但只能用于仅涉及少数可靠客户端的 FL 特殊情况。对于客户端数量较多的更典型的 FL 应用（例如，边缘设备和移动应用程序），这些方法无法应用，这就激发了对可用于任意数量客户端的异构 FL 的无状态方法的需求。我们推导出一阶梯度正则化来惩罚由于局部数据异构性而导致的不一致的局部更新。具体来说，为了减轻权重发散，我们将全局数据分布的一阶近似引入到局部目标中，这直观地惩罚了与全局更新相反方向的更新。最终结果是一种无状态 FL 算法，它实现了 1）明显更快的收敛（即更少的通信轮数）和 2）比非 IID 数据分布下的 SOTA 方法更高的整体收敛性能。重要的是，我们的方法不会对客户端规模施加不切实际的限制，从而能够像大多数 FL 应用程序中典型的那样从大量客户端中学习。 本文提出FedFOR，一种无状态的异构联邦学习方法，通过一阶正则化解决非独立同分布数据下的权重分歧问题。 Junjiao Tian,James Seale Smith,Zsolt Kira cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhaobo K. Zheng,Kumar Akash,Teruhisa Misu,Vidya Krishmoorthy,Miaomiao Dong,Yuni Lee,Gaojian Huang
title: Identification of Adaptive Driving Style Preference through Implicit Inputs in SAE L2 Vehicles
title_zh: 通过 SAE L2 车辆中的隐式输入识别自适应驾驶风格偏好
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 International Conference on Multimodal Interaction (ICMI '22). Association for Computing Machinery, New York, NY, USA, 468-475
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 International Conference on Multimodal Interaction (ICMI '22). Association for Computing Machinery, New York, NY, USA, 468-475
abstract: A key factor to optimal acceptance and comfort of automated vehicle features is the driving style. Mismatches between the automated and the driver preferred driving styles can make users take over more frequently or even disable the automation features. This work proposes identification of user driving style preference with multimodal signals, so the vehicle could match user preference in a continuous and automatic way. We conducted a driving simulator study with 36 participants and collected extensive multimodal data including behavioral, physiological, and situational data. This includes eye gaze, steering grip force, driving maneuvers, brake and throttle pedal inputs as well as foot distance from pedals, pupil diameter, galvanic skin response, heart rate, and situational drive context. Then, we built machine learning models to identify preferred driving styles, and confirmed that all modalities are important for the identification of user preference. This work paves the road for implicit adaptive driving styles on automated vehicles.
summary: A key factor to optimal acceptance and comfort of automated vehicle features is the driving style. Mismatches between the automated and the driver preferred driving styles can make users take over more frequently or even disable the automation features. This work proposes identification of user driving style preference with multimodal signals, so the vehicle could match user preference in a continuous and automatic way. We conducted a driving simulator study with 36 participants and collected extensive multimodal data including behavioral, physiological, and situational data. This includes eye gaze, steering grip force, driving maneuvers, brake and throttle pedal inputs as well as foot distance from pedals, pupil diameter, galvanic skin response, heart rate, and situational drive context. Then, we built machine learning models to identify preferred driving styles, and confirmed that all modalities are important for the identification of user preference. This work paves the road for implicit adaptive driving styles on automated vehicles.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车功能的最佳接受度和舒适度的关键因素是驾驶风格。自动驾驶与驾驶员偏好的驾驶风格之间的不匹配可能会导致用户更频繁地接管甚至禁用自动功能。这项工作提出利用多模态信号识别用户驾驶风格偏好，以便车辆能够以连续、自动的方式匹配用户偏好。我们对 36 名参与者进行了驾驶模拟器研究，并收集了广泛的多模式数据，包括行为、生理和情境数据。这包括眼睛注视、转向握力、驾驶操作、制动和油门踏板输入以及脚距踏板的距离、瞳孔直径、皮肤电反应、心率和驾驶情境。然后，我们建立了机器学习模型来识别首选的驾驶风格，并确认所有模式对于识别用户偏好都很重要。这项工作为自动驾驶汽车的隐式自适应驾驶风格铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 通过隐式输入识别SAE L2车辆用户的驾驶风格偏好，以实现自动化驾驶的自适应调整。
AI.motivation: 自动化驾驶功能的接受度和舒适性依赖于驾驶风格匹配，风格不匹配可能导致用户频繁接管或关闭自动化功能。
AI.method: 通过驾驶模拟器采集36名参与者的多模态数据（行为、生理、情境数据），构建机器学习模型识别驾驶偏好。
AI.result: 验证了眼动、握力、踏板输入、生理信号等多模态数据对识别用户驾驶偏好均具有重要价值。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为自动化车辆实现隐式自适应驾驶风格提供了技术路径和数据支持。

ai_content.tldr: 通过隐式输入识别SAE L2车辆用户的驾驶风格偏好，以实现自动化驾驶的自适应调整。

search_text: Identification of Adaptive Driving Style Preference through Implicit Inputs in SAE L2 Vehicles 通过 SAE L2 车辆中的隐式输入识别自适应驾驶风格偏好 A key factor to optimal acceptance and comfort of automated vehicle features is the driving style. Mismatches between the automated and the driver preferred driving styles can make users take over more frequently or even disable the automation features. This work proposes identification of user driving style preference with multimodal signals, so the vehicle could match user preference in a continuous and automatic way. We conducted a driving simulator study with 36 participants and collected extensive multimodal data including behavioral, physiological, and situational data. This includes eye gaze, steering grip force, driving maneuvers, brake and throttle pedal inputs as well as foot distance from pedals, pupil diameter, galvanic skin response, heart rate, and situational drive context. Then, we built machine learning models to identify preferred driving styles, and confirmed that all modalities are important for the identification of user preference. This work paves the road for implicit adaptive driving styles on automated vehicles. 自动驾驶汽车功能的最佳接受度和舒适度的关键因素是驾驶风格。自动驾驶与驾驶员偏好的驾驶风格之间的不匹配可能会导致用户更频繁地接管甚至禁用自动功能。这项工作提出利用多模态信号识别用户驾驶风格偏好，以便车辆能够以连续、自动的方式匹配用户偏好。我们对 36 名参与者进行了驾驶模拟器研究，并收集了广泛的多模式数据，包括行为、生理和情境数据。这包括眼睛注视、转向握力、驾驶操作、制动和油门踏板输入以及脚距踏板的距离、瞳孔直径、皮肤电反应、心率和驾驶情境。然后，我们建立了机器学习模型来识别首选的驾驶风格，并确认所有模式对于识别用户偏好都很重要。这项工作为自动驾驶汽车的隐式自适应驾驶风格铺平了道路。 通过隐式输入识别SAE L2车辆用户的驾驶风格偏好，以实现自动化驾驶的自适应调整。 Zhaobo K. Zheng,Kumar Akash,Teruhisa Misu,Vidya Krishmoorthy,Miaomiao Dong,Yuni Lee,Gaojian Huang cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Hui En Pang,Zhongang Cai,Lei Yang,Tianwei Zhang,Ziwei Liu
title: Benchmarking and Analyzing 3D Human Pose and Shape Estimation Beyond Algorithms
title_zh: 超越算法的 3D 人体姿势和形状估计的基准测试和分析
comment: Submission to 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: Submission to 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: 3D human pose and shape estimation (a.k.a. "human mesh recovery") has achieved substantial progress. Researchers mainly focus on the development of novel algorithms, while less attention has been paid to other critical factors involved. This could lead to less optimal baselines, hindering the fair and faithful evaluations of newly designed methodologies. To address this problem, this work presents the first comprehensive benchmarking study from three under-explored perspectives beyond algorithms. 1) Datasets. An analysis on 31 datasets reveals the distinct impacts of data samples: datasets featuring critical attributes (i.e. diverse poses, shapes, camera characteristics, backbone features) are more effective. Strategical selection and combination of high-quality datasets can yield a significant boost to the model performance. 2) Backbones. Experiments with 10 backbones, ranging from CNNs to transformers, show the knowledge learnt from a proximity task is readily transferable to human mesh recovery. 3) Training strategies. Proper augmentation techniques and loss designs are crucial. With the above findings, we achieve a PA-MPJPE of 47.3 mm on the 3DPW test set with a relatively simple model. More importantly, we provide strong baselines for fair comparisons of algorithms, and recommendations for building effective training configurations in the future. Codebase is available at http://github.com/smplbody/hmr-benchmarks

More importantly, we provide strong baselines for fair comparisons of algorithms, and recommendations for building effective training configurations in the future. Codebase is available at http://github.com/smplbody/hmr-benchmarks
abstract_zh: 3D 人体姿势和形状估计（又名“人体网格恢复”）已取得实质性进展。研究人员主要关注新颖算法的开发，而对涉及的其他关键因素关注较少。这可能会导致基线不太理想，从而阻碍对新设计的方法进行公平和忠实的评估。为了解决这个问题，这项工作从算法之外的三个尚未充分探索的角度提出了第一个全面的基准测试研究。 1）数据集。对 31 个数据集的分析揭示了数据样本的独特影响：具有关键属性（即不同的姿势、形状、相机特征、骨干特征）的数据集更有效。高质量数据集的战略选择和组合可以显着提高模型性能。 2）骨干。对 10 个主干网（从 CNN 到 Transformer）的实验表明，从邻近任务中学到的知识可以很容易地转移到人类网格恢复中。 3）培训策略。适当的增强技术和损失设计至关重要。根据上述结果，我们使用相对简单的模型在 3DPW 测试集上实现了 47.3 mm 的 PA-MPJPE。更重要的是，我们为算法的公平比较提供了强有力的基线，并为未来构建有效的训练配置提供了建议。代码库位于 http://github.com/smplbody/hmr-benchmarks

AI.tldr: 本论文从数据集、主干网络和训练策略三个角度对3D人体姿态与形状估计任务进行基准测试与分析，提出超越算法本身的优化方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注算法创新而忽视数据、模型结构及训练策略等关键因素，导致基线不优且评估缺乏公平性。
AI.method: 分析31个数据集特性，测试10种主干网络（CNN至Transformer），验证数据增强与损失函数设计对训练的影响。
AI.result: 在3DPW测试集上以简单模型实现47.3mm PA-MPJPE，提供公平算法对比基线及有效训练配置建议。
AI.conclusion: 数据质量、模型架构与训练策略共同影响性能，未来需系统性优化非算法因素以推动领域发展。

This could lead to less optimal baselines, hindering the fair and faithful evaluations of newly designed methodologies. authors_text: Saeed Vahidian,Mahdi Morafah,Weijia Wang,Vyacheslav Kungurtsev,Chen Chen,Mubarak Shah,Bill Lin
title: Efficient Distribution Similarity Identification in Clustered Federated Learning via Principal Angles Between Client Data Subspaces
title_zh: 通过客户端数据子空间之间的主角进行集群联邦学习中的高效分布相似性识别
abstract: Clustered federated learning (FL) has been shown to produce promising results by grouping clients into clusters. This is especially effective in scenarios where separate groups of clients have significant differences in the distributions of their local data. Existing clustered FL algorithms are essentially trying to group together clients with similar distributions so that clients in the same cluster can leverage each other's data to better perform federated learning. However, prior clustered FL algorithms attempt to learn these distribution similarities indirectly during training, which can be quite time consuming as many rounds of federated learning may be required until the formation of clusters is stabilized. In this paper, we propose a new approach to federated learning that directly aims to efficiently identify distribution similarities among clients by analyzing the principal angles between the client data subspaces. Each client applies a truncated singular value decomposition (SVD) step on its local data in a single-shot manner to derive a small set of principal vectors, which provides a signature that succinctly captures the main characteristics of the underlying distribution. This small set of principal vectors is provided to the server so that the server can directly identify distribution similarities among the clients to form clusters. This is achieved by comparing the similarities of the principal angles between the client data subspaces spanned by those principal vectors. The approach provides a simple, yet effective clustered FL framework that addresses a broad range of data heterogeneity issues beyond simpler forms of Non-IIDness like label skews. Our clustered FL approach also enables convergence guarantees for non-convex objectives. Our code is available at https://github.com/MMorafah/PACFL.
summary: Clustered federated learning (FL) has been shown to produce promising results by grouping clients into clusters. This is especially effective in scenarios where separate groups of clients have significant differences in the distributions of their local data. Existing clustered FL algorithms are essentially trying to group together clients with similar distributions so that clients in the same cluster can leverage each other's data to better perform federated learning. However, prior clustered FL algorithms attempt to learn these distribution similarities indirectly during training, which can be quite time consuming as many rounds of federated learning may be required until the formation of clusters is stabilized. In this paper, we propose a new approach to federated learning that directly aims to efficiently identify distribution similarities among clients by analyzing the principal angles between the client data subspaces. Each client applies a truncated singular value decomposition (SVD) step on its local data in a single-shot manner to derive a small set of principal vectors, which provides a signature that succinctly captures the main characteristics of the underlying distribution. This small set of principal vectors is provided to the server so that the server can directly identify distribution similarities among the clients to form clusters. This is achieved by comparing the similarities of the principal angles between the client data subspaces spanned by those principal vectors. The approach provides a simple, yet effective clustered FL framework that addresses a broad range of data heterogeneity issues beyond simpler forms of Non-IIDness like label skews. Our clustered FL approach also enables convergence guarantees for non-convex objectives. Our code is available at https://github.com/MMorafah/PACFL.
abstract_zh: 集群联邦学习 (FL) 已被证明可以通过将客户端分组为集群来产生有希望的结果。这在不同的客户端组的本地数据分布存在显着差异的情况下尤其有效。现有的集群 FL 算法本质上是试图将具有相似分布的客户端分组在一起，以便同一集群中的客户端可以利用彼此的数据来更好地执行联邦学习。然而，先前的聚类 FL 算法尝试在训练期间间接学习这些分布相似性，这可能非常耗时，因为可能需要多轮联邦学习才能稳定聚类的形成。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的联邦学习方法，其直接目的是通过分析客户数据子空间之间的主角度来有效地识别客户之间的分布相似性。每个客户端以单次方式对其本地数据应用截断奇异值分解 (SVD) 步骤，以导出一小组主向量，这提供了一个简洁地捕获基础分布主要特征的签名。这一小组主向量被提供给服务器，以便服务器可以直接识别客户端之间的分布相似性以形成集群。这是通过比较由这些主向量跨越的客户端数据子空间之间的主角的相似性来实现的。该方法提供了一个简单而有效的集群 FL 框架，可以解决除标签倾斜等简单形式的非独立同分布之外的广泛数据异质性问题。我们的集群 FL 方法还可以保证非凸目标的收敛。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/MMorafah/PACFL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于客户端数据子空间主角度分析的高效分布相似性识别方法，用于改进聚类联邦学习。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类联邦学习算法通过间接方式在训练过程中学习分布相似性，耗时且需多轮训练才能稳定聚类。
AI.method: 每个客户端通过单次截断奇异值分解（SVD）提取本地数据的主向量，服务器通过比较主向量张成子空间的主角度来直接识别分布相似性并形成聚类。
AI.result: 该方法有效解决多种数据异质性问题，提供非凸目标的收敛性保证，并在代码库中开源实现。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接分析数据子空间主角度，本文提出的方法为聚类联邦学习提供了更高效且通用的解决方案。
