method: 每个客户端通过单次截断奇异值分解（SVD）提取本地数据的主向量，服务器通过比较主向量张成子空间的主角度来直接识别分布相似性并形成聚类。
result: 该方法有效解决多种数据异质性问题，提供非凸目标的收敛性保证，并在代码库中开源实现。
conclusion: 通过直接分析数据子空间主角度，本文提出的方法为聚类联邦学习提供了更高效且通用的解决方案。
search_text: Efficient Distribution Similarity Identification in Clustered Federated Learning via Principal Angles Between Client Data Subspaces 通过客户端数据子空间之间的主角进行集群联邦学习中的高效分布相似性识别 Clustered federated learning (FL) has been shown to produce promising results by grouping clients into clusters. This is especially effective in scenarios where separate groups of clients have significant differences in the distributions of their local data. Existing clustered FL algorithms are essentially trying to group together clients with similar distributions so that clients in the same cluster can leverage each other's data to better perform federated learning. However, prior clustered FL algorithms attempt to learn these distribution similarities indirectly during training, which can be quite time consuming as many rounds of federated learning may be required until the formation of clusters is stabilized. In this paper, we propose a new approach to federated learning that directly aims to efficiently identify distribution similarities among clients by analyzing the principal angles between the client data subspaces. Each client applies a truncated singular value decomposition (SVD) step on its local data in a single-shot manner to derive a small set of principal vectors, which provides a signature that succinctly captures the main characteristics of the underlying distribution. This small set of principal vectors is provided to the server so that the server can directly identify distribution similarities among the clients to form clusters. This is achieved by comparing the similarities of the principal angles between the client data subspaces spanned by those principal vectors. The approach provides a simple, yet effective clustered FL framework that addresses a broad range of data heterogeneity issues beyond simpler forms of Non-IIDness like label skews. Our clustered FL approach also enables convergence guarantees for non-convex objectives. Our code is available at https://github.com/MMorafah/PACFL. 集群联邦学习 (FL) 已被证明可以通过将客户端分组为集群来产生有希望的结果。这在不同的客户端组的本地数据分布存在显着差异的情况下尤其有效。现有的集群 FL 算法本质上是试图将具有相似分布的客户端分组在一起，以便同一集群中的客户端可以利用彼此的数据来更好地执行联邦学习。然而，先前的聚类 FL 算法尝试在训练期间间接学习这些分布相似性，这可能非常耗时，因为可能需要多轮联邦学习才能稳定聚类的形成。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的联邦学习方法，其直接目的是通过分析客户数据子空间之间的主角度来有效地识别客户之间的分布相似性。每个客户端以单次方式对其本地数据应用截断奇异值分解 (SVD) 步骤，以导出一小组主向量，这提供了一个简洁地捕获基础分布主要特征的签名。这一小组主向量被提供给服务器，以便服务器可以直接识别客户端之间的分布相似性以形成集群。这是通过比较由这些主向量跨越的客户端数据子空间之间的主角的相似性来实现的。该方法提供了一个简单而有效的集群 FL 框架，可以解决除标签倾斜等简单形式的非独立同分布之外的广泛数据异质性问题。我们的集群 FL 方法还可以保证非凸目标的收敛。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/MMorafah/PACFL 获取。 本文提出一种基于客户端数据子空间主角度分析的高效分布相似性识别方法，用于改进聚类联邦学习。 Saeed Vahidian,Mahdi Morafah,Weijia Wang,Vyacheslav Kungurtsev,Chen Chen,Mubarak Shah,Bill Lin cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC,math.OC

authors_text: Prabhat Mahato,Sudipta Saha,Chayan Sarkar,Md Shaghil
title: Consensus-based Fast and Energy-Efficient Multi-Robot Task Allocation
title_zh: 基于共识的快速、节能的多机器人任务分配
comment: Accepted in Elsevier Journal of Robotics and Autonomous Systems
comments: Accepted in Elsevier Journal of Robotics and Autonomous Systems
abstract: In a multi-robot system, the appropriate allocation of the tasks to the individual robots is a very significant component. The availability of a centralized infrastructure can guarantee an optimal allocation of the tasks. However, in many important scenarios such as search and rescue, exploration, disaster-management, war-field, etc., on-the-fly allocation of the dynamic tasks to the robots in a decentralized fashion is the only possible option. Efficient communication among the robots plays a crucial role in any such decentralized setting. Existing works on distributed Multi-Robot Task Allocation (MRTA) either assume that the network is available or a naive communication paradigm is used. On the contrary, in most of these scenarios, the network infrastructure is either unstable or unavailable and ad-hoc networking is the only resort. Recent developments in synchronous-transmission (ST) based wireless communication protocols are shown to be more efficient than the traditional asynchronous transmission-based protocols in ad hoc networks such as Wireless Sensor Network (WSN)/Internet of Things (IoT) applications. The current work is the first effort that utilizes ST for MRTA. Specifically, we propose an algorithm that efficiently adapts ST-based many-to-many interaction and minimizes the information exchange to reach a consensus for task allocation. We showcase the efficacy of the proposed algorithm through an extensive simulation-based study of its latency and energy-efficiency under different settings.
summary: In a multi-robot system, the appropriate allocation of the tasks to the individual robots is a very significant component. The availability of a centralized infrastructure can guarantee an optimal allocation of the tasks. However, in many important scenarios such as search and rescue, exploration, disaster-management, war-field, etc., on-the-fly allocation of the dynamic tasks to the robots in a decentralized fashion is the only possible option. Efficient communication among the robots plays a crucial role in any such decentralized setting. Existing works on distributed Multi-Robot Task Allocation (MRTA) either assume that the network is available or a naive communication paradigm is used. On the contrary, in most of these scenarios, the network infrastructure is either unstable or unavailable and ad-hoc networking is the only resort. Recent developments in synchronous-transmission (ST) based wireless communication protocols are shown to be more efficient than the traditional asynchronous transmission-based protocols in ad hoc networks such as Wireless Sensor Network (WSN)/Internet of Things (IoT) applications. The current work is the first effort that utilizes ST for MRTA. Specifically, we propose an algorithm that efficiently adapts ST-based many-to-many interaction and minimizes the information exchange to reach a consensus for task allocation. We showcase the efficacy of the proposed algorithm through an extensive simulation-based study of its latency and energy-efficiency under different settings.
abstract_zh: 在多机器人系统中，将任务适当分配给各个机器人是非常重要的组成部分。集中式基础设施的可用性可以保证任务的最佳分配。然而，在许多重要场景中，例如搜索和救援、探索、灾难管理、战场等，以分散的方式将动态任务动态分配给机器人是唯一可能的选择。机器人之间的高效通信在任何此类分散的环境中都起着至关重要的作用。分布式多机器人任务分配（MRTA）的现有工作要么假设网络可用，要么使用简单的通信范例。相反，在大多数情况下，网络基础设施要么不稳定，要么不可用，自组织网络是唯一的手段。在无线传感器网络 (WSN)/物联网 (IoT) 应用等自组织网络中，基于同步传输 (ST) 的无线通信协议的最新发展被证明比传统的基于异步传输的协议更有效。目前的工作是首次利用 ST 进行 MRTA。具体来说，我们提出了一种算法，可以有效地适应基于 ST 的多对多交互，并最大限度地减少信息交换，以达成任务分配的共识。我们通过对不同设置下的延迟和能效进行广泛的基于模拟的研究来展示所提出算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于共识的快速且节能的多机器人任务分配算法，适用于去中心化场景下的动态任务分配。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式多机器人任务分配方法依赖稳定网络或简单通信模式，但在灾难救援等场景中网络常不稳定，需更高效的通信协议。
AI.method: 利用同步传输(ST)无线通信协议，设计多对多交互机制，通过最小化信息交换实现任务分配共识。
AI.result: 仿真结果显示算法在不同场景下具有较低延迟和高能效，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为去中心化多机器人系统提供了高效节能的任务分配方案，ST协议的应用为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Marius Millea
title: Improved Marginal Unbiased Score Expansion (MUSE) via Implicit Differentiation
title_zh: 通过隐式微分改进边际无偏分数扩展 (MUSE)
comment: Code to reproduce our results available at https://github.com/marius311/muse-implicit-paper
comments: Code to reproduce our results available at https://github.com/marius311/muse-implicit-paper
abstract: We apply the technique of implicit differentiation to boost performance, reduce numerical error, and remove required user-tuning in the Marginal Unbiased Score Expansion (MUSE) algorithm for hierarchical Bayesian inference. We demonstrate these improvements on three representative inference problems: 1) an extended Neal's funnel 2) Bayesian neural networks, and 3) probabilistic principal component analysis. On our particular test cases, MUSE with implicit differentiation is faster than Hamiltonian Monte Carlo by factors of 155, 397, and 5, respectively, or factors of 65, 278, and 1 without implicit differentiation, and yields good approximate marginal posteriors. The Julia and Python MUSE packages have been updated to use implicit differentiation, and can solve problems defined by hand or with any of a number of popular probabilistic programming languages and automatic differentiation backends.
summary: We apply the technique of implicit differentiation to boost performance, reduce numerical error, and remove required user-tuning in the Marginal Unbiased Score Expansion (MUSE) algorithm for hierarchical Bayesian inference. We demonstrate these improvements on three representative inference problems: 1) an extended Neal's funnel 2) Bayesian neural networks, and 3) probabilistic principal component analysis. On our particular test cases, MUSE with implicit differentiation is faster than Hamiltonian Monte Carlo by factors of 155, 397, and 5, respectively, or factors of 65, 278, and 1 without implicit differentiation, and yields good approximate marginal posteriors. The Julia and Python MUSE packages have been updated to use implicit differentiation, and can solve problems defined by hand or with any of a number of popular probabilistic programming languages and automatic differentiation backends.
abstract_zh: 我们应用隐式微分技术来提高性能、减少数值误差，并消除分层贝叶斯推理的边际无偏分数扩展 (MUSE) 算法中所需的用户调整。我们在三个代表性推理问题上展示了这些改进：1）扩展的尼尔漏斗2）贝叶斯神经网络和3）概率主成分分析。在我们的特定测试用例中，具有隐式微分的 MUSE 比哈密顿蒙特卡罗分别快 155、397 和 5 倍，或者没有隐式微分的 65、278 和 1 倍，并且产生良好的近似边缘后验。 Julia 和 Python MUSE 包已更新为使用隐式微分，并且可以解决手动定义的问题或使用任何一种流行的概率编程语言和自动微分后端定义的问题。

AI.tldr: 通过隐式微分改进边际无偏分数展开（MUSE）算法以提升分层贝叶斯推断的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MUSE算法需要用户调参且存在数值误差，需改进以提高效率和自动化程度。
AI.method: 应用隐式微分技术优化MUSE算法，减少数值误差并消除用户调参需求。
AI.result: 在三个测试案例中，MUSE速度较HMC提升65-397倍，生成良好近似边缘后验分布。
AI.conclusion: 隐式微分显著提升MUSE性能，相关软件包已更新支持该改进并兼容多种编程语言。

authors_text: Yu-Ying Yeh,Koki Nagano,Sameh Khamis,Jan Kautz,Ming-Yu Liu,Ting-Chun Wang
title: Learning to Relight Portrait Images via a Virtual Light Stage and Synthetic-to-Real Adaptation
title_zh: 学习通过虚拟光台和合成到真实的适应重新照亮肖像图像
comment: To appear in ACM Transactions on Graphics (SIGGRAPH Asia 2022). 21 pages, 25 figures, 7 tables. Project page: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/dir/lumos/
comments: To appear in ACM Transactions on Graphics (SIGGRAPH Asia 2022). 21 pages, 25 figures, 7 tables. Project page: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/dir/lumos/
abstract: Given a portrait image of a person and an environment map of the target lighting, portrait relighting aims to re-illuminate the person in the image as if the person appeared in an environment with the target lighting. To achieve high-quality results, recent methods rely on deep learning. An effective approach is to supervise the training of deep neural networks with a high-fidelity dataset of desired input-output pairs, captured with a light stage. However, acquiring such data requires an expensive special capture rig and time-consuming efforts, limiting access to only a few resourceful laboratories. To address the limitation, we propose a new approach that can perform on par with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) relighting methods without requiring a light stage. Our approach is based on the realization that a successful relighting of a portrait image depends on two conditions. First, the method needs to mimic the behaviors of physically-based relighting. Second, the output has to be photorealistic. To meet the first condition, we propose to train the relighting network with training data generated by a virtual light stage that performs physically-based rendering on various 3D synthetic humans under different environment maps. To meet the second condition, we develop a novel synthetic-to-real approach to bring photorealism to the relighting network output. In addition to achieving SOTA results, our approach offers several advantages over the prior methods, including controllable glares on glasses and more temporally-consistent results for relighting videos.
summary: Given a portrait image of a person and an environment map of the target lighting, portrait relighting aims to re-illuminate the person in the image as if the person appeared in an environment with the target lighting. To achieve high-quality results, recent methods rely on deep learning. An effective approach is to supervise the training of deep neural networks with a high-fidelity dataset of desired input-output pairs, captured with a light stage. However, acquiring such data requires an expensive special capture rig and time-consuming efforts, limiting access to only a few resourceful laboratories. To address the limitation, we propose a new approach that can perform on par with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) relighting methods without requiring a light stage. Our approach is based on the realization that a successful relighting of a portrait image depends on two conditions. First, the method needs to mimic the behaviors of physically-based relighting. Second, the output has to be photorealistic. To meet the first condition, we propose to train the relighting network with training data generated by a virtual light stage that performs physically-based rendering on various 3D synthetic humans under different environment maps. To meet the second condition, we develop a novel synthetic-to-real approach to bring photorealism to the relighting network output. In addition to achieving SOTA results, our approach offers several advantages over the prior methods, including controllable glares on glasses and more temporally-consistent results for relighting videos.
abstract_zh: 给定人像图像和目标照明的环境图，人像重新照明的目的是重新照亮图像中的人，就好像人出现在具有目标照明的环境中一样。为了获得高质量的结果，最近的方法依赖于深度学习。一种有效的方法是使用光台捕获的所需输入输出对的高保真数据集来监督深度神经网络的训练。然而，获取此类数据需要昂贵的特殊捕获设备和耗时的工作，限制了只有少数资源丰富的实验室的访问。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种新方法，可以与最先进的 (SOTA) 重新照明方法相媲美，而无需灯光舞台。我们的方法基于这样的认识：肖像图像的成功重新照明取决于两个条件。首先，该方法需要模仿基于物理的重新照明的行为。其次，输出必须逼真。为了满足第一个条件，我们建议使用虚拟灯光阶段生成的训练数据来训练重新照明网络，该虚拟灯光阶段在不同环境地图下对各种 3D 合成人体执行基于物理的渲染。为了满足第二个条件，我们开发了一种新颖的合成真实方法，为重新照明网络输出带来照片级真实感。除了实现 SOTA 结果之外，我们的方法还比以前的方法具有多个优势，包括眼镜上的可控眩光以及重新照明视频的时间一致性结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需真实光舞台设备的人像重照明方法，通过虚拟光舞台生成数据和合成到真实适应技术实现高质量重照明。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的重照明方法依赖昂贵的真实光舞台设备采集数据，限制了方法的普及和应用。
AI.method: 构建虚拟光舞台生成物理渲染的合成数据训练网络，并开发合成到真实适应技术提升输出真实感，同时控制镜片眩光和提升视频时序一致性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，支持可控镜片眩光生成和视频重照明时序一致性，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过虚拟数据生成与真实适应技术有效解决了光舞台依赖问题，在保持高质量的同时提升了实用性和可控性。

To achieve high-quality results, recent methods rely on deep learning. An effective approach is to supervise the training of deep neural networks with a high-fidelity dataset of desired input-output pairs, captured with a light stage. However, acquiring such data requires an expensive special capture rig and time-consuming efforts, limiting access to only a few resourceful laboratories. To address the limitation, we propose a new approach that can perform on par with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) relighting methods without requiring a light stage. Our approach is based on the realization that a successful relighting of a portrait image depends on two conditions. First, the method needs to mimic the behaviors of physically-based relighting. Second, the output has to be photorealistic. To meet the first condition, we propose to train the relighting network with training data generated by a virtual light stage that performs physically-based rendering on various 3D synthetic humans under different environment maps. To meet the second condition, we develop a novel synthetic-to-real approach to bring photorealism to the relighting network output. In addition to achieving SOTA results, our approach offers several advantages over the prior methods, including controllable glares on glasses and more temporally-consistent results for relighting videos. 给定人像图像和目标照明的环境图，人像重新照明的目的是重新照亮图像中的人，就好像人出现在具有目标照明的环境中一样。为了获得高质量的结果，最近的方法依赖于深度学习。一种有效的方法是使用光台捕获的所需输入输出对的高保真数据集来监督深度神经网络的训练。然而，获取此类数据需要昂贵的特殊捕获设备和耗时的工作，限制了只有少数资源丰富的实验室的访问。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种新方法，可以与最先进的 (SOTA) 重新照明方法相媲美，而无需灯光舞台。我们的方法基于这样的认识：肖像图像的成功重新照明取决于两个条件。首先，该方法需要模仿基于物理的重新照明的行为。其次，输出必须逼真。为了满足第一个条件，我们建议使用虚拟灯光阶段生成的训练数据来训练重新照明网络，该虚拟灯光阶段在不同环境地图下对各种 3D 合成人体执行基于物理的渲染。为了满足第二个条件，我们开发了一种新颖的合成真实方法，为重新照明网络输出带来照片级真实感。除了实现 SOTA 结果之外，我们的方法还比以前的方法具有多个优势，包括眼镜上的可控眩光以及重新照明视频的时间一致性结果。 本文提出一种无需真实光舞台设备的人像重照明方法，通过虚拟光舞台生成数据和合成到真实适应技术实现高质量重照明。 Yu-Ying Yeh,Koki Nagano,Sameh Khamis,Jan Kautz,Ming-Yu Liu,Ting-Chun Wang cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Vibhaalakshmi Sivaraman,Pantea Karimi,Vedantha Venkatapathy,Mehrdad Khani,Sadjad Fouladi,Mohammad Alizadeh,Frédo Durand,Vivienne Sze
title: Gemino: Practical and Robust Neural Compression for Video Conferencing
title_zh: Gemino：用于视频会议的实用且强大的神经压缩
comment: 13 pages, 5 appendix
comments: 13 pages, 5 appendix
abstract: Video conferencing systems suffer from poor user experience when network conditions deteriorate because current video codecs simply cannot operate at extremely low bitrates. Recently, several neural alternatives have been proposed that reconstruct talking head videos at very low bitrates using sparse representations of each frame such as facial landmark information. However, these approaches produce poor reconstructions in scenarios with major movement or occlusions over the course of a call, and do not scale to higher resolutions. We design Gemino, a new neural compression system for video conferencing based on a novel high-frequency-conditional super-resolution pipeline. Gemino upsamples a very low-resolution version of each target frame while enhancing high-frequency details (e.g., skin texture, hair, etc.) based on information extracted from a single high-resolution reference image. We use a multi-scale architecture that runs different components of the model at different resolutions, allowing it to scale to resolutions comparable to 720p, and we personalize the model to learn specific details of each person, achieving much better fidelity at low bitrates. We implement Gemino atop aiortc, an open-source Python implementation of WebRTC, and show that it operates on 1024x1024 videos in real-time on a Titan X GPU, and achieves 2.2-5x lower bitrate than traditional video codecs for the same perceptual quality.
summary: Video conferencing systems suffer from poor user experience when network conditions deteriorate because current video codecs simply cannot operate at extremely low bitrates. Recently, several neural alternatives have been proposed that reconstruct talking head videos at very low bitrates using sparse representations of each frame such as facial landmark information. However, these approaches produce poor reconstructions in scenarios with major movement or occlusions over the course of a call, and do not scale to higher resolutions. We design Gemino, a new neural compression system for video conferencing based on a novel high-frequency-conditional super-resolution pipeline. Gemino upsamples a very low-resolution version of each target frame while enhancing high-frequency details (e.g., skin texture, hair, etc.) based on information extracted from a single high-resolution reference image. We use a multi-scale architecture that runs different components of the model at different resolutions, allowing it to scale to resolutions comparable to 720p, and we personalize the model to learn specific details of each person, achieving much better fidelity at low bitrates. We implement Gemino atop aiortc, an open-source Python implementation of WebRTC, and show that it operates on 1024x1024 videos in real-time on a Titan X GPU, and achieves 2.2-5x lower bitrate than traditional video codecs for the same perceptual quality.
abstract_zh: 当网络条件恶化时，视频会议系统的用户体验会很差，因为当前的视频编解码器根本无法在极低的比特率下运行。最近，已经提出了几种神经替代方案，使用每帧的稀疏表示（例如面部标志信息）以非常低的比特率重建头部说话视频。然而，这些方法在通话过程中发生重大移动或遮挡的场景中会产生较差的重建效果，并且无法扩展到更高分辨率。我们设计了 Gemino，这是一种基于新颖的高频条件超分辨率管道的新型视频会议神经压缩系统。 Gemino 对每个目标帧的极低分辨率版本进行上采样，同时根据从单个高分辨率参考图像中提取的信息增强高频细节（例如皮肤纹理、头发等）。我们使用多尺度架构，以不同的分辨率运行模型的不同组件，使其能够扩展到与 720p 相当的分辨率，并且我们对模型进行个性化以了解每个人的具体细节，从而在低比特率下实现更好的保真度。我们在 aiortc（WebRTC 的开源 Python 实现）之上实现了 Gemino，并表明它在 Titan X GPU 上实时运行 1024x1024 视频，并且在相同的感知质量下实现了比传统视频编解码器低 2.2-5 倍的比特率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Gemino，一种基于神经网络的视频压缩系统，旨在提升视频会议在低带宽下的画质和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频编码器在极端低码率下表现不佳，神经网络方法在复杂运动或遮挡场景中重建效果差且无法扩展至高分辨率。
AI.method: 设计高频率条件超分辨率流水线，通过低分辨率目标帧与高分辨率参考图像提取信息增强细节，并采用多尺度架构支持720p分辨率，结合个性化模型学习用户特征。
AI.result: 在Titan X GPU上实现实时1024x1024视频处理，相同感知质量下码率较传统编解码器降低2.2-5倍。
AI.conclusion: Gemino通过创新架构和个性化学习，在低码率下显著提升视频会议画质，为实际应用提供高效鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Aleksey Fedoseev,Ahmed Baza,Ayush Gupta,Ekaterina Dorzhieva,Riya Neelesh Gujarathi,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: DandelionTouch: High Fidelity Haptic Rendering of Soft Objects in VR by a Swarm of Drones
title_zh: DandelionTouch：一群无人机在 VR 中对软物体进行高保真触觉渲染
comment: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC). Copyright 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted
comments: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC). Copyright 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted
abstract: To achieve high fidelity haptic rendering of soft objects in a high mobility virtual environment, we propose a novel haptic display DandelionTouch. The tactile actuators are delivered to the fingertips of the user by a swarm of drones. Users of DandelionTouch are capable of experiencing tactile feedback in a large space that is not limited by the device's working area. Importantly, they will not experience muscle fatigue during long interactions with virtual objects. Hand tracking and swarm control algorithm allow guiding the swarm with hand motions and avoid collisions inside the formation. Several topologies of the impedance connection between swarm units were investigated in this research. The experiment, in which drones performed a point following task on a square trajectory in real-time, revealed that drones connected in a Star topology performed the trajectory with low mean positional error (RMSE decreased by 20.6% in comparison with other impedance topologies and by 40.9% in comparison with potential field-based swarm control). The achieved velocities of the drones in all formations with impedance behavior were 28% higher than for the swarm controlled with the potential field algorithm. Additionally, the perception of several vibrotactile patterns was evaluated in a user study with 7 participants. The study has shown that the proposed combination of temporal delay and frequency modulation allows users to successfully recognize the surface property and motion direction in VR simultaneously (mean recognition rate of 70%, maximum of 93%). DandelionTouch suggests a new type of haptic feedback in VR systems where no hand-held or wearable interface is required.
summary: To achieve high fidelity haptic rendering of soft objects in a high mobility virtual environment, we propose a novel haptic display DandelionTouch. The tactile actuators are delivered to the fingertips of the user by a swarm of drones. Users of DandelionTouch are capable of experiencing tactile feedback in a large space that is not limited by the device's working area. Importantly, they will not experience muscle fatigue during long interactions with virtual objects. Hand tracking and swarm control algorithm allow guiding the swarm with hand motions and avoid collisions inside the formation. Several topologies of the impedance connection between swarm units were investigated in this research. The experiment, in which drones performed a point following task on a square trajectory in real-time, revealed that drones connected in a Star topology performed the trajectory with low mean positional error (RMSE decreased by 20.6% in comparison with other impedance topologies and by 40.9% in comparison with potential field-based swarm control). The achieved velocities of the drones in all formations with impedance behavior were 28% higher than for the swarm controlled with the potential field algorithm. Additionally, the perception of several vibrotactile patterns was evaluated in a user study with 7 participants. The study has shown that the proposed combination of temporal delay and frequency modulation allows users to successfully recognize the surface property and motion direction in VR simultaneously (mean recognition rate of 70%, maximum of 93%). DandelionTouch suggests a new type of haptic feedback in VR systems where no hand-held or wearable interface is required.
abstract_zh: 为了在高移动性虚拟环境中实现软物体的高保真触觉渲染，我们提出了一种新颖的触觉显示器 DandelionTouch。一群无人机将触觉执行器传送到用户的指尖。 DandelionTouch的用户能够在不受设备工作区域限制的大空间中体验触觉反馈。重要的是，他们在与虚拟物体长时间交互时不会感到肌肉疲劳。手部跟踪和群体控制算法允许通过手部动作引导群体并避免编队内部发生碰撞。本研究研究了群体单元之间阻抗连接的几种拓扑。该实验中，无人机在方形轨迹上实时执行点跟踪任务，结果表明，以星形拓扑连接的无人机以较低的平均位置误差执行轨迹（与其他阻抗拓扑相比，RMSE 降低了 20.6%，与潜在的基于场的群体控制相比，RMSE 降低了 40.9%）。所有具有阻抗行为的编队中无人机所达到的速度比使用势场算法控制的蜂群高 28%。此外，在一项有 7 名参与者参加的用户研究中评估了几种振动触觉模式的感知。研究表明，所提出的时间延迟和频率调制的组合允许用户成功地同时识别 VR 中的表面属性和运动方向（平均识别率为 70%，最高为 93%）。 DandelionTouch 提出了一种无需手持或可穿戴界面的 VR 系统中的新型触觉反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无人机群的高保真触觉渲染系统DandelionTouch，用于虚拟现实环境中软物体的触觉反馈。
AI.motivation: 传统触觉设备存在活动范围受限、易导致肌肉疲劳等问题，需开发无需手持或穿戴的新型触觉反馈方案。
AI.method: 通过无人机群向用户指尖传递触觉执行器，结合手部追踪与群体控制算法实现动态轨迹跟踪，并对比不同阻抗拓扑结构（如星型拓扑）与势场算法的性能差异。
AI.result: 星型拓扑结构使无人机轨迹均方根误差降低20.6%，速度提升28%；用户实验显示70%的表面属性与运动方向识别率（最高93%）。
AI.conclusion: DandelionTouch通过无人机群实现了大空间无穿戴触觉反馈，为VR系统提供了新型高保真触觉交互方案。

search_text: DandelionTouch: High Fidelity Haptic Rendering of Soft Objects in VR by a Swarm of Drones DandelionTouch：一群无人机在 VR 中对软物体进行高保真触觉渲染 To achieve high fidelity haptic rendering of soft objects in a high mobility virtual environment, we propose a novel haptic display DandelionTouch. The tactile actuators are delivered to the fingertips of the user by a swarm of drones. Users of DandelionTouch are capable of experiencing tactile feedback in a large space that is not limited by the device's working area. Importantly, they will not experience muscle fatigue during long interactions with virtual objects. Hand tracking and swarm control algorithm allow guiding the swarm with hand motions and avoid collisions inside the formation. Several topologies of the impedance connection between swarm units were investigated in this research. The experiment, in which drones performed a point following task on a square trajectory in real-time, revealed that drones connected in a Star topology performed the trajectory with low mean positional error (RMSE decreased by 20.6% in comparison with other impedance topologies and by 40.9% in comparison with potential field-based swarm control). The achieved velocities of the drones in all formations with impedance behavior were 28% higher than for the swarm controlled with the potential field algorithm. Additionally, the perception of several vibrotactile patterns was evaluated in a user study with 7 participants. The study has shown that the proposed combination of temporal delay and frequency modulation allows users to successfully recognize the surface property and motion direction in VR simultaneously (mean recognition rate of 70%, maximum of 93%). DandelionTouch suggests a new type of haptic feedback in VR systems where no hand-held or wearable interface is required. 为了在高移动性虚拟环境中实现软物体的高保真触觉渲染，我们提出了一种新颖的触觉显示器 DandelionTouch。一群无人机将触觉执行器传送到用户的指尖。 DandelionTouch的用户能够在不受设备工作区域限制的大空间中体验触觉反馈。重要的是，他们在与虚拟物体长时间交互时不会感到肌肉疲劳。手部跟踪和群体控制算法允许通过手部动作引导群体并避免编队内部发生碰撞。本研究研究了群体单元之间阻抗连接的几种拓扑。该实验中，无人机在方形轨迹上实时执行点跟踪任务，结果表明，以星形拓扑连接的无人机以较低的平均位置误差执行轨迹（与其他阻抗拓扑相比，RMSE 降低了 20.6%，与潜在的基于场的群体控制相比，RMSE 降低了 40.9%）。所有具有阻抗行为的编队中无人机所达到的速度比使用势场算法控制的蜂群高 28%。此外，在一项有 7 名参与者参加的用户研究中评估了几种振动触觉模式的感知。研究表明，所提出的时间延迟和频率调制的组合允许用户成功地同时识别 VR 中的表面属性和运动方向（平均识别率为 70%，最高为 93%）。 DandelionTouch 提出了一种无需手持或可穿戴界面的 VR 系统中的新型触觉反馈。 本文提出了一种基于无人机群的高保真触觉渲染系统DandelionTouch，用于虚拟现实环境中软物体的触觉反馈。 Aleksey Fedoseev,Ahmed Baza,Ayush Gupta,Ekaterina Dorzhieva,Riya Neelesh Gujarathi,Dzmitry Tsetserukou cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Kushagr Batra,Mridul Kavidayal
title: Animating Still Images
title_zh: 静态图像动画
abstract: We present a method for imparting motion to a still 2D image. Our method uses deep learning to segment a section of the image denoted as subject, then uses in-painting to complete the background, and finally adds animation to the subject by embedding the image in a triangle mesh, while preserving the rest of the image.
summary: We present a method for imparting motion to a still 2D image. Our method uses deep learning to segment a section of the image denoted as subject, then uses in-painting to complete the background, and finally adds animation to the subject by embedding the image in a triangle mesh, while preserving the rest of the image.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种为静态 2D 图像赋予运动的方法。我们的方法使用深度学习来分割表示为主题的图像部分，然后使用图像修复来完成背景，最后通过将图像嵌入到三角形网格中来为主题添加动画，同时保留图像的其余部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过深度学习为静态2D图像添加运动的方法。
AI.motivation: 为静态图像赋予动态效果在多媒体和娱乐领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 使用深度学习分割图像主体，通过补全背景并嵌入三角网格实现主体动画化。
AI.result: 成功实现了对静态图像中指定主体的动画生成，同时保持背景完整性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为静态图像动画化提供了有效解决方案，展示了深度学习在图像处理中的潜力。

authors_text: Swarnadeep Saha,Shiyue Zhang,Peter Hase,Mohit Bansal
title: Summarization Programs: Interpretable Abstractive Summarization with Neural Modular Trees
title_zh: 摘要程序：使用神经模块树进行可解释的抽象摘要
comment: ICLR 2023
comments: ICLR 2023
abstract: Current abstractive summarization models either suffer from a lack of clear interpretability or provide incomplete rationales by only highlighting parts of the source document. To this end, we propose the Summarization Program (SP), an interpretable modular framework consisting of an (ordered) list of binary trees, each encoding the step-by-step generative process of an abstractive summary sentence from the source document. A Summarization Program contains one root node per summary sentence, and a distinct tree connects each summary sentence (root node) to the document sentences (leaf nodes) from which it is derived, with the connecting nodes containing intermediate generated sentences. Edges represent different modular operations involved in summarization such as sentence fusion, compression, and paraphrasing. We first propose an efficient best-first search method over neural modules, SP-Search that identifies SPs for human summaries by directly optimizing for ROUGE scores. Next, using these programs as automatic supervision, we propose seq2seq models that generate Summarization Programs, which are then executed to obtain final summaries. We demonstrate that SP-Search effectively represents the generative process behind human summaries using modules that are typically faithful to their intended behavior. We also conduct a simulation study to show that Summarization Programs improve the interpretability of summarization models by allowing humans to better simulate model reasoning. Summarization Programs constitute a promising step toward interpretable and modular abstractive summarization, a complex task previously addressed primarily through blackbox end-to-end neural systems. Supporting code available at https://github.com/swarnaHub/SummarizationPrograms
summary: Current abstractive summarization models either suffer from a lack of clear interpretability or provide incomplete rationales by only highlighting parts of the source document. To this end, we propose the Summarization Program (SP), an interpretable modular framework consisting of an (ordered) list of binary trees, each encoding the step-by-step generative process of an abstractive summary sentence from the source document. A Summarization Program contains one root node per summary sentence, and a distinct tree connects each summary sentence (root node) to the document sentences (leaf nodes) from which it is derived, with the connecting nodes containing intermediate generated sentences. Edges represent different modular operations involved in summarization such as sentence fusion, compression, and paraphrasing. We first propose an efficient best-first search method over neural modules, SP-Search that identifies SPs for human summaries by directly optimizing for ROUGE scores. Next, using these programs as automatic supervision, we propose seq2seq models that generate Summarization Programs, which are then executed to obtain final summaries. We demonstrate that SP-Search effectively represents the generative process behind human summaries using modules that are typically faithful to their intended behavior. We also conduct a simulation study to show that Summarization Programs improve the interpretability of summarization models by allowing humans to better simulate model reasoning. Summarization Programs constitute a promising step toward interpretable and modular abstractive summarization, a complex task previously addressed primarily through blackbox end-to-end neural systems. Supporting code available at https://github.com/swarnaHub/SummarizationPrograms
abstract_zh: 当前的抽象摘要模型要么缺乏明确的可解释性，要么仅通过突出显示源文档的部分内容来提供不完整的基本原理。为此，我们提出了摘要程序（SP），这是一种可解释的模块化框架，由（有序）二叉树列表组成，每个二叉树都编码来自源文档的抽象摘要句子的逐步生成过程。摘要程序包含每个摘要句子一个根节点，并且一棵不同的树将每个摘要句子（根节点）连接到从中导出它的文档句子（叶节点），连接节点包含中间生成的句子。边代表摘要中涉及的不同模块化操作，例如句子融合、压缩和释义。我们首先提出了一种基于神经模块的高效最佳优先搜索方法，即 SP-Search，它通过直接优化 ROUGE 分数来识别人类摘要的 SP。接下来，使用这些程序作为自动监督，我们提出了生成摘要程序的 seq2seq 模型，然后执行该程序以获得最终摘要。我们证明 SP-Search 使用通常忠实于其预期行为的模块有效地代表了人类摘要背后的生成过程。我们还进行了一项模拟研究，以表明摘要程序通过允许人类更好地模拟模型推理来提高摘要模型的可解释性。摘要程序向可解释和模块化的抽象摘要迈出了有希望的一步，这是一项以前主要通过黑盒端到端神经系统解决的复杂任务。支持代码可在 https://github.com/swarnaHub/SummarizationPrograms 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的抽取式摘要框架——摘要程序（SP），通过神经模块树结构明确表示摘要生成过程。
AI.motivation: 现有抽取式摘要模型缺乏清晰的可解释性，或仅通过部分文档内容高亮提供不完整的推理依据。
AI.method: 构建由二叉树组成的模块化框架，每个树对应摘要句子的生成步骤，通过SP-Search算法优化ROUGE分数生成程序，并利用seq2seq模型自动输出摘要程序执行生成最终摘要。
AI.result: 实验表明SP能有效表示人类摘要的生成过程，且通过模拟研究验证了其提升模型可解释性的能力。
AI.conclusion: 摘要程序为可解释的模块化抽取式摘要提供了可行方案，突破了传统端到端黑盒系统的局限性。

A Summarization Program contains one root node per summary sentence, and a distinct tree connects each summary sentence (root node) to the document sentences (leaf nodes) from which it is derived, with the connecting nodes containing intermediate generated sentences. Edges represent different modular operations involved in summarization such as sentence fusion, compression, and paraphrasing. We first propose an efficient best-first search method over neural modules, SP-Search that identifies SPs for human summaries by directly optimizing for ROUGE scores. Next, using these programs as automatic supervision, we propose seq2seq models that generate Summarization Programs, which are then executed to obtain final summaries. We demonstrate that SP-Search effectively represents the generative process behind human summaries using modules that are typically faithful to their intended behavior. We also conduct a simulation study to show that Summarization Programs improve the interpretability of summarization models by allowing humans to better simulate model reasoning. Summarization Programs constitute a promising step toward interpretable and modular abstractive summarization, a complex task previously addressed primarily through blackbox end-to-end neural systems. Supporting code available at https://github.com/swarnaHub/SummarizationPrograms 当前的抽象摘要模型要么缺乏明确的可解释性，要么仅通过突出显示源文档的部分内容来提供不完整的基本原理。为此，我们提出了摘要程序（SP），这是一种可解释的模块化框架，由（有序）二叉树列表组成，每个二叉树都编码来自源文档的抽象摘要句子的逐步生成过程。摘要程序包含每个摘要句子一个根节点，并且一棵不同的树将每个摘要句子（根节点）连接到从中导出它的文档句子（叶节点），连接节点包含中间生成的句子。边代表摘要中涉及的不同模块化操作，例如句子融合、压缩和释义。我们首先提出了一种基于神经模块的高效最佳优先搜索方法，即 SP-Search，它通过直接优化 ROUGE 分数来识别人类摘要的 SP。接下来，使用这些程序作为自动监督，我们提出了生成摘要程序的 seq2seq 模型，然后执行该程序以获得最终摘要。我们证明 SP-Search 使用通常忠实于其预期行为的模块有效地代表了人类摘要背后的生成过程。我们还进行了一项模拟研究，以表明摘要程序通过允许人类更好地模拟模型推理来提高摘要模型的可解释性。摘要程序向可解释和模块化的抽象摘要迈出了有希望的一步，这是一项以前主要通过黑盒端到端神经系统解决的复杂任务。支持代码可在 https://github.com/swarnaHub/SummarizationPrograms 获取 本文提出了一种可解释的抽取式摘要框架——摘要程序（SP），通过神经模块树结构明确表示摘要生成过程。 Swarnadeep Saha,Shiyue Zhang,Peter Hase,Mohit Bansal cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SE

authors_text: David O'Callaghan,Cian Ryan,Waseem Shariff,Muhammad Ali Farooq,Joseph Lemley,Peter Corcoran
title: Recurrent Super-Resolution Method for Enhancing Low Quality Thermal Facial Data
title_zh: 用于增强低质量热面部数据的循环超分辨率方法
comment: In proceedings of the 24th Irish Machine Vision and Image Processing Conference, Belfast Ireland, 31 August - 2nd September 2022
comments: In proceedings of the 24th Irish Machine Vision and Image Processing Conference, Belfast Ireland, 31 August - 2nd September 2022
abstract: The process of obtaining high-resolution images from single or multiple low-resolution images of the same scene is of great interest for real-world image and signal processing applications. This study is about exploring the potential usage of deep learning based image super-resolution algorithms on thermal data for producing high quality thermal imaging results for in-cabin vehicular driver monitoring systems. In this work we have proposed and developed a novel multi-image super-resolution recurrent neural network to enhance the resolution and improve the quality of low-resolution thermal imaging data captured from uncooled thermal cameras. The end-to-end fully convolutional neural network is trained from scratch on newly acquired thermal data of 30 different subjects in indoor environmental conditions. The effectiveness of the thermally tuned super-resolution network is validated quantitatively as well as qualitatively on test data of 6 distinct subjects. The network was able to achieve a mean peak signal to noise ratio of 39.24 on the validation dataset for 4x super-resolution, outperforming bicubic interpolation both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: The process of obtaining high-resolution images from single or multiple low-resolution images of the same scene is of great interest for real-world image and signal processing applications. This study is about exploring the potential usage of deep learning based image super-resolution algorithms on thermal data for producing high quality thermal imaging results for in-cabin vehicular driver monitoring systems. In this work we have proposed and developed a novel multi-image super-resolution recurrent neural network to enhance the resolution and improve the quality of low-resolution thermal imaging data captured from uncooled thermal cameras. The end-to-end fully convolutional neural network is trained from scratch on newly acquired thermal data of 30 different subjects in indoor environmental conditions. The effectiveness of the thermally tuned super-resolution network is validated quantitatively as well as qualitatively on test data of 6 distinct subjects. The network was able to achieve a mean peak signal to noise ratio of 39.24 on the validation dataset for 4x super-resolution, outperforming bicubic interpolation both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 从同一场景的单个或多个低分辨率图像获得高分辨率图像的过程对于现实世界的图像和信号处理应用非常有意义。本研究旨在探索基于深度学习的图像超分辨率算法在热数据上的潜在用途，以便为车内车辆驾驶员监控系统生成高质量的热成像结果。在这项工作中，我们提出并开发了一种新颖的多图像超分辨率循环神经网络，以增强非制冷热像仪捕获的低分辨率热成像数据的分辨率并提高其质量。端到端全卷积神经网络是根据室内环境条件下 30 个不同对象新获取的热数据从头开始训练的。热调谐超分辨率网络的有效性在 6 个不同受试者的测试数据上得到了定量和定性验证。该网络能够在 4 倍超分辨率的验证数据集上实现 39.24 的平均峰值信噪比，在数量和质量上均优于双三次插值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种循环神经网络方法，用于提升低分辨率热成像面部数据的分辨率和质量，以应用于车载驾驶员监控系统。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率热成像对车载监控系统至关重要，但现有算法在热数据上效果有限，需专门优化以提高图像质量与实用性。
AI.method: 设计多图像超分辨率循环神经网络，采用端到端全卷积结构，基于30个受试者的室内热数据训练模型。
AI.result: 在4倍超分辨率测试中，验证集PSNR达39.24，显著优于双三次插值，定性和定量评估均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该网络有效提升了热成像质量，为车载监控系统提供了更清晰的低质量热数据增强方案。

authors_text: Alberto Giammarino,Juan M. Gandarias,Arash Ajoudani
title: An Open Tele-Impedance Framework to Generate Data for Contact-Rich Tasks in Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 一种开放式远程阻抗框架，用于为机器人操作中接触丰富的任务生成数据
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, submitted to IEEE International Conference on Advanced Robotics and Its Social Impacts 2023 (ARSO)
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, submitted to IEEE International Conference on Advanced Robotics and Its Social Impacts 2023 (ARSO)
abstract: Using large datasets in machine learning has led to outstanding results, in some cases outperforming humans in tasks that were believed impossible for machines. However, achieving human-level performance when dealing with physically interactive tasks, e.g., in contact-rich robotic manipulation, is still a big challenge. It is well known that regulating the Cartesian impedance for such operations is of utmost importance for their successful execution. Approaches like reinforcement Learning (RL) can be a promising paradigm for solving such problems. More precisely, approaches that use task-agnostic expert demonstrations to bootstrap learning when solving new tasks have a huge potential since they can exploit large datasets. However, existing data collection systems are expensive, complex, or do not allow for impedance regulation. This work represents a first step towards a data collection framework suitable for collecting large datasets of impedance-based expert demonstrations compatible with the RL problem formulation, where a novel action space is used. The framework is designed according to requirements acquired after an extensive analysis of available data collection frameworks for robotics manipulation. The result is a low-cost and open-access tele-impedance framework which makes human experts capable of demonstrating contact-rich tasks.
summary: Using large datasets in machine learning has led to outstanding results, in some cases outperforming humans in tasks that were believed impossible for machines. However, achieving human-level performance when dealing with physically interactive tasks, e.g., in contact-rich robotic manipulation, is still a big challenge. It is well known that regulating the Cartesian impedance for such operations is of utmost importance for their successful execution. More precisely, approaches that use task-agnostic expert demonstrations to bootstrap learning when solving new tasks have a huge potential since they can exploit large datasets. However, existing data collection systems are expensive, complex, or do not allow for impedance regulation. This work represents a first step towards a data collection framework suitable for collecting large datasets of impedance-based expert demonstrations compatible with the RL problem formulation, where a novel action space is used. The framework is designed according to requirements acquired after an extensive analysis of available data collection frameworks for robotics manipulation. The result is a low-cost and open-access tele-impedance framework which makes human experts capable of demonstrating contact-rich tasks.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习中使用大型数据集已经取得了出色的成果，在某些情况下，在被认为机器不可能完成的任务中超越了人类。然而，在处理物理交互任务时，例如在接触丰富的机器人操作中，实现人类水平的性能仍然是一个巨大的挑战。众所周知，调节此类操作的笛卡尔阻抗对于其成功执行至关重要。强化学习（RL）等方法可能是解决此类问题的一个有前途的范例。更准确地说，在解决新任务时使用与任务无关的专家演示来引导学习的方法具有巨大的潜力，因为它们可以利用大型数据集。然而，现有的数据收集系统昂贵、复杂，或者不允许阻抗调节。这项工作代表了迈向数据收集框架的第一步，该框架适合收集与 RL 问题公式兼容的基于阻抗的专家演示的大型数据集，其中使用了新颖的动作空间。该框架是根据对机器人操作的可用数据收集框架进行广泛分析后获得的要求而设计的。结果是一个低成本且开放的远程阻抗框架，使人类专家能够演示接触丰富的任务。

AI.tldr: 开发一个开放的遥操作阻抗框架，用于生成机器人接触丰富任务的专家数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有数据收集系统成本高、复杂或无法调节阻抗，而基于阻抗的专家演示对强化学习解决物理交互任务至关重要。
AI.method: 设计新型动作空间并分析现有框架需求，构建低成本开放框架以支持人类专家演示接触任务。
AI.result: 实现可兼容强化学习的阻抗数据收集框架，使人类专家能有效演示复杂接触操作。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人操作领域提供了可行的数据收集方案，推动接触丰富任务的算法研究。

authors_text: Rihab Gorsane,Omayma Mahjoub,Ruan de Kock,Roland Dubb,Siddarth Singh,Arnu Pretorius
title: Towards a Standardised Performance Evaluation Protocol for Cooperative MARL
title_zh: 迈向合作 MARL 的标准化性能评估协议
comment: Published at the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). Website: see https://sites.google.com/view/marl-standard-protocol . 43 Pages, 21 Figures, 8 Tables
comments: Published at the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). Website: see https://sites.google.com/view/marl-standard-protocol . 43 Pages, 21 Figures, 8 Tables
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has emerged as a useful approach to solving decentralised decision-making problems at scale. Research in the field has been growing steadily with many breakthrough algorithms proposed in recent years. In this work, we take a closer look at this rapid development with a focus on evaluation methodologies employed across a large body of research in cooperative MARL. By conducting a detailed meta-analysis of prior work, spanning 75 papers accepted for publication from 2016 to 2022, we bring to light worrying trends that put into question the true rate of progress. We further consider these trends in a wider context and take inspiration from single-agent RL literature on similar issues with recommendations that remain applicable to MARL. Combining these recommendations, with novel insights from our analysis, we propose a standardised performance evaluation protocol for cooperative MARL. We argue that such a standard protocol, if widely adopted, would greatly improve the validity and credibility of future research, make replication and reproducibility easier, as well as improve the ability of the field to accurately gauge the rate of progress over time by being able to make sound comparisons across different works. Finally, we release our meta-analysis data publicly on our project website for future research on evaluation: https://sites.google.com/view/marl-standard-protocol

In this work, we take a closer look at this rapid development with a focus on evaluation methodologies employed across a large body of research in cooperative MARL. By conducting a detailed meta-analysis of prior work, spanning 75 papers accepted for publication from 2016 to 2022, we bring to light worrying trends that put into question the true rate of progress. We further consider these trends in a wider context and take inspiration from single-agent RL literature on similar issues with recommendations that remain applicable to MARL. Combining these recommendations, with novel insights from our analysis, we propose a standardised performance evaluation protocol for cooperative MARL. We argue that such a standard protocol, if widely adopted, would greatly improve the validity and credibility of future research, make replication and reproducibility easier, as well as improve the ability of the field to accurately gauge the rate of progress over time by being able to make sound comparisons across different works. Finally, we release our meta-analysis data publicly on our project website for future research on evaluation: https://sites.google.com/view/marl-standard-protocol
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）已成为大规模解决分散决策问题的有用方法。近年来，该领域的研究一直在稳步发展，提出了许多突破性算法。在这项工作中，我们仔细研究了这种快速发展，重点关注合作 MARL 的大量研究中采用的评估方法。通过对之前的工作（涵盖 2016 年至 2022 年接受发表的 75 篇论文）进行详细的荟萃分析，我们揭示了令人担忧的趋势，这些趋势使人们对真实的进展速度产生了疑问。我们在更广泛的背景下进一步考虑这些趋势，并从有关类似问题的单智能体强化学习文献中汲取灵感，并提出仍然适用于 MARL 的建议。结合这些建议以及我们分析中的新颖见解，我们提出了合作 MARL 的标准化绩效评估协议。我们认为，这样的标准协议如果被广泛采用，将极大地提高未来研究的有效性和可信度，使复制和再现变得更容易，并通过能够对不同的作品进行合理的比较来提高该领域准确衡量随时间推移的进展速度的能力。最后，我们在项目网站上公开发布元分析数据，以供未来的评估研究：https://sites.google.com/view/marl-standard-protocol

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于协作式多智能体强化学习（MARL）的标准性能评估协议。
AI.motivation: 当前协作MARL领域存在评估方法不统一的问题，导致研究进展的真实性存疑，需建立标准化评估体系以提升研究可信度与可复现性。
AI.method: 通过元分析75篇2016-2022年发表的论文，结合单智能体强化学习领域的评估建议，提出包含基准测试、指标定义和实验设计的标准协议。
AI.result: 设计出标准化评估框架并公开元分析数据，为未来研究提供可比较的基准和透明化评估工具。
AI.conclusion: 标准化协议的广泛采用将显著提升协作MARL研究的有效性、可复现性及对领域进展的准确衡量能力。

authors_text: Dominique J. Kösters,Bryan A. Kortman,Irem Boybat,Elena Ferro,Sagar Dolas,Roberto de Austri,Johan Kwisthout,Hans Hilgenkamp,Theo Rasing,Heike Riel,Abu Sebastian,Sascha Caron,Johan H. Mentink
title: Benchmarking energy consumption and latency for neuromorphic computing in condensed matter and particle physics
title_zh: 凝聚态和粒子物理中神经形态计算的能耗和延迟基准测试
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, submitted to and accepted by APL Machine Learning
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures, submitted to and accepted by APL Machine Learning
abstract: The massive use of artificial neural networks (ANNs), increasingly popular in many areas of scientific computing, rapidly increases the energy consumption of modern high-performance computing systems. An appealing and possibly more sustainable alternative is provided by novel neuromorphic paradigms, which directly implement ANNs in hardware. However, little is known about the actual benefits of running ANNs on neuromorphic hardware for use cases in scientific computing. Here we present a methodology for measuring the energy cost and compute time for inference tasks with ANNs on conventional hardware. In addition, we have designed an architecture for these tasks and estimate the same metrics based on a state-of-the-art analog in-memory computing (AIMC) platform, one of the key paradigms in neuromorphic computing. Both methodologies are compared for a use case in quantum many-body physics in two dimensional condensed matter systems and for anomaly detection at 40 MHz rates at the Large Hadron Collider in particle physics. We find that AIMC can achieve up to one order of magnitude shorter computation times than conventional hardware, at an energy cost that is up to three orders of magnitude smaller. This suggests great potential for faster and more sustainable scientific computing with neuromorphic hardware.
summary: The massive use of artificial neural networks (ANNs), increasingly popular in many areas of scientific computing, rapidly increases the energy consumption of modern high-performance computing systems. An appealing and possibly more sustainable alternative is provided by novel neuromorphic paradigms, which directly implement ANNs in hardware. However, little is known about the actual benefits of running ANNs on neuromorphic hardware for use cases in scientific computing. Here we present a methodology for measuring the energy cost and compute time for inference tasks with ANNs on conventional hardware. In addition, we have designed an architecture for these tasks and estimate the same metrics based on a state-of-the-art analog in-memory computing (AIMC) platform, one of the key paradigms in neuromorphic computing. Both methodologies are compared for a use case in quantum many-body physics in two dimensional condensed matter systems and for anomaly detection at 40 MHz rates at the Large Hadron Collider in particle physics. We find that AIMC can achieve up to one order of magnitude shorter computation times than conventional hardware, at an energy cost that is up to three orders of magnitude smaller. This suggests great potential for faster and more sustainable scientific computing with neuromorphic hardware.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络（ANN）的大量使用在科学计算的许多领域日益流行，迅速增加了现代高性能计算系统的能耗。新颖的神经形态范式提供了一种有吸引力且可能更可持续的替代方案，它直接在硬件中实现人工神经网络。然而，人们对在神经形态硬件上运行人工神经网络对于科学计算用例的实际好处知之甚少。在这里，我们提出了一种在传统硬件上使用 ANN 测量推理任务的能源成本和计算时间的方法。此外，我们还为这些任务设计了一个架构，并基于最先进的模拟内存计算（AIMC）平台（神经形态计算的关键范例之一）来估计相同的指标。两种方法都针对二维凝聚态物质系统中的量子多体物理用例以及粒子物理中大型强子对撞机中 40 MHz 速率的异常检测进行了比较。我们发现 AIMC 可以比传统硬件缩短一个数量级的计算时间，而能源成本则减少三个数量级。这表明神经形态硬件在更快、更可持续的科学计算方面具有巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 评估神经形态计算在凝聚态物理和粒子物理中的能耗与延迟，对比传统硬件性能。
AI.motivation: 传统计算系统因人工神经网络应用导致能耗激增，而神经形态计算作为潜在替代方案，其科学计算场景下的实际效益尚不明确。
AI.method: 设计测量传统硬件与模拟内存计算（AIMC）平台的能耗及计算时间方法，并在凝聚态量子多体物理和粒子物理异常检测场景中进行对比验证。
AI.result: AIMC平台计算速度较传统硬件快10倍，能耗低1000倍，展现显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 神经形态硬件有望推动科学计算向更高效、可持续方向发展。

authors_text: Rhythm Bhatia,Tomi H. Kinnunen
title: An Initial study on Birdsong Re-synthesis Using Neural Vocoders
title_zh: 使用神经声码器重新合成鸟鸣的初步研究
comment: To appear in 24th International Conference on Speech and Computer (SPECOM), GURUGRAM, INDIA
comments: To appear in 24th International Conference on Speech and Computer (SPECOM), GURUGRAM, INDIA
abstract: Modern speech synthesis uses neural vocoders to model raw waveform samples directly. This increased versatility has expanded the scope of vocoders from speech to other domains, such as music. We address another interesting domain of bio-acoustics. We provide initial comparative analysis-resynthesis experiments of birdsong using traditional (WORLD) and two neural (WaveNet autoencoder, parallel WaveGAN) vocoders. Our subjective results indicate no difference in the three vocoders in terms of species discrimination (ABX test). Nonetheless, the WORLD vocoder samples were rated higher in terms of retaining bird-like qualities (MOS test). All vocoders faced issues with pitch and voicing. Our results indicate some of the challenges in processing low-quality wildlife audio data.
summary: Modern speech synthesis uses neural vocoders to model raw waveform samples directly. This increased versatility has expanded the scope of vocoders from speech to other domains, such as music. We address another interesting domain of bio-acoustics. We provide initial comparative analysis-resynthesis experiments of birdsong using traditional (WORLD) and two neural (WaveNet autoencoder, parallel WaveGAN) vocoders. Our subjective results indicate no difference in the three vocoders in terms of species discrimination (ABX test). Nonetheless, the WORLD vocoder samples were rated higher in terms of retaining bird-like qualities (MOS test). All vocoders faced issues with pitch and voicing. Our results indicate some of the challenges in processing low-quality wildlife audio data.
abstract_zh: 现代语音合成使用神经声码器直接对原始波形样本进行建模。这种多功能性的增强将声码器的范围从语音扩展到了其他领域，例如音乐。我们讨论生物声学的另一个有趣领域。我们使用传统（WORLD）和两种神经（WaveNet 自动编码器、并行 WaveGAN）声码器提供鸟鸣声的初步比较分析-再合成实验。我们的主观结果表明，三种声码器在物种歧视方面没有差异（ABX 测试）。尽管如此，WORLD 声码器样本在保留鸟样品质方面的评级较高（MOS 测试）。所有声码器都面临音高和发声问题。我们的结果表明了处理低质量野生动物音频数据的一些挑战。

AI.tldr: 本研究初步探索使用神经声码器对鸟类歌声进行重合成，并比较传统与神经声码器的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统声码器与神经声码器在语音合成领域已取得进展，但生物声学中低质量野生动物音频的处理仍面临挑战，需验证声码器在该领域的适用性。
AI.method: 采用传统WORLD声码器及两种神经声码器（WaveNet自编码器、平行WaveGAN），对鸟类歌声进行重合成，并通过ABX测试（物种辨别）和MOS测试（鸟类特性保留度）进行主观评估。
AI.result: ABX测试显示三种声码器在物种辨别上无显著差异，但WORLD声码器在MOS测试中更受好评；所有声码器均存在音高与发声处理缺陷，低质量数据处理难度较高。
AI.conclusion: 神经声码器可应用于鸟类歌声重合成，但需进一步解决音高控制与低质量数据处理问题，以提升生物声学研究的实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本研究初步探索使用神经声码器对鸟类歌声进行重合成，并比较传统与神经声码器的效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统声码器与神经声码器在语音合成领域已取得进展，但生物声学中低质量野生动物音频的处理仍面临挑战，需验证声码器在该领域的适用性。
ai_content.method: 采用传统WORLD声码器及两种神经声码器（WaveNet自编码器、平行WaveGAN），对鸟类歌声进行重合成，并通过ABX测试（物种辨别）和MOS测试（鸟类特性保留度）进行主观评估。
ai_content.result: ABX测试显示三种声码器在物种辨别上无显著差异，但WORLD声码器在MOS测试中更受好评；所有声码器均存在音高与发声处理缺陷，低质量数据处理难度较高。
ai_content.conclusion: 神经声码器可应用于鸟类歌声重合成，但需进一步解决音高控制与低质量数据处理问题，以提升生物声学研究的实用性。

search_text: An Initial study on Birdsong Re-synthesis Using Neural Vocoders 使用神经声码器重新合成鸟鸣的初步研究 Modern speech synthesis uses neural vocoders to model raw waveform samples directly. This increased versatility has expanded the scope of vocoders from speech to other domains, such as music. We address another interesting domain of bio-acoustics. We provide initial comparative analysis-resynthesis experiments of birdsong using traditional (WORLD) and two neural (WaveNet autoencoder, parallel WaveGAN) vocoders. Our subjective results indicate no difference in the three vocoders in terms of species discrimination (ABX test). Nonetheless, the WORLD vocoder samples were rated higher in terms of retaining bird-like qualities (MOS test). All vocoders faced issues with pitch and voicing. Our results indicate some of the challenges in processing low-quality wildlife audio data. 现代语音合成使用神经声码器直接对原始波形样本进行建模。这种多功能性的增强将声码器的范围从语音扩展到了其他领域，例如音乐。我们讨论生物声学的另一个有趣领域。我们使用传统（WORLD）和两种神经（WaveNet 自动编码器、并行 WaveGAN）声码器提供鸟鸣声的初步比较分析-再合成实验。我们的主观结果表明，三种声码器在物种歧视方面没有差异（ABX 测试）。尽管如此，WORLD 声码器样本在保留鸟样品质方面的评级较高（MOS 测试）。所有声码器都面临音高和发声问题。我们的结果表明了处理低质量野生动物音频数据的一些挑战。 本研究初步探索使用神经声码器对鸟类歌声进行重合成，并比较传统与神经声码器的效果。 Rhythm Bhatia,Tomi H. Kinnunen eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Yuanhong Chen,Hu Wang,Chong Wang,Yu Tian,Fengbei Liu,Michael Elliott,Davis J. McCarthy,Helen Frazer,Gustavo Carneiro
title: Multi-view Local Co-occurrence and Global Consistency Learning Improve Mammogram Classification Generalisation
title_zh: 多视图局部共现和全局一致性学习提高乳房 X 光照片分类泛化
comment: MICCAI 2022
comments: MICCAI 2022
abstract: When analysing screening mammograms, radiologists can naturally process information across two ipsilateral views of each breast, namely the cranio-caudal (CC) and mediolateral-oblique (MLO) views. These multiple related images provide complementary diagnostic information and can improve the radiologist's classification accuracy. Unfortunately, most existing deep learning systems, trained with globally-labelled images, lack the ability to jointly analyse and integrate global and local information from these multiple views. By ignoring the potentially valuable information present in multiple images of a screening episode, one limits the potential accuracy of these systems. Here, we propose a new multi-view global-local analysis method that mimics the radiologist's reading procedure, based on a global consistency learning and local co-occurrence learning of ipsilateral views in mammograms. Extensive experiments show that our model outperforms competing methods, in terms of classification accuracy and generalisation, on a large-scale private dataset and two publicly available datasets, where models are exclusively trained and tested with global labels.
summary: When analysing screening mammograms, radiologists can naturally process information across two ipsilateral views of each breast, namely the cranio-caudal (CC) and mediolateral-oblique (MLO) views. These multiple related images provide complementary diagnostic information and can improve the radiologist's classification accuracy. Unfortunately, most existing deep learning systems, trained with globally-labelled images, lack the ability to jointly analyse and integrate global and local information from these multiple views. By ignoring the potentially valuable information present in multiple images of a screening episode, one limits the potential accuracy of these systems. Here, we propose a new multi-view global-local analysis method that mimics the radiologist's reading procedure, based on a global consistency learning and local co-occurrence learning of ipsilateral views in mammograms. Extensive experiments show that our model outperforms competing methods, in terms of classification accuracy and generalisation, on a large-scale private dataset and two publicly available datasets, where models are exclusively trained and tested with global labels.
abstract_zh: 在分析筛查性乳房 X 光检查时，放射科医生可以自然地处理每个乳房的两个同侧视图的信息，即头尾 (CC) 视图和内侧斜 (MLO) 视图。这些多个相关图像提供补充的诊断信息，并且可以提高放射科医生的分类准确性。不幸的是，大多数现有的深度学习系统都是用全局标记的图像进行训练的，缺乏联合分析和整合这些多个视图中的全局和局部信息的能力。通过忽略筛选事件的多个图像中存在的潜在有价值的信息，限制了这些系统的潜在准确性。在这里，我们提出了一种新的多视图全局局部分析方法，该方法模仿放射科医生的阅读程序，基于乳房X线照片中同侧视图的全局一致性学习和局部共现学习。大量实验表明，我们的模型在大规模私有数据集和两个公开数据集上的分类准确性和泛化性方面优于竞争方法，其中模型专门使用全局标签进行训练和测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视图全局-局部分析方法，通过结合乳腺X光片的局部共现信息与全局一致性学习，提升分类模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在乳腺X光分类任务中未能有效整合多视图（CC/MLO）的局部与全局信息，导致分类准确性受限。
AI.method: 设计模仿放射科医生读片流程的多视图学习框架，同时进行局部区域的共现特征学习与全局视图的一致性约束优化。
AI.result: 在私有数据集和两个公开数据集上，该模型在分类准确率和泛化能力指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 多视图联合分析方法能有效挖掘乳腺X光片的互补信息，为医学影像分类任务提供新的技术路径。

These multiple related images provide complementary diagnostic information and can improve the radiologist's classification accuracy. authors_text: Khanh Nguyen,Ali Furkan Biten,Andres Mafla,Lluis Gomez,Dimosthenis Karatzas
title: Show, Interpret and Tell: Entity-aware Contextualised Image Captioning in Wikipedia
title_zh: 显示、解释和讲述：维基百科中的实体感知上下文图像说明
abstract: Humans exploit prior knowledge to describe images, and are able to adapt their explanation to specific contextual information, even to the extent of inventing plausible explanations when contextual information and images do not match. In this work, we propose the novel task of captioning Wikipedia images by integrating contextual knowledge. Specifically, we produce models that jointly reason over Wikipedia articles, Wikimedia images and their associated descriptions to produce contextualized captions. Particularly, a similar Wikimedia image can be used to illustrate different articles, and the produced caption needs to be adapted to a specific context, therefore allowing us to explore the limits of a model to adjust captions to different contextual information. A particular challenging task in this domain is dealing with out-of-dictionary words and Named Entities. To address this, we propose a pre-training objective, Masked Named Entity Modeling (MNEM), and show that this pretext task yields an improvement compared to baseline models. Furthermore, we verify that a model pre-trained with the MNEM objective in Wikipedia generalizes well to a News Captioning dataset. Additionally, we define two different test splits according to the difficulty of the captioning task. We offer insights on the role and the importance of each modality and highlight the limitations of our model. The code, models and data splits are publicly available at Upon acceptance.
summary: Humans exploit prior knowledge to describe images, and are able to adapt their explanation to specific contextual information, even to the extent of inventing plausible explanations when contextual information and images do not match. In this work, we propose the novel task of captioning Wikipedia images by integrating contextual knowledge. Specifically, we produce models that jointly reason over Wikipedia articles, Wikimedia images and their associated descriptions to produce contextualized captions. Particularly, a similar Wikimedia image can be used to illustrate different articles, and the produced caption needs to be adapted to a specific context, therefore allowing us to explore the limits of a model to adjust captions to different contextual information. A particular challenging task in this domain is dealing with out-of-dictionary words and Named Entities. To address this, we propose a pre-training objective, Masked Named Entity Modeling (MNEM), and show that this pretext task yields an improvement compared to baseline models. Furthermore, we verify that a model pre-trained with the MNEM objective in Wikipedia generalizes well to a News Captioning dataset. Additionally, we define two different test splits according to the difficulty of the captioning task. We offer insights on the role and the importance of each modality and highlight the limitations of our model. The code, models and data splits are publicly available at Upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 人类利用先验知识来描述图像，并且能够根据特定的上下文信息调整其解释，甚至在上下文信息和图像不匹配时发明合理的解释。在这项工作中，我们提出了通过整合上下文知识为维基百科图像添加字幕的新任务。具体来说，我们生成的模型可以对维基百科文章、维基媒体图像及其相关描述进行联合推理，以生成上下文化的标题。特别是，类似的维基媒体图像可以用来说明不同的文章，并且生成的标题需要适应特定的上下文，因此使我们能够探索模型的局限性，以根据不同的上下文信息调整标题。该领域的一个特别具有挑战性的任务是处理字典外的单词和命名实体。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个预训练目标，即掩码命名实体建模（MNEM），并表明与基线模型相比，该借口任务取得了改进。此外，我们验证了使用维基百科中的 MNEM 目标进行预训练的模型可以很好地推广到新闻字幕数据集。此外，我们根据字幕任务的难度定义了两种不同的测试划分。我们提供了对每种模式的作用和重要性的见解，并强调了我们模型的局限性。代码、模型和数据分割在接受后公开可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合维基百科文章和图像上下文信息的实体感知图像描述生成方法，通过整合多模态数据生成与特定语境匹配的图像标题。
AI.motivation: 人类能够利用先验知识根据上下文调整图像描述，而现有模型在处理命名实体和领域外词汇时表现不足，需探索更有效的上下文感知描述生成方法。
AI.method: 提出Masked Named Entity Modeling (MNEM)预训练目标，结合维基百科文章、图像及描述进行多模态联合推理，并设计两种难度级别的测试集评估模型性能。
AI.result: MNEM预训练显著优于基线模型，在新闻标题数据集上具有良好泛化能力，同时揭示了不同模态对任务的贡献及模型局限性。
AI.conclusion: 上下文感知的多模态融合与实体建模能有效提升图像描述生成质量，但模型在复杂语境适应性和实体消歧方面仍需改进。

conclusion: 上下文感知的多模态融合与实体建模能有效提升图像描述生成质量，但模型在复杂语境适应性和实体消歧方面仍需改进。
search_text: Show, Interpret and Tell: Entity-aware Contextualised Image Captioning in Wikipedia 显示、解释和讲述：维基百科中的实体感知上下文图像说明 Humans exploit prior knowledge to describe images, and are able to adapt their explanation to specific contextual information, even to the extent of inventing plausible explanations when contextual information and images do not match. In this work, we propose the novel task of captioning Wikipedia images by integrating contextual knowledge. Specifically, we produce models that jointly reason over Wikipedia articles, Wikimedia images and their associated descriptions to produce contextualized captions. Particularly, a similar Wikimedia image can be used to illustrate different articles, and the produced caption needs to be adapted to a specific context, therefore allowing us to explore the limits of a model to adjust captions to different contextual information. A particular challenging task in this domain is dealing with out-of-dictionary words and Named Entities. To address this, we propose a pre-training objective, Masked Named Entity Modeling (MNEM), and show that this pretext task yields an improvement compared to baseline models. Furthermore, we verify that a model pre-trained with the MNEM objective in Wikipedia generalizes well to a News Captioning dataset. Additionally, we define two different test splits according to the difficulty of the captioning task. We offer insights on the role and the importance of each modality and highlight the limitations of our model. The code, models and data splits are publicly available at Upon acceptance. 人类利用先验知识来描述图像，并且能够根据特定的上下文信息调整其解释，甚至在上下文信息和图像不匹配时发明合理的解释。在这项工作中，我们提出了通过整合上下文知识为维基百科图像添加字幕的新任务。具体来说，我们生成的模型可以对维基百科文章、维基媒体图像及其相关描述进行联合推理，以生成上下文化的标题。特别是，类似的维基媒体图像可以用来说明不同的文章，并且生成的标题需要适应特定的上下文，因此使我们能够探索模型的局限性，以根据不同的上下文信息调整标题。该领域的一个特别具有挑战性的任务是处理字典外的单词和命名实体。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个预训练目标，即掩码命名实体建模（MNEM），并表明与基线模型相比，该借口任务取得了改进。此外，我们验证了使用维基百科中的 MNEM 目标进行预训练的模型可以很好地推广到新闻字幕数据集。此外，我们根据字幕任务的难度定义了两种不同的测试划分。我们提供了对每种模式的作用和重要性的见解，并强调了我们模型的局限性。代码、模型和数据分割在接受后公开可用。 本文提出了一种结合维基百科文章和图像上下文信息的实体感知图像描述生成方法，通过整合多模态数据生成与特定语境匹配的图像标题。 Khanh Nguyen,Ali Furkan Biten,Andres Mafla,Lluis Gomez,Dimosthenis Karatzas cs.CV

authors_text: Sangyun Shin,Stuart Golodetz,Madhu Vankadari,Kaichen Zhou,Andrew Markham,Niki Trigoni
title: Sample, Crop, Track: Self-Supervised Mobile 3D Object Detection for Urban Driving LiDAR
title_zh: 样本、裁剪、跟踪：城市驾驶 LiDAR 的自监督移动 3D 物体检测
comment: :68T45ACM Class:I.2.10
comments: :68T45ACM Class:I.2.10
abstract: Deep learning has led to great progress in the detection of mobile (i.e. movement-capable) objects in urban driving scenes in recent years. Supervised approaches typically require the annotation of large training sets; there has thus been great interest in leveraging weakly, semi- or self-supervised methods to avoid this, with much success. Whilst weakly and semi-supervised methods require some annotation, self-supervised methods have used cues such as motion to relieve the need for annotation altogether. However, a complete absence of annotation typically degrades their performance, and ambiguities that arise during motion grouping can inhibit their ability to find accurate object boundaries. In this paper, we propose a new self-supervised mobile object detection approach called SCT. This uses both motion cues and expected object sizes to improve detection performance, and predicts a dense grid of 3D oriented bounding boxes to improve object discovery. We significantly outperform the state-of-the-art self-supervised mobile object detection method TCR on the KITTI tracking benchmark, and achieve performance that is within 30% of the fully supervised PV-RCNN++ method for IoUs <= 0.5.
summary: Deep learning has led to great progress in the detection of mobile (i.e. movement-capable) objects in urban driving scenes in recent years. Supervised approaches typically require the annotation of large training sets; there has thus been great interest in leveraging weakly, semi- or self-supervised methods to avoid this, with much success. Whilst weakly and semi-supervised methods require some annotation, self-supervised methods have used cues such as motion to relieve the need for annotation altogether. However, a complete absence of annotation typically degrades their performance, and ambiguities that arise during motion grouping can inhibit their ability to find accurate object boundaries. In this paper, we propose a new self-supervised mobile object detection approach called SCT. This uses both motion cues and expected object sizes to improve detection performance, and predicts a dense grid of 3D oriented bounding boxes to improve object discovery. We significantly outperform the state-of-the-art self-supervised mobile object detection method TCR on the KITTI tracking benchmark, and achieve performance that is within 30% of the fully supervised PV-RCNN++ method for IoUs <= 0.5.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习在城市驾驶场景中移动（即具有运动能力）物体的检测方面取得了巨大进展。监督方法通常需要对大型训练集进行注释；因此，人们对利用弱监督、半监督或自监督方法来避免这种情况产生了极大的兴趣，并取得了很大的成功。虽然弱监督和半监督方法需要一些注释，但自监督方法使用运动等线索来完全消除注释的需要。然而，完全缺乏注释通常会降低它们的性能，并且运动分组期间出现的模糊性会抑制它们找到准确的对象边界的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的自监督移动目标检测方法，称为 SCT。它使用运动线索和预期对象大小来提高检测性能，并预测 3D 定向边界框的密集网格以改进对象发现。我们在 KITTI 跟踪基准上显着优于最先进的自监督移动目标检测方法 TCR，并且在 IoU <= 0.5 的情况下实现了完全监督 PV-RCNN++ 方法的 30% 以内的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SCT的自监督移动物体检测方法，用于城市驾驶场景中的LiDAR 3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法依赖大量标注数据，而现有自监督方法在无标注时性能下降且难以准确分割物体边界，需改进以提升检测效果。
AI.method: SCT结合运动线索与预期物体尺寸，通过预测密集3D有向包围盒网格优化目标发现，减少对标注的依赖。
AI.result: 在KITTI跟踪基准测试中显著优于现有自监督方法TCR，在IoU≤0.5时性能接近全监督方法PV-RCNN++的70%。
AI.conclusion: SCT通过运动与尺寸线索有效提升无标注场景下的检测性能，为轻量化自监督检测提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SCT的自监督移动物体检测方法，用于城市驾驶场景中的LiDAR 3D目标检测。

ai_content.conclusion: SCT通过运动与尺寸线索有效提升无标注场景下的检测性能，为轻量化自监督检测提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ziv Epstein,Hause Lin,Gordon Pennycook,David Rand
title: Quantifying attention via dwell time and engagement in a social media browsing environment
title_zh: 通过社交媒体浏览环境中的停留时间和参与度来量化注意力
comment: All Things Attention NeurIPS Workshop
comments: All Things Attention NeurIPS Workshop
abstract: Modern computational systems have an unprecedented ability to detect, leverage and influence human attention. Prior work identified user engagement and dwell time as two key metrics of attention in digital environments, but these metrics have yet to be integrated into a unified model that can advance the theory andpractice of digital attention. We draw on work from cognitive science, digital advertising, and AI to propose a two-stage model of attention for social media environments that disentangles engagement and dwell. In an online experiment, we show that attention operates differently in these two stages and find clear evidence of dissociation: when dwelling on posts (Stage 1), users attend more to sensational than credible content, but when deciding whether to engage with content (Stage 2), users attend more to credible than sensational content. These findings have implications for the design and development of computational systems that measure and model human attention, such as newsfeed algorithms on social media.
summary: Modern computational systems have an unprecedented ability to detect, leverage and influence human attention. Prior work identified user engagement and dwell time as two key metrics of attention in digital environments, but these metrics have yet to be integrated into a unified model that can advance the theory andpractice of digital attention. We draw on work from cognitive science, digital advertising, and AI to propose a two-stage model of attention for social media environments that disentangles engagement and dwell. In an online experiment, we show that attention operates differently in these two stages and find clear evidence of dissociation: when dwelling on posts (Stage 1), users attend more to sensational than credible content, but when deciding whether to engage with content (Stage 2), users attend more to credible than sensational content. These findings have implications for the design and development of computational systems that measure and model human attention, such as newsfeed algorithms on social media.
abstract_zh: 现代计算系统具有前所未有的检测、利用和影响人类注意力的能力。先前的工作将用户参与度和停留时间确定为数字环境中注意力的两个关键指标，但这些指标尚未整合到一个可以推进数字注意力理论和实践的统一模型中。我们借鉴认知科学、数字广告和人工智能的研究成果，提出了一种社交媒体环境的两阶段注意力模型，将参与度和停留度分开。在在线实验中，我们表明注意力在这两个阶段的运作方式不同，并发现了明显的分离证据：当专注于帖子时（第一阶段），用户更多地关注耸人听闻的内容，而不是可信的内容，但在决定是否参与内容时（第二阶段），用户更多地关注可信的内容而不是耸人听闻的内容。这些发现对测量和模拟人类注意力的计算系统的设计和开发具有影响，例如社交媒体上的新闻推送算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个两阶段模型，将停留时间和参与度整合以量化社交媒体环境中的注意力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将用户参与度和停留时间视为注意力的关键指标，但缺乏统一模型来整合二者，限制了数字注意力理论与实践的发展。
AI.method: 结合认知科学、数字广告和AI领域知识，构建两阶段注意力模型，并通过在线实验验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 实验发现：阶段1（浏览内容）用户更关注煽动性内容，阶段2（决定互动）则更关注可信内容，证实了注意力的分离现象。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为社交媒体算法等计算系统的设计提供了理论依据，强调区分停留与互动阶段对注意力建模的重要性。

authors_text: Matthew Jenssen,Marcus Michelen,Mohan Ravichandran
title: Quasipolynomial-time algorithms for Gibbs point processes
title_zh: 吉布斯点过程的拟多项式时间算法
comment: Results extended to include stable potentials
comments: Results extended to include stable potentials
abstract: We demonstrate a quasipolynomial-time deterministic approximation algorithm for the partition function of a Gibbs point process interacting via a finite-range stable potential. This result holds for all activities $λ$ for which the partition function satisfies a zero-free assumption in a neighborhood of the interval $[0,λ]$. As a corollary, for all finite-range stable potentials we obtain a quasipolynomial-time determinsitic algorithm for all $λ< /(e^{B + 1} \hat C_φ)$ where $\hat C_φ$ is a temperedness parameter and $B$ is the stability constant of $φ$. In the special case of a repulsive potential such as the hard-sphere gas we improve the range of activity by a factor of at least $e^2$ and obtain a quasipolynomial-time deterministic approximation algorithm for all $λ< e/Δ_φ$, where $Δ_φ$ is the potential-weighted connective constant of the potential $φ$. Our algorithm approximates coefficients of the cluster expansion of the partition function and uses the interpolation method of Barvinok to extend this approximation throughout the zero-free region.
summary: We demonstrate a quasipolynomial-time deterministic approximation algorithm for the partition function of a Gibbs point process interacting via a finite-range stable potential. This result holds for all activities $λ$ for which the partition function satisfies a zero-free assumption in a neighborhood of the interval $[0,λ]$. As a corollary, for all finite-range stable potentials we obtain a quasipolynomial-time determinsitic algorithm for all $λ< /(e^{B + 1} \hat C_φ)$ where $\hat C_φ$ is a temperedness parameter and $B$ is the stability constant of $φ$. In the special case of a repulsive potential such as the hard-sphere gas we improve the range of activity by a factor of at least $e^2$ and obtain a quasipolynomial-time deterministic approximation algorithm for all $λ< e/Δ_φ$, where $Δ_φ$ is the potential-weighted connective constant of the potential $φ$. Our algorithm approximates coefficients of the cluster expansion of the partition function and uses the interpolation method of Barvinok to extend this approximation throughout the zero-free region.
abstract_zh: 我们演示了一种拟多项式时间确定性近似算法，用于通过有限范围稳定势相互作用的吉布斯点过程的配分函数。该结果适用于所有活动 $λ$，其中分区函数在区间 $[0,λ]$ 的邻域内满足无零假设。作为推论，对于所有有限范围稳定势，我们获得了所有 $λ< /(e^{B + 1} \hat C_φ)$ 的拟多项式时间确定性算法，其中 $\hat C_φ$ 是调节参数，$B$ 是 $φ$ 的稳定常数。在排斥势的特殊情况下，例如硬球气体，我们将活动范围提高至少 $e^2$ 因子，并获得所有 $λ< e/Δ_φ$ 的拟多项式时间确定性近似算法，其中 $Δ_φ$ 是势 $φ$ 的势加权连接常数。我们的算法近似配分函数的簇展开的系数，并使用 Barvinok 插值方法将该近似扩展到整个无零区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在有限范围稳定势下，用于吉布斯点过程配分函数的准多项式时间确定性近似算法。
AI.motivation: 吉布斯点过程的配分函数计算在统计物理中具有重要意义，但传统方法在处理有限范围势时效率低下，需开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 通过近似配分函数的簇展开系数，并结合Barvinok的插值方法，扩展近似范围至零自由区域。
AI.result: 在满足零自由假设的活动范围内，算法可准多项式时间运行；对排斥势（如硬球气体）的活动范围改进了至少e²倍。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为吉布斯点过程的高效计算提供了理论支持，尤其在有限范围势和排斥势场景下显著提升了适用性。

search_text: Quasipolynomial-time algorithms for Gibbs point processes 吉布斯点过程的拟多项式时间算法 We demonstrate a quasipolynomial-time deterministic approximation algorithm for the partition function of a Gibbs point process interacting via a finite-range stable potential. This result holds for all activities $λ$ for which the partition function satisfies a zero-free assumption in a neighborhood of the interval $[0,λ]$. As a corollary, for all finite-range stable potentials we obtain a quasipolynomial-time determinsitic algorithm for all $λ< /(e^{B + 1} \hat C_φ)$ where $\hat C_φ$ is a temperedness parameter and $B$ is the stability constant of $φ$. In the special case of a repulsive potential such as the hard-sphere gas we improve the range of activity by a factor of at least $e^2$ and obtain a quasipolynomial-time deterministic approximation algorithm for all $λ< e/Δ_φ$, where $Δ_φ$ is the potential-weighted connective constant of the potential $φ$. Our algorithm approximates coefficients of the cluster expansion of the partition function and uses the interpolation method of Barvinok to extend this approximation throughout the zero-free region. 我们演示了一种拟多项式时间确定性近似算法，用于通过有限范围稳定势相互作用的吉布斯点过程的配分函数。该结果适用于所有活动 $λ$，其中分区函数在区间 $[0,λ]$ 的邻域内满足无零假设。作为推论，对于所有有限范围稳定势，我们获得了所有 $λ< /(e^{B + 1} \hat C_φ)$ 的拟多项式时间确定性算法，其中 $\hat C_φ$ 是调节参数，$B$ 是 $φ$ 的稳定常数。在排斥势的特殊情况下，例如硬球气体，我们将活动范围提高至少 $e^2$ 因子，并获得所有 $λ< e/Δ_φ$ 的拟多项式时间确定性近似算法，其中 $Δ_φ$ 是势 $φ$ 的势加权连接常数。我们的算法近似配分函数的簇展开的系数，并使用 Barvinok 插值方法将该近似扩展到整个无零区域。 本文提出了一种在有限范围稳定势下，用于吉布斯点过程配分函数的准多项式时间确定性近似算法。 Matthew Jenssen,Marcus Michelen,Mohan Ravichandran cs.DS,math.PR

authors_text: Maegan Tucker,Noel Csomay-Shanklin,Aaron D. Ames
title: Robust Bipedal Locomotion: Leveraging Saltation Matrices for Gait Optimization
title_zh: 稳健的双足运动：利用跳跃矩阵进行步态优化
comment: 6 pages + 2 pages references
comments: 6 pages + 2 pages references
abstract: The ability to generate robust walking gaits on bipedal robots is key to their successful realization on hardware. To this end, this work extends the method of Hybrid Zero Dynamics (HZD) -- which traditionally only accounts for locomotive stability via periodicity constraints under perfect impact events -- through the inclusion of the saltation matrix with a view toward synthesizing robust walking gaits. By jointly minimizing the norm of the extended saltation matrix and the torque of the robot directly in the gait generation process, we demonstrate that the synthesized gaits are more robust than gaits generated with either term alone; these results are shown in simulation and on hardware for the AMBER-3M planar biped and the Atalante lower-body exoskeleton (both with and without a human subject). The end result is experimental validation that combining saltation matrices with HZD methods produces more robust bipedal walking in practice.
summary: The ability to generate robust walking gaits on bipedal robots is key to their successful realization on hardware. To this end, this work extends the method of Hybrid Zero Dynamics (HZD) -- which traditionally only accounts for locomotive stability via periodicity constraints under perfect impact events -- through the inclusion of the saltation matrix with a view toward synthesizing robust walking gaits. By jointly minimizing the norm of the extended saltation matrix and the torque of the robot directly in the gait generation process, we demonstrate that the synthesized gaits are more robust than gaits generated with either term alone; these results are shown in simulation and on hardware for the AMBER-3M planar biped and the Atalante lower-body exoskeleton (both with and without a human subject). The end result is experimental validation that combining saltation matrices with HZD methods produces more robust bipedal walking in practice.
abstract_zh: 在双足机器人上生成稳健的行走步态的能力是其在硬件上成功实现的关键。为此，这项工作扩展了混合零动力学（HZD）方法——传统上该方法仅通过完美冲击事件下的周期性约束来解释机车稳定性——通过包含跳跃矩阵，以期合成稳健的步行步态。通过在步态生成过程中直接联合最小化扩展跳跃矩阵的范数和机器人的扭矩，我们证明了合成的步态比单独使用任一项生成的步态更稳健；这些结果在 AMBER-3M 平面两足动物和 Atalante 下半身外骨骼（有或没有人类受试者）的仿真和硬件中显示。最终结果是实验验证，将跳跃矩阵与 HZD 方法相结合可以在实践中产生更稳健的双足行走。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合盐跃矩阵与混合零动力学（HZD）的方法，以优化双足机器人步态的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统HZD方法仅通过周期性约束保证步态稳定性，难以应对实际硬件中的冲击事件，需增强步态鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在步态生成过程中联合最小化扩展盐跃矩阵的范数与机器人扭矩，通过仿真与硬件实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 合成步态在AMBER-3M双足机器人和Atalante外骨骼（含/不含人体）上均表现出更高的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将盐跃矩阵与HZD结合可显著提升双足行走的实际鲁棒性，为硬件实现提供有效方案。
