authors_text: Zhaopeng Feng,Keyang Zhang,Shuyue Jia,Baoliang Chen,Shiqi Wang
title: Learning from Mixed Datasets: A Monotonic Image Quality Assessment Model
title_zh: 从混合数据集中学习：单调图像质量评估模型
comment: 3 pages, 3 figures
comments: 3 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Deep learning based image quality assessment (IQA) models usually learn to predict image quality from a single dataset, leading the model to overfit specific scenes. To account for this, mixed datasets training can be an effective way to enhance the generalization capability of the model. However, it is nontrivial to combine different IQA datasets, as their quality evaluation criteria, score ranges, view conditions, as well as subjects are usually not shared during the image quality annotation. In this paper, instead of aligning the annotations, we propose a monotonic neural network for IQA model learning with different datasets combined. In particular, our model consists of a dataset-shared quality regressor and several dataset-specific quality transformers. The quality regressor aims to obtain the perceptual qualities of each dataset while each quality transformer maps the perceptual qualities to the corresponding dataset annotations with their monotonicity maintained. The experimental results verify the effectiveness of the proposed learning strategy and our code is available at https://github.com/fzp0424/MonotonicIQA.
summary: Deep learning based image quality assessment (IQA) models usually learn to predict image quality from a single dataset, leading the model to overfit specific scenes. To account for this, mixed datasets training can be an effective way to enhance the generalization capability of the model. However, it is nontrivial to combine different IQA datasets, as their quality evaluation criteria, score ranges, view conditions, as well as subjects are usually not shared during the image quality annotation. In this paper, instead of aligning the annotations, we propose a monotonic neural network for IQA model learning with different datasets combined. In particular, our model consists of a dataset-shared quality regressor and several dataset-specific quality transformers. The quality regressor aims to obtain the perceptual qualities of each dataset while each quality transformer maps the perceptual qualities to the corresponding dataset annotations with their monotonicity maintained. The experimental results verify the effectiveness of the proposed learning strategy and our code is available at https://github.com/fzp0424/MonotonicIQA.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的图像质量评估 (IQA) 模型通常学习从单个数据集预测图像质量，导致模型过度拟合特定场景。考虑到这一点，混合数据集训练可以成为增强模型泛化能力的有效方法。然而，组合不同的 IQA 数据集并非易事，因为它们的质量评估标准、分数范围、视图条件以及主题在图像质量注释过程中通常不共享。在本文中，我们没有对齐注释，而是提出了一种单调神经网络，用于组合不同数据集的 IQA 模型学习。特别是，我们的模型由一个数据集共享的质量回归器和几个特定于数据集的质量转换器组成。质量回归器旨在获得每个数据集的感知质量，而每个质量转换器将感知质量映射到相应的数据集注释，并保持其单调性。实验结果验证了所提出的学习策略的有效性，我们的代码可在 https://github.com/fzp0424/MonotonicIQA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单调神经网络模型，通过结合不同数据集提升图像质量评估（IQA）模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统IQA模型基于单一数据集训练易导致过拟合，而混合数据集训练因标注标准、评分范围等差异难以有效结合。
AI.method: 设计包含共享质量回归器和多个数据集特定质量转换器的网络结构，通过保持单调性映射感知质量到不同数据集标注。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在混合数据集上的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 无需对齐标注即可融合多数据集训练，显著提升IQA模型的泛化性能。

In particular, our model consists of a dataset-shared quality regressor and several dataset-specific quality transformers. The quality regressor aims to obtain the perceptual qualities of each dataset while each quality transformer maps the perceptual qualities to the corresponding dataset annotations with their monotonicity maintained. The experimental results verify the effectiveness of the proposed learning strategy and our code is available at https://github.com/fzp0424/MonotonicIQA. 基于深度学习的图像质量评估 (IQA) 模型通常学习从单个数据集预测图像质量，导致模型过度拟合特定场景。考虑到这一点，混合数据集训练可以成为增强模型泛化能力的有效方法。然而，组合不同的 IQA 数据集并非易事，因为它们的质量评估标准、分数范围、视图条件以及主题在图像质量注释过程中通常不共享。在本文中，我们没有对齐注释，而是提出了一种单调神经网络，用于组合不同数据集的 IQA 模型学习。特别是，我们的模型由一个数据集共享的质量回归器和几个特定于数据集的质量转换器组成。质量回归器旨在获得每个数据集的感知质量，而每个质量转换器将感知质量映射到相应的数据集注释，并保持其单调性。实验结果验证了所提出的学习策略的有效性，我们的代码可在 https://github.com/fzp0424/MonotonicIQA 获取。 本文提出一种单调神经网络模型，通过结合不同数据集提升图像质量评估（IQA）模型的泛化能力。 Zhaopeng Feng,Keyang Zhang,Shuyue Jia,Baoliang Chen,Shiqi Wang cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Nhat Le,Khanh Nguyen,Quang Tran,Erman Tjiputra,Bac Le,Anh Nguyen
title: Uncertainty-aware Label Distribution Learning for Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 用于面部表情识别的不确定性感知标签分布学习
comment: Accepted to WACV 2023. The first two authors contributed equally to this work
comments: Accepted to WACV 2023. The first two authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: Despite significant progress over the past few years, ambiguity is still a key challenge in Facial Expression Recognition (FER). It can lead to noisy and inconsistent annotation, which hinders the performance of deep learning models in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a new uncertainty-aware label distribution learning method to improve the robustness of deep models against uncertainty and ambiguity. We leverage neighborhood information in the valence-arousal space to adaptively construct emotion distributions for training samples. We also consider the uncertainty of provided labels when incorporating them into the label distributions. Our method can be easily integrated into a deep network to obtain more training supervision and improve recognition accuracy. Intensive experiments on several datasets under various noisy and ambiguous settings show that our method achieves competitive results and outperforms recent state-of-the-art approaches. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/minhnhatvt/label-distribution-learning-fer-tf.
summary: Despite significant progress over the past few years, ambiguity is still a key challenge in Facial Expression Recognition (FER). It can lead to noisy and inconsistent annotation, which hinders the performance of deep learning models in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a new uncertainty-aware label distribution learning method to improve the robustness of deep models against uncertainty and ambiguity. We leverage neighborhood information in the valence-arousal space to adaptively construct emotion distributions for training samples. We also consider the uncertainty of provided labels when incorporating them into the label distributions. Our method can be easily integrated into a deep network to obtain more training supervision and improve recognition accuracy. Intensive experiments on several datasets under various noisy and ambiguous settings show that our method achieves competitive results and outperforms recent state-of-the-art approaches. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/minhnhatvt/label-distribution-learning-fer-tf.
abstract_zh: 尽管过去几年取得了重大进展，但模糊性仍然是面部表情识别（FER）的一个关键挑战。它可能会导致嘈杂和不一致的注释，从而阻碍深度学习模型在现实场景中的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的不确定性感知标签分布学习方法，以提高深度模型针对不确定性和模糊性的鲁棒性。我们利用价态唤醒空间中的邻域信息来自适应地构建训练样本的情绪分布。当将提供的标签合并到标签分布中时，我们还考虑了它们的不确定性。我们的方法可以轻松集成到深层网络中，以获得更多的训练监督并提高识别精度。在各种噪声和模糊设置下对多个数据集进行的密集实验表明，我们的方法取得了有竞争力的结果，并且优于最近最先进的方法。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/minhnhatvt/label-distribution-learning-fer-tf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的不确定性感知标签分布学习方法，用于提升面部表情识别中对噪声和模糊标注的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别中存在标注模糊和噪声问题，导致深度学习模型在实际场景中表现不佳，需改进标签学习方法以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用效价-唤醒空间中的邻域信息自适应构建情感分布，并结合标签不确定性动态调整分布，通过集成到深度网络提升训练监督。
AI.result: 在多个数据集的噪声和模糊设置下实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法，显著提升识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效应对标注不确定性，提升面部表情识别鲁棒性，代码和模型已开源供验证。

authors_text: André Correia,Luís A. Alexandre
title: Hierarchical Decision Transformer
title_zh: 分层决策转换器
abstract: Sequence models in reinforcement learning require task knowledge to estimate the task policy. This paper presents a hierarchical algorithm for learning a sequence model from demonstrations. The high-level mechanism guides the low-level controller through the task by selecting sub-goals for the latter to reach. This sequence replaces the returns-to-go of previous methods, improving its performance overall, especially in tasks with longer episodes and scarcer rewards. We validate our method in multiple tasks of OpenAIGym, D4RL and RoboMimic benchmarks. Our method outperforms the baselines in eight out of ten tasks of varied horizons and reward frequencies without prior task knowledge, showing the advantages of the hierarchical model approach for learning from demonstrations using a sequence model.
summary: Sequence models in reinforcement learning require task knowledge to estimate the task policy. This paper presents a hierarchical algorithm for learning a sequence model from demonstrations. The high-level mechanism guides the low-level controller through the task by selecting sub-goals for the latter to reach. This sequence replaces the returns-to-go of previous methods, improving its performance overall, especially in tasks with longer episodes and scarcer rewards. We validate our method in multiple tasks of OpenAIGym, D4RL and RoboMimic benchmarks. Our method outperforms the baselines in eight out of ten tasks of varied horizons and reward frequencies without prior task knowledge, showing the advantages of the hierarchical model approach for learning from demonstrations using a sequence model.
abstract_zh: 强化学习中的序列模型需要任务知识来估计任务策略。本文提出了一种从演示中学习序列模型的分层算法。高层机制通过选择低层控制器要达到的子目标来指导低层控制器完成任务。该序列取代了以前方法的 returns-to-go，提高了其整体性能，特别是在具有较长情节和较少奖励的任务中。我们在 OpenAIGym、D4RL 和 RoboMimic 基准测试的多个任务中验证了我们的方法。在没有先验任务知识的情况下，我们的方法在不同范围和奖励频率的十个任务中的八个优于基线，显示了使用序列模型从演示中学习的分层模型方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层决策变换器算法，通过从演示中学习序列模型来改进强化学习中的策略估计。
AI.motivation: 传统序列模型在长任务和稀疏奖励场景下表现不足，需更高效的分层机制提升性能。
AI.method: 设计分层架构，高层通过选择子目标指导低层控制器，以替代传统方法的returns-to-go机制。
AI.result: 在OpenAIGym、D4RL和RoboMimic基准中，方法在8/10任务中超越基线，尤其在长时序和稀疏奖励任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 分层模型无需先验任务知识即可有效学习演示，证明其在序列模型强化学习中的优势。

authors_text: Yin-Ping Cho,Yu Tsao,Hsin-Min Wang,Yi-Wen Liu
title: Mandarin Singing Voice Synthesis with Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Wasserstein GAN
title_zh: 具有去噪扩散概率 Wasserstein GAN 的普通话语音合成
abstract: Singing voice synthesis (SVS) is the computer production of a human-like singing voice from given musical scores. To accomplish end-to-end SVS effectively and efficiently, this work adopts the acoustic model-neural vocoder architecture established for high-quality speech and singing voice synthesis. Specifically, this work aims to pursue a higher level of expressiveness in synthesized voices by combining the diffusion denoising probabilistic model (DDPM) and \emph{Wasserstein} generative adversarial network (WGAN) to construct the backbone of the acoustic model. On top of the proposed acoustic model, a HiFi-GAN neural vocoder is adopted with integrated fine-tuning to ensure optimal synthesis quality for the resulting end-to-end SVS system. This end-to-end system was evaluated with the multi-singer Mpop600 Mandarin singing voice dataset. In the experiments, the proposed system exhibits improvements over previous landmark counterparts in terms of musical expressiveness and high-frequency acoustic details. Moreover, the adversarial acoustic model converged stably without the need to enforce reconstruction objectives, indicating the convergence stability of the proposed DDPM and WGAN combined architecture over alternative GAN-based SVS systems.
summary: Singing voice synthesis (SVS) is the computer production of a human-like singing voice from given musical scores. To accomplish end-to-end SVS effectively and efficiently, this work adopts the acoustic model-neural vocoder architecture established for high-quality speech and singing voice synthesis. Specifically, this work aims to pursue a higher level of expressiveness in synthesized voices by combining the diffusion denoising probabilistic model (DDPM) and \emph{Wasserstein} generative adversarial network (WGAN) to construct the backbone of the acoustic model. On top of the proposed acoustic model, a HiFi-GAN neural vocoder is adopted with integrated fine-tuning to ensure optimal synthesis quality for the resulting end-to-end SVS system. This end-to-end system was evaluated with the multi-singer Mpop600 Mandarin singing voice dataset. In the experiments, the proposed system exhibits improvements over previous landmark counterparts in terms of musical expressiveness and high-frequency acoustic details. Moreover, the adversarial acoustic model converged stably without the need to enforce reconstruction objectives, indicating the convergence stability of the proposed DDPM and WGAN combined architecture over alternative GAN-based SVS systems.
abstract_zh: 歌声合成（SVS）是计算机根据给定的乐谱生成类似人类的歌声。为了有效且高效地完成端到端的SVS，本工作采用了为高质量语音和歌声合成而建立的声学模型-神经声码器架构。具体来说，这项工作旨在通过结合扩散去噪概率模型（DDPM）和\emph{Wasserstein}生成对抗网络（WGAN）来构建声学模型的主干，以追求合成语音更高水平的表现力。在所提出的声学模型之上，采用了 HiFi-GAN 神经声码器和集成微调，以确保最终的端到端 SVS 系统的最佳合成质量。该端到端系统使用多歌手 Mpop600 普通话歌声数据集进行评估。在实验中，所提出的系统在音乐表现力和高频声学细节方面比之前具有里程碑意义的同类系统表现出改进。此外，对抗性声学模型无需强制执行重建目标即可稳定收敛，这表明所提出的 DDPM 和 WGAN 组合架构相对于替代的基于 GAN 的 SVS 系统具有收敛稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）与Wasserstein生成对抗网络（WGAN）的声学模型，配合HiFi-GAN神经声码器，实现高质量 Mandarin 歌唱语音合成。
AI.motivation: 传统歌唱语音合成在音乐表现力和高频声学细节上存在不足，且基于GAN的模型常面临训练不稳定问题，需探索更稳定的生成架构。
AI.method: 构建以DDPM-WGAN为核心声学模型，结合HiFi-GAN神经声码器并进行微调，通过多歌手Mpop600数据集验证端到端合成效果。
AI.result: 实验显示系统在音乐表现力、高频细节还原度上优于经典方法，且无需重建目标即可实现稳定收敛。
AI.conclusion: DDPM-WGAN混合架构有效提升了歌唱语音合成质量与稳定性，为端到端SVS提供了可行的技术路径。

search_text: Mandarin Singing Voice Synthesis with Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Wasserstein GAN 具有去噪扩散概率 Wasserstein GAN 的普通话语音合成 Singing voice synthesis (SVS) is the computer production of a human-like singing voice from given musical scores. To accomplish end-to-end SVS effectively and efficiently, this work adopts the acoustic model-neural vocoder architecture established for high-quality speech and singing voice synthesis. Specifically, this work aims to pursue a higher level of expressiveness in synthesized voices by combining the diffusion denoising probabilistic model (DDPM) and \emph{Wasserstein} generative adversarial network (WGAN) to construct the backbone of the acoustic model. On top of the proposed acoustic model, a HiFi-GAN neural vocoder is adopted with integrated fine-tuning to ensure optimal synthesis quality for the resulting end-to-end SVS system. This end-to-end system was evaluated with the multi-singer Mpop600 Mandarin singing voice dataset. In the experiments, the proposed system exhibits improvements over previous landmark counterparts in terms of musical expressiveness and high-frequency acoustic details. Moreover, the adversarial acoustic model converged stably without the need to enforce reconstruction objectives, indicating the convergence stability of the proposed DDPM and WGAN combined architecture over alternative GAN-based SVS systems. 歌声合成（SVS）是计算机根据给定的乐谱生成类似人类的歌声。为了有效且高效地完成端到端的SVS，本工作采用了为高质量语音和歌声合成而建立的声学模型-神经声码器架构。具体来说，这项工作旨在通过结合扩散去噪概率模型（DDPM）和\emph{Wasserstein}生成对抗网络（WGAN）来构建声学模型的主干，以追求合成语音更高水平的表现力。在所提出的声学模型之上，采用了 HiFi-GAN 神经声码器和集成微调，以确保最终的端到端 SVS 系统的最佳合成质量。该端到端系统使用多歌手 Mpop600 普通话歌声数据集进行评估。在实验中，所提出的系统在音乐表现力和高频声学细节方面比之前具有里程碑意义的同类系统表现出改进。此外，对抗性声学模型无需强制执行重建目标即可稳定收敛，这表明所提出的 DDPM 和 WGAN 组合架构相对于替代的基于 GAN 的 SVS 系统具有收敛稳定性。 本文提出结合去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）与Wasserstein生成对抗网络（WGAN）的声学模型，配合HiFi-GAN神经声码器，实现高质量 Mandarin 歌唱语音合成。 Yin-Ping Cho,Yu Tsao,Hsin-Min Wang,Yi-Wen Liu eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Audrey Huang,Liu Leqi,Zachary Chase Lipton,Kamyar Azizzadenesheli
title: Off-Policy Risk Assessment in Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 马尔可夫决策过程中的离策略风险评估
abstract: Addressing such diverse ends as safety alignment with human preferences, and the efficiency of learning, a growing line of reinforcement learning research focuses on risk functionals that depend on the entire distribution of returns. Recent work on \emph{off-policy risk assessment} (OPRA) for contextual bandits introduced consistent estimators for the target policy's CDF of returns along with finite sample guarantees that extend to (and hold simultaneously over) all risk. In this paper, we lift OPRA to Markov decision processes (MDPs), where importance sampling (IS) CDF estimators suffer high variance on longer trajectories due to small effective sample size. To mitigate these problems, we incorporate model-based estimation to develop the first doubly robust (DR) estimator for the CDF of returns in MDPs. This estimator enjoys significantly less variance and, when the model is well specified, achieves the Cramer-Rao variance lower bound. Moreover, for many risk functionals, the downstream estimates enjoy both lower bias and lower variance. Additionally, we derive the first minimax lower bounds for off-policy CDF and risk estimation, which match our error bounds up to a constant factor. Finally, we demonstrate the precision of our DR CDF estimates experimentally on several different environments.
summary: Addressing such diverse ends as safety alignment with human preferences, and the efficiency of learning, a growing line of reinforcement learning research focuses on risk functionals that depend on the entire distribution of returns. Recent work on \emph{off-policy risk assessment} (OPRA) for contextual bandits introduced consistent estimators for the target policy's CDF of returns along with finite sample guarantees that extend to (and hold simultaneously over) all risk. In this paper, we lift OPRA to Markov decision processes (MDPs), where importance sampling (IS) CDF estimators suffer high variance on longer trajectories due to small effective sample size. To mitigate these problems, we incorporate model-based estimation to develop the first doubly robust (DR) estimator for the CDF of returns in MDPs. This estimator enjoys significantly less variance and, when the model is well specified, achieves the Cramer-Rao variance lower bound. Moreover, for many risk functionals, the downstream estimates enjoy both lower bias and lower variance. Additionally, we derive the first minimax lower bounds for off-policy CDF and risk estimation, which match our error bounds up to a constant factor. Finally, we demonstrate the precision of our DR CDF estimates experimentally on several different environments.
abstract_zh: 为了解决安全性与人类偏好的一致性以及学习效率等不同目标，越来越多的强化学习研究重点关注依赖于整个回报分布的风险函数。最近针对上下文强盗的\emph{离政策风险评估}（OPRA）的工作引入了目标政策回报 CDF 的一致估计器以及扩展到（并同时保持）所有风险的有限样本保证。在本文中，我们将 OPRA 提升为马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，其中重要性采样 (IS) CDF 估计器由于有效样本量较小而在较长轨迹上遭受高方差。为了缓解这些问题，我们结合基于模型的估计来开发第一个 MDP 回报 CDF 的双稳健 (DR) 估计器。该估计量的方差明显较小，并且当模型指定良好时，可实现 Cramer-Rao 方差下界。此外，对于许多风险泛函，下游估计具有较低的偏差和较低的方差。此外，我们还得出了离策略 CDF 和风险估计的第一个极小极大下界，该下界将我们的误差范围与常数因子相匹配。最后，我们在几种不同的环境下通过实验证明了 DR CDF 估计的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中基于策略的风险评估问题，提出了一种低方差的双重稳健（DR）估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统重要性采样（IS）在长轨迹中存在高方差问题，而现有离线策略风险评估方法在MDP中缺乏有效估计手段，需改进估计精度与稳定性。
AI.method: 结合模型预测与重要性采样，提出首个适用于MDP的双重稳健CDF估计器，并推导出最小最大下界以验证理论性能。
AI.result: DR估计器显著降低方差，模型准确时达到Cramer-Rao下界；风险函数估计偏差与方差均降低，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的DR方法在理论保证与实际效果上优于现有方法，为MDP中的风险评估提供了新范式。

authors_text: Giuseppe De Gregorio,Sanket Biswas,Mohamed Ali Souibgui,Asma Bensalah,Josep Lladós,Alicia Fornés,Angelo Marcelli
title: A Few Shot Multi-Representation Approach for N-gram Spotting in Historical Manuscripts
title_zh: 历史手稿中 N 元语法识别的少量镜头多重表示方法
comment: Accepted in ICFHR 2022
comments: Accepted in ICFHR 2022
abstract: Despite recent advances in automatic text recognition, the performance remains moderate when it comes to historical manuscripts. This is mainly because of the scarcity of available labelled data to train the data-hungry Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) models. The Keyword Spotting System (KWS) provides a valid alternative to HTR due to the reduction in error rate, but it is usually limited to a closed reference vocabulary. In this paper, we propose a few-shot learning paradigm for spotting sequences of a few characters (N-gram) that requires a small amount of labelled training data. We exhibit that recognition of important n-grams could reduce the system's dependency on vocabulary. In this case, an out-of-vocabulary (OOV) word in an input handwritten line image could be a sequence of n-grams that belong to the lexicon. An extensive experimental evaluation of our proposed multi-representation approach was carried out on a subset of Bentham's historical manuscript collections to obtain some really promising results in this direction.
summary: Despite recent advances in automatic text recognition, the performance remains moderate when it comes to historical manuscripts. This is mainly because of the scarcity of available labelled data to train the data-hungry Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) models. The Keyword Spotting System (KWS) provides a valid alternative to HTR due to the reduction in error rate, but it is usually limited to a closed reference vocabulary. In this paper, we propose a few-shot learning paradigm for spotting sequences of a few characters (N-gram) that requires a small amount of labelled training data. We exhibit that recognition of important n-grams could reduce the system's dependency on vocabulary. In this case, an out-of-vocabulary (OOV) word in an input handwritten line image could be a sequence of n-grams that belong to the lexicon. An extensive experimental evaluation of our proposed multi-representation approach was carried out on a subset of Bentham's historical manuscript collections to obtain some really promising results in this direction.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动文本识别最近取得了进展，但在历史手稿方面的表现仍然中等。这主要是因为缺乏可用的标记数据来训练需要大量数据的手写文本识别（HTR）模型。由于错误率降低，关键字识别系统 (KWS) 提供了 HTR 的有效替代方案，但它通常仅限于封闭的参考词汇表。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于识别需要少量标记训练数据的几个字符（N-gram）序列的少样本学习范例。我们证明，重要的 n 元语法的识别可以减少系统对词汇的依赖。在这种情况下，输入手写行图像中的词汇外 (OOV) 单词可能是属于词典的 n 元序列。我们对边沁历史手稿收藏的一个子集对我们提出的多重表示方法进行了广泛的实验评估，以便在这个方向上获得一些真正有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于少量标注数据的多表示方法，用于在历史手稿中识别字符序列（N-gram）。
AI.motivation: 传统手写文本识别（HTR）模型依赖大量标注数据，而历史手稿因标注数据稀缺导致性能不足；现有关键词 spotting 系统（KWS）虽误差较低，但受限于封闭词表。
AI.method: 采用少样本学习框架，通过多表示方法识别关键 N-gram，减少对词表的依赖，利用历史手稿数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在 Bentham 手稿数据集子集上取得显著效果，验证了该方法在减少词表依赖和处理未登录词方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过少样本学习和多表示策略，为历史手稿中的 N-gram 识别提供了高效且灵活的解决方案。

We exhibit that recognition of important n-grams could reduce the system's dependency on vocabulary. In this case, an out-of-vocabulary (OOV) word in an input handwritten line image could be a sequence of n-grams that belong to the lexicon. An extensive experimental evaluation of our proposed multi-representation approach was carried out on a subset of Bentham's historical manuscript collections to obtain some really promising results in this direction. 尽管自动文本识别最近取得了进展，但在历史手稿方面的表现仍然中等。这主要是因为缺乏可用的标记数据来训练需要大量数据的手写文本识别（HTR）模型。由于错误率降低，关键字识别系统 (KWS) 提供了 HTR 的有效替代方案，但它通常仅限于封闭的参考词汇表。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于识别需要少量标记训练数据的几个字符（N-gram）序列的少样本学习范例。我们证明，重要的 n 元语法的识别可以减少系统对词汇的依赖。在这种情况下，输入手写行图像中的词汇外 (OOV) 单词可能是属于词典的 n 元序列。我们对边沁历史手稿收藏的一个子集对我们提出的多重表示方法进行了广泛的实验评估，以便在这个方向上获得一些真正有希望的结果。 本文提出一种基于少量标注数据的多表示方法，用于在历史手稿中识别字符序列（N-gram）。 Giuseppe De Gregorio,Sanket Biswas,Mohamed Ali Souibgui,Asma Bensalah,Josep Lladós,Alicia Fornés,Angelo Marcelli cs.CV

authors_text: David A. Ehrlich,Andreas C. Schneider,Viola Priesemann,Michael Wibral,Abdullah Makkeh
title: A Measure of the Complexity of Neural Representations based on Partial Information Decomposition
title_zh: 基于部分信息分解的神经表示复杂性度量
comment: 31 pages, 12 figures
comments: 31 pages, 12 figures
abstract: In neural networks, task-relevant information is represented jointly by groups of neurons. However, the specific way in which this mutual information about the classification label is distributed among the individual neurons is not well understood: While parts of it may only be obtainable from specific single neurons, other parts are carried redundantly or synergistically by multiple neurons. We show how Partial Information Decomposition (PID), a recent extension of information theory, can disentangle these different contributions. From this, we introduce the measure of "Representational Complexity", which quantifies the difficulty of accessing information spread across multiple neurons. We show how this complexity is directly computable for smaller layers. For larger layers, we propose subsampling and coarse-graining procedures and prove corresponding bounds on the latter. Empirically, for quantized deep neural networks solving the MNIST and CIFAR10 tasks, we observe that representational complexity decreases both through successive hidden layers and over training, and compare the results to related measures. Overall, we propose representational complexity as a principled and interpretable summary statistic for analyzing the structure and evolution of neural representations and complex systems in general.
summary: In neural networks, task-relevant information is represented jointly by groups of neurons. However, the specific way in which this mutual information about the classification label is distributed among the individual neurons is not well understood: While parts of it may only be obtainable from specific single neurons, other parts are carried redundantly or synergistically by multiple neurons. We show how Partial Information Decomposition (PID), a recent extension of information theory, can disentangle these different contributions. From this, we introduce the measure of "Representational Complexity", which quantifies the difficulty of accessing information spread across multiple neurons. We show how this complexity is directly computable for smaller layers. For larger layers, we propose subsampling and coarse-graining procedures and prove corresponding bounds on the latter. Empirically, for quantized deep neural networks solving the MNIST and CIFAR10 tasks, we observe that representational complexity decreases both through successive hidden layers and over training, and compare the results to related measures. Overall, we propose representational complexity as a principled and interpretable summary statistic for analyzing the structure and evolution of neural representations and complex systems in general.
abstract_zh: 在神经网络中，任务相关信息由神经元组共同表示。然而，关于分类标签的互信息在各个神经元之间分布的具体方式尚不清楚：虽然其中一部分只能从特定的单个神经元获得，但其他部分由多个神经元冗余或协同地携带。我们展示了部分信息分解（PID）（信息论的最新扩展）如何理清这些不同的贡献。由此，我们引入了“表征复杂性”的度量，它量化了访问分布在多个神经元上的信息的难度。我们展示了如何直接计算较小层的复杂性。对于较大的层，我们提出了子采样和粗粒度程序，并证明了后者的相应界限。根据经验，对于解决 MNIST 和 CIFAR10 任务的量化深度神经网络，我们观察到表征复杂性通过连续的隐藏层和过度训练而降低，并将结果与​​相关测量进行比较。总的来说，我们提出表征复杂性作为一种有原则的、可解释的汇总统计量，用于分析神经表征和复杂系统的结构和演化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于部分信息分解（PID）的神经表示复杂度度量方法，用于分析神经网络中信息分布的冗余与协同特性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确神经网络中任务相关信息在单个神经元间的分布方式，需区分信息的冗余、协同与独立贡献。
AI.method: 引入PID分解神经元群体的信息贡献，定义表示复杂度指标，结合子采样与粗粒化方法处理大尺寸网络层。
AI.result: 实验显示MNIST/CIFAR10任务中，表示复杂度随网络深度增加及训练过程逐渐降低，且与现有指标存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 表示复杂度为分析神经表示结构演变及复杂系统提供了原理性且可解释的量化工具。

authors_text: Suzanne Lancaster,Quang T. Duong,Erika Covi,Thomas Mikolajick,Stefan Slesazeck
title: Improvement of FTJ on-current by work function engineering for massive parallel neuromorphic computing
title_zh: 通过功函数工程改进 FTJ 电流以实现大规模并行神经拟态计算
abstract: HfO2-based ferroelectric tunnel junctions (FTJs) exhibit attractive properties for adoption in neuromorphic applications. The combination of ultra-low-power multi-level switching capability together with the low on-current density suggests the application in circuits for massive parallel computation. In this work, we discuss one example circuit of a differential synaptic cell featuring multiple parallel connected FTJ devices. Moreover, from the circuit requirements we deduce that the absolute difference in currents (Ion - Ioff) is a more critical figure of merit than the tunneling electroresistance ratio (TER). Based on this, we discuss the potential of FTJ device optimization by means of electrode work function engineering in bilayer HZO/Al2O3 FTJs.
summary: HfO2-based ferroelectric tunnel junctions (FTJs) exhibit attractive properties for adoption in neuromorphic applications. The combination of ultra-low-power multi-level switching capability together with the low on-current density suggests the application in circuits for massive parallel computation. In this work, we discuss one example circuit of a differential synaptic cell featuring multiple parallel connected FTJ devices. Moreover, from the circuit requirements we deduce that the absolute difference in currents (Ion - Ioff) is a more critical figure of merit than the tunneling electroresistance ratio (TER). Based on this, we discuss the potential of FTJ device optimization by means of electrode work function engineering in bilayer HZO/Al2O3 FTJs.
abstract_zh: 基于 HfO2 的铁电隧道结 (FTJ) 在神经形态应用中表现出极具吸引力的特性。超低功耗多级开关能力与低导通电流密度的结合表明了其在大规模并行计算电路中的应用。在这项工作中，我们讨论了一个具有多个并联 FTJ 器件的差分突触单元示例电路。此外，根据电路要求，我们推断电流的绝对差 (Ion - Ioff) 是比隧道电阻比 (TER) 更关键的品质因数。在此基础上，我们讨论了通过双层 HZO/Al2O3 FTJ 电极功函数工程优化 FTJ 器件的潜力。

AI.tldr: 通过功函数工程优化铁电隧道结（FTJ）的导通电流，以提升其在大规模并行神经形态计算中的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管HfO2基FTJ具有低功耗和多级开关特性，但其导通电流密度较低，限制了在并行计算电路中的应用，需提升电流差异（Ion - Ioff）以满足电路需求。
AI.method: 设计差分突触电路，分析电流差异的重要性，并通过双层HZO/Al2O3 FTJ的电极功函数工程优化器件性能。
AI.result: 功函数工程有效提升了FTJ的Ion - Ioff差异，为优化神经形态计算电路提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 功函数工程是提升FTJ性能的关键方法，可推动其在大规模并行神经形态计算中的应用。

authors_text: Yumin Zhang,Yawen Hou,Xiuyi Chen,Hongyuan Yu,Long Xia
title: Consecutive Knowledge Meta-Adaptation Learning for Unsupervised Medical Diagnosis
title_zh: 无监督医学诊断的连续知识元适应学习
abstract: Deep learning-based Computer-Aided Diagnosis (CAD) has attracted appealing attention in academic researches and clinical applications. Nevertheless, the Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) diagnosis system heavily relies on the well-labeled lesion dataset, and the sensitivity to the variation of data distribution also restricts the potential application of CNNs in CAD. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods are developed to solve the expensive annotation and domain gaps problem and have achieved remarkable success in medical image analysis. Yet existing UDA approaches only adapt knowledge learned from the source lesion domain to a single target lesion domain, which is against the clinical scenario: the new unlabeled target domains to be diagnosed always arrive in an online and continual manner. Moreover, the performance of existing approaches degrades dramatically on previously learned target lesion domains, due to the newly learned knowledge overwriting the previously learned knowledge (i.e., catastrophic forgetting). To deal with the above issues, we develop a meta-adaptation framework named Consecutive Lesion Knowledge Meta-Adaptation (CLKM), which mainly consists of Semantic Adaptation Phase (SAP) and Representation Adaptation Phase (RAP) to learn the diagnosis model in an online and continual manner. In the SAP, the semantic knowledge learned from the source lesion domain is transferred to consecutive target lesion domains. In the RAP, the feature-extractor is optimized to align the transferable representation knowledge across the source and multiple target lesion domains.
summary: Deep learning-based Computer-Aided Diagnosis (CAD) has attracted appealing attention in academic researches and clinical applications. Nevertheless, the Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) diagnosis system heavily relies on the well-labeled lesion dataset, and the sensitivity to the variation of data distribution also restricts the potential application of CNNs in CAD. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods are developed to solve the expensive annotation and domain gaps problem and have achieved remarkable success in medical image analysis. Yet existing UDA approaches only adapt knowledge learned from the source lesion domain to a single target lesion domain, which is against the clinical scenario: the new unlabeled target domains to be diagnosed always arrive in an online and continual manner. Moreover, the performance of existing approaches degrades dramatically on previously learned target lesion domains, due to the newly learned knowledge overwriting the previously learned knowledge (i.e., catastrophic forgetting). To deal with the above issues, we develop a meta-adaptation framework named Consecutive Lesion Knowledge Meta-Adaptation (CLKM), which mainly consists of Semantic Adaptation Phase (SAP) and Representation Adaptation Phase (RAP) to learn the diagnosis model in an online and continual manner. In the SAP, the semantic knowledge learned from the source lesion domain is transferred to consecutive target lesion domains. In the RAP, the feature-extractor is optimized to align the transferable representation knowledge across the source and multiple target lesion domains.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）在学术研究和临床应用中引起了广泛的关注。然而，卷积神经网络（CNN）诊断系统严重依赖于标记良好的病变数据集，并且对数据分布变化的敏感性也限制了CNN在CAD中的潜在应用。无监督域适应（UDA）方法的开发是为了解决昂贵的注释和域间隙问题，并在医学图像分析中取得了显着的成功。然而，现有的UDA方法仅将从源病变域学到的知识应用于单个目标病变域，这与临床场景相悖：要诊断的新的未标记目标域总是以在线且连续的方式到达。此外，由于新学习的知识覆盖了先前学习的知识（即灾难性遗忘），现有方法的性能在先前学习的目标病变领域上显着下降。为了解决上述问题，我们开发了一个名为连续病变知识元适应（CLKM）的元适应框架，该框架主要由语义适应阶段（​​SAP）和表示适应阶段（​​RAP）组成，以在线、持续的方式学习诊断模型。在SAP中，从源病变域学习的语义知识被转移到连续的目标病变域。在 RAP 中，特征提取器经过优化，可以跨源和多个目标病变域对齐可转移的表示知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CLKM的元适应框架，用于在线连续处理无监督医学诊断中的多个目标病变领域。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法无法处理临床场景中连续到达的新目标领域，且新知识会覆盖旧知识导致灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: CLKM框架包含语义适应阶段（SAP）和表示适应阶段（RAP），通过迁移源领域语义知识并优化特征提取器对齐跨领域的可迁移表示知识。
AI.result: 实验表明CLKM能有效适应连续到达的目标领域，缓解灾难性遗忘问题，提升医学图像诊断性能。

search_text: Consecutive Knowledge Meta-Adaptation Learning for Unsupervised Medical Diagnosis 无监督医学诊断的连续知识元适应学习 Deep learning-based Computer-Aided Diagnosis (CAD) has attracted appealing attention in academic researches and clinical applications. Nevertheless, the Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) diagnosis system heavily relies on the well-labeled lesion dataset, and the sensitivity to the variation of data distribution also restricts the potential application of CNNs in CAD. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods are developed to solve the expensive annotation and domain gaps problem and have achieved remarkable success in medical image analysis. Yet existing UDA approaches only adapt knowledge learned from the source lesion domain to a single target lesion domain, which is against the clinical scenario: the new unlabeled target domains to be diagnosed always arrive in an online and continual manner. Moreover, the performance of existing approaches degrades dramatically on previously learned target lesion domains, due to the newly learned knowledge overwriting the previously learned knowledge (i.e., catastrophic forgetting). To deal with the above issues, we develop a meta-adaptation framework named Consecutive Lesion Knowledge Meta-Adaptation (CLKM), which mainly consists of Semantic Adaptation Phase (SAP) and Representation Adaptation Phase (RAP) to learn the diagnosis model in an online and continual manner. In the SAP, the semantic knowledge learned from the source lesion domain is transferred to consecutive target lesion domains. In the RAP, the feature-extractor is optimized to align the transferable representation knowledge across the source and multiple target lesion domains. 基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）在学术研究和临床应用中引起了广泛的关注。然而，卷积神经网络（CNN）诊断系统严重依赖于标记良好的病变数据集，并且对数据分布变化的敏感性也限制了CNN在CAD中的潜在应用。无监督域适应（UDA）方法的开发是为了解决昂贵的注释和域间隙问题，并在医学图像分析中取得了显着的成功。然而，现有的UDA方法仅将从源病变域学到的知识应用于单个目标病变域，这与临床场景相悖：要诊断的新的未标记目标域总是以在线且连续的方式到达。此外，由于新学习的知识覆盖了先前学习的知识（即灾难性遗忘），现有方法的性能在先前学习的目标病变领域上显着下降。为了解决上述问题，我们开发了一个名为连续病变知识元适应（CLKM）的元适应框架，该框架主要由语义适应阶段（​​SAP）和表示适应阶段（​​RAP）组成，以在线、持续的方式学习诊断模型。在SAP中，从源病变域学习的语义知识被转移到连续的目标病变域。在 RAP 中，特征提取器经过优化，可以跨源和多个目标病变域对齐可转移的表示知识。 本文提出一种名为CLKM的元适应框架，用于在线连续处理无监督医学诊断中的多个目标病变领域。 Yumin Zhang,Yawen Hou,Xiuyi Chen,Hongyuan Yu,Long Xia eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiao Ke,Xiaoling Zhang,Tianwen Zhang,Jun Shi,Shunjun Wei
title: Sar Ship Detection based on Swin Transformer and Feature Enhancement Feature Pyramid Network
title_zh: 基于Swin Transformer和特征增强特征金字塔网络的SAR船舶检测
abstract: With the booming of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), CNNs such as VGG-16 and ResNet-50 widely serve as backbone in SAR ship detection. However, CNN based backbone is hard to model long-range dependencies, and causes the lack of enough high-quality semantic information in feature maps of shallow layers, which leads to poor detection performance in complicated background and small-sized ships cases. To address these problems, we propose a SAR ship detection method based on Swin Transformer and Feature Enhancement Feature Pyramid Network (FEFPN). Swin Transformer serves as backbone to model long-range dependencies and generates hierarchical features maps. FEFPN is proposed to further improve the quality of feature maps by gradually enhancing the semantic information of feature maps at all levels, especially feature maps in shallow layers. Experiments conducted on SAR ship detection dataset (SSDD) reveal the advantage of our proposed methods.
summary: With the booming of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), CNNs such as VGG-16 and ResNet-50 widely serve as backbone in SAR ship detection. However, CNN based backbone is hard to model long-range dependencies, and causes the lack of enough high-quality semantic information in feature maps of shallow layers, which leads to poor detection performance in complicated background and small-sized ships cases. To address these problems, we propose a SAR ship detection method based on Swin Transformer and Feature Enhancement Feature Pyramid Network (FEFPN). Swin Transformer serves as backbone to model long-range dependencies and generates hierarchical features maps. FEFPN is proposed to further improve the quality of feature maps by gradually enhancing the semantic information of feature maps at all levels, especially feature maps in shallow layers. Experiments conducted on SAR ship detection dataset (SSDD) reveal the advantage of our proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 随着卷积神经网络（CNN）的蓬勃发展，VGG-16和ResNet-50等CNN广泛成为SAR船舶检测的骨干网络。然而，基于 CNN 的主干网很难对长程依赖进行建模，导致浅层特征图中缺乏足够的高质量语义信息，导致在复杂背景和小型船舶情况下检测性能较差。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于Swin Transformer和特征增强特征金字塔网络（FEFPN）的SAR船舶检测方法。 Swin Transformer 作为远程依赖关系模型的骨干并生成分层特征图。 FEFPN的提出是为了通过逐步增强各级特征图尤其是浅层特征图的语义信息来进一步提高特征图的质量。在 SAR 船舶检测数据集（SSDD）上进行的实验揭示了我们提出的方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Swin Transformer和特征增强特征金字塔网络（FEFPN）的合成孔径雷达（SAR）船舶检测方法。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN主干网络难以建模长距离依赖关系，导致浅层特征语义信息不足，影响复杂背景和小型船舶的检测性能。
AI.method: 采用Swin Transformer作为主干网络建模长距离依赖，结合FEFPN通过多级特征增强提升浅层特征语义质量。
AI.result: 在SSDD数据集实验中验证了所提方法的有效性，检测性能优于传统CNN基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Swin Transformer与FEFPN的结合有效解决了SAR船舶检测中的长距离依赖建模和特征语义增强问题。

authors_text: Van Nguyen,Trung Le,Chakkrit Tantithamthavorn,Michael Fu,John Grundy,Hung Nguyen,Seyit Camtepe,Paul Quirk,Dinh Phung
title: Statement-Level Vulnerability Detection: Learning Vulnerability Patterns Through Information Theory and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 语句级漏洞检测：通过信息论和对比学习学习漏洞模式
abstract: Software vulnerabilities are a serious and crucial concern. Typically, in a program or function consisting of hundreds or thousands of source code statements, there are only a few statements causing the corresponding vulnerabilities. Most current approaches to vulnerability labelling are done on a function or program level by experts with the assistance of machine learning tools. Extending this approach to the code statement level is much more costly and time-consuming and remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end deep learning-based approach to identify the vulnerability-relevant code statements of a specific function. Inspired by the specific structures observed in real-world vulnerable code, we first leverage mutual information for learning a set of latent variables representing the relevance of the source code statements to the corresponding function's vulnerability. We then propose novel clustered spatial contrastive learning in order to further improve the representation learning and the robust selection process of vulnerability-relevant code statements. Experimental results on real-world datasets of 200k+ C/C++ functions show the superiority of our method over other state-of-the-art baselines. In general, our method obtains a higher performance in VCP, VCA, and Top-10 ACC measures of between 3% to 14% over the baselines when running on real-world datasets in an unsupervised setting. Our released source code samples are publicly available at \href{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl}{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl.}
summary: Software vulnerabilities are a serious and crucial concern. Typically, in a program or function consisting of hundreds or thousands of source code statements, there are only a few statements causing the corresponding vulnerabilities. Most current approaches to vulnerability labelling are done on a function or program level by experts with the assistance of machine learning tools. Extending this approach to the code statement level is much more costly and time-consuming and remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end deep learning-based approach to identify the vulnerability-relevant code statements of a specific function. Inspired by the specific structures observed in real-world vulnerable code, we first leverage mutual information for learning a set of latent variables representing the relevance of the source code statements to the corresponding function's vulnerability. We then propose novel clustered spatial contrastive learning in order to further improve the representation learning and the robust selection process of vulnerability-relevant code statements. Experimental results on real-world datasets of 200k+ C/C++ functions show the superiority of our method over other state-of-the-art baselines. In general, our method obtains a higher performance in VCP, VCA, and Top-10 ACC measures of between 3% to 14% over the baselines when running on real-world datasets in an unsupervised setting. Our released source code samples are publicly available at \href{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl}{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl.}
abstract_zh: 软件漏洞是一个严重而关键的问题。通常，在由数百或数千条源代码语句组成的程序或函数中，只有少数语句会导致相应的漏洞。当前大多数漏洞标记方法都是由专家在机器学习工具的帮助下在功能或程序级别上完成的。将这种方法扩展到代码语句级别的成本和耗时要高得多，并且仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于端到端深度学习的方法来识别特定功能的漏洞相关代码语句。受到在现实世界中易受攻击的代码中观察到的特定结构的启发，我们首先利用互信息来学习一组潜在变量，这些变量表示源代码语句与相应函数漏洞的相关性。然后，我们提出了新颖的集群空间对比学习，以进一步改进表示学习和漏洞相关代码语句的鲁棒选择过程。在 200k+ C/C++ 函数的真实数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法相对于其他最先进的基线具有优越性。一般来说，当在无监督环境中的真实数据集上运行时，我们的方法在 VCP、VCA 和 Top-10 ACC 测量中获得了比基线高 3% 到 14% 的更高性能。我们发布的源代码示例可在 \href{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl}{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl} 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息论和对比学习的端到端深度学习方法，用于识别特定函数中与漏洞相关的代码语句。
AI.motivation: 现有漏洞标注方法多在函数或程序级别进行，扩展到语句级别成本高且耗时，如何高效定位具体漏洞语句是开放性问题。
AI.method: 利用互信息学习代码语句与漏洞的相关性潜变量，并通过聚类空间对比学习优化表示学习与漏洞语句筛选过程。
AI.result: 在20万+ C/C++函数的现实数据集上，方法在无监督设置下优于现有基线3%-14%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过信息论与对比学习有效提升了语句级漏洞检测性能，为漏洞定位提供了新思路。

search_text: Statement-Level Vulnerability Detection: Learning Vulnerability Patterns Through Information Theory and Contrastive Learning 语句级漏洞检测：通过信息论和对比学习学习漏洞模式 Software vulnerabilities are a serious and crucial concern. Typically, in a program or function consisting of hundreds or thousands of source code statements, there are only a few statements causing the corresponding vulnerabilities. Most current approaches to vulnerability labelling are done on a function or program level by experts with the assistance of machine learning tools. Extending this approach to the code statement level is much more costly and time-consuming and remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end deep learning-based approach to identify the vulnerability-relevant code statements of a specific function. Inspired by the specific structures observed in real-world vulnerable code, we first leverage mutual information for learning a set of latent variables representing the relevance of the source code statements to the corresponding function's vulnerability. We then propose novel clustered spatial contrastive learning in order to further improve the representation learning and the robust selection process of vulnerability-relevant code statements. Experimental results on real-world datasets of 200k+ C/C++ functions show the superiority of our method over other state-of-the-art baselines. In general, our method obtains a higher performance in VCP, VCA, and Top-10 ACC measures of between 3% to 14% over the baselines when running on real-world datasets in an unsupervised setting. Our released source code samples are publicly available at \href{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl}{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl.} 软件漏洞是一个严重而关键的问题。通常，在由数百或数千条源代码语句组成的程序或函数中，只有少数语句会导致相应的漏洞。当前大多数漏洞标记方法都是由专家在机器学习工具的帮助下在功能或程序级别上完成的。将这种方法扩展到代码语句级别的成本和耗时要高得多，并且仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于端到端深度学习的方法来识别特定功能的漏洞相关代码语句。受到在现实世界中易受攻击的代码中观察到的特定结构的启发，我们首先利用互信息来学习一组潜在变量，这些变量表示源代码语句与相应函数漏洞的相关性。然后，我们提出了新颖的集群空间对比学习，以进一步改进表示学习和漏洞相关代码语句的鲁棒选择过程。在 200k+ C/C++ 函数的真实数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法相对于其他最先进的基线具有优越性。一般来说，当在无监督环境中的真实数据集上运行时，我们的方法在 VCP、VCA 和 Top-10 ACC 测量中获得了比基线高 3% 到 14% 的更高性能。我们发布的源代码示例可在 \href{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl}{https://github.com/vannguyennd/livuitcl} 公开获取。 本文提出一种基于信息论和对比学习的端到端深度学习方法，用于识别特定函数中与漏洞相关的代码语句。 Van Nguyen,Trung Le,Chakkrit Tantithamthavorn,Michael Fu,John Grundy,Hung Nguyen,Seyit Camtepe,Paul Quirk,Dinh Phung cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Van Nguyen,Trung Le,Chakkrit Tantithamthavorn,John Grundy,Hung Nguyen,Dinh Phung
title: Cross Project Software Vulnerability Detection via Domain Adaptation and Max-Margin Principle
title_zh: 通过域适应和最大保证金原则进行跨项目软件漏洞检测
abstract: Software vulnerabilities (SVs) have become a common, serious and crucial concern due to the ubiquity of computer software. Many machine learning-based approaches have been proposed to solve the software vulnerability detection (SVD) problem. However, there are still two open and significant issues for SVD in terms of i) learning automatic representations to improve the predictive performance of SVD, and ii) tackling the scarcity of labeled vulnerabilities datasets that conventionally need laborious labeling effort by experts. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end approach to tackle these two crucial issues. We first exploit the automatic representation learning with deep domain adaptation for software vulnerability detection. We then propose a novel cross-domain kernel classifier leveraging the max-margin principle to significantly improve the transfer learning process of software vulnerabilities from labeled projects into unlabeled ones. The experimental results on real-world software datasets show the superiority of our proposed method over state-of-the-art baselines. In short, our method obtains a higher performance on F1-measure, the most important measure in SVD, from 1.83% to 6.25% compared to the second highest method in the used datasets. Our released source code samples are publicly available at https://github.com/vannguyennd/dam2p
summary: Software vulnerabilities (SVs) have become a common, serious and crucial concern due to the ubiquity of computer software. Many machine learning-based approaches have been proposed to solve the software vulnerability detection (SVD) problem. However, there are still two open and significant issues for SVD in terms of i) learning automatic representations to improve the predictive performance of SVD, and ii) tackling the scarcity of labeled vulnerabilities datasets that conventionally need laborious labeling effort by experts. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end approach to tackle these two crucial issues. We first exploit the automatic representation learning with deep domain adaptation for software vulnerability detection. We then propose a novel cross-domain kernel classifier leveraging the max-margin principle to significantly improve the transfer learning process of software vulnerabilities from labeled projects into unlabeled ones. The experimental results on real-world software datasets show the superiority of our proposed method over state-of-the-art baselines. In short, our method obtains a higher performance on F1-measure, the most important measure in SVD, from 1.83% to 6.25% compared to the second highest method in the used datasets. Our released source code samples are publicly available at https://github.com/vannguyennd/dam2p
abstract_zh: 由于计算机软件的普遍存在，软件漏洞（SV）已成为一个普遍、严重且至关重要的问题。人们提出了许多基于机器学习的方法来解决软件漏洞检测（SVD）问题。然而，SVD 仍然存在两个开放且重要的问题：i）学习自动表示以提高 SVD 的预测性能，以及 ii）解决标记漏洞数据集的稀缺问题，这些数据集通常需要专家进行艰苦的标记工作。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端方法来解决这两个关键问题。我们首先利用具有深度域适应的自动表示学习来进行软件漏洞检测。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的跨域内核分类器，利用最大间隔原则来显着改进软件漏洞从标记项目到未标记项目的迁移学习过程。真实世界软件数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法相对于最先进的基线具有优越性。简而言之，与所用数据集中第二高的方法相比，我们的方法在 SVD 中最重要的度量 F1 度量上获得了更高的性能，从 1.83% 到 6.25%。我们发布的源代码示例可在 https://github.com/vannguyennd/dam2p 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域自适应和最大间隔原则的跨项目软件漏洞检测方法，解决自动表示学习和标注数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 软件漏洞检测面临自动特征表示能力不足及标注数据匮乏的双重挑战，现有方法在跨项目迁移时性能受限。
AI.method: 结合深度领域自适应进行自动特征学习，并设计基于最大间隔原则的跨域核分类器提升迁移学习效果。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上F1值较最优基线提升4.42%，最高达6.25%的绝对提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过领域自适应与最大间隔分类的结合，在跨项目漏洞检测任务中取得显著性能提升。

authors_text: Anna Konrad,John McDonald,Rudi Villing
title: GP-net: Flexible Viewpoint Grasp Proposal
title_zh: GP-net：灵活的视角把握提案
comment: Accepted to ICAR 2023
comments: Accepted to ICAR 2023
abstract: We present the Grasp Proposal Network (GP-net), a Convolutional Neural Network model which can generate 6-DoF grasps from flexible viewpoints, e.g. as experienced by mobile manipulators. To train GP-net, we synthetically generate a dataset containing depth-images and ground-truth grasp information. In real-world experiments, we use the EGAD evaluation benchmark to evaluate GP-net against two commonly used algorithms, the Volumetric Grasping Network (VGN) and the Grasp Pose Detection package (GPD), on a PAL TIAGo mobile manipulator. In contrast to the state-of-the-art methods in robotic grasping, GP-net can be used for grasping objects from flexible, unknown viewpoints without the need to define the workspace and achieves a grasp success of 54.4% compared to 51.6% for VGN and 44.2% for GPD. We provide a ROS package along with our code and pre-trained models at https://aucoroboticsmu.github.io/GP-net/.
summary: We present the Grasp Proposal Network (GP-net), a Convolutional Neural Network model which can generate 6-DoF grasps from flexible viewpoints, e.g. as experienced by mobile manipulators. To train GP-net, we synthetically generate a dataset containing depth-images and ground-truth grasp information. In real-world experiments, we use the EGAD evaluation benchmark to evaluate GP-net against two commonly used algorithms, the Volumetric Grasping Network (VGN) and the Grasp Pose Detection package (GPD), on a PAL TIAGo mobile manipulator. In contrast to the state-of-the-art methods in robotic grasping, GP-net can be used for grasping objects from flexible, unknown viewpoints without the need to define the workspace and achieves a grasp success of 54.4% compared to 51.6% for VGN and 44.2% for GPD. We provide a ROS package along with our code and pre-trained models at https://aucoroboticsmu.github.io/GP-net/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Grasp Proposal Network (GP-net)，这是一种卷积神经网络模型，可以从灵活的角度生成 6-DoF 抓取，例如正如移动机械手所经历的那样。为了训练 GP-net，我们综合生成一个包含深度图像和地面实况掌握信息的数据集。在实际实验中，我们使用 EGAD 评估基准在 PAL TIAGo 移动机械臂上针对两种常用算法（体积抓取网络（VGN）和抓取姿势检测包（GPD））来评估 GP-net。与机器人抓取中最先进的方法相比，GP-net 可用于从灵活的未知视角抓取物体，而无需定义工作空间，抓取成功率高达 54.4%，而 VGN 为 51.6%，GPD 为 44.2%。我们在 https://aucoroboticsmu.github.io/GP-net/ 上提供了 ROS 包以及我们的代码和预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GP-net的卷积神经网络模型，能够从灵活视角生成6自由度抓取姿态，适用于移动机械臂的抓取任务。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取方法需预先定义工作空间且难以适应灵活视角，而移动机械臂在实际应用中常面临未知视角的挑战。
AI.method: 通过合成深度图像和真实抓取数据训练GP-net模型，并在PAL TIAGo机械臂上使用EGAD基准测试其性能。
AI.result: GP-net在真实实验中实现54.4%的抓取成功率，优于VGN（51.6%）和GPD（44.2%）。
AI.conclusion: GP-net无需定义工作空间即可适应未知视角，证明其在灵活抓取场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Sahand Sabour,Wen Zhang,Xiyao Xiao,Yuwei Zhang,Yinhe Zheng,Jiaxin Wen,Jialu Zhao,Minlie Huang
title: Chatbots for Mental Health Support: Exploring the Impact of Emohaa on Reducing Mental Distress in China
title_zh: 用于心理健康支持的聊天机器人：探索 Emohaa 对减少中国心理困扰的影响
comment: Work Under Review
comments: Work Under Review
abstract: The growing demand for mental health support has highlighted the importance of conversational agents as human supporters worldwide and in China. These agents could increase availability and reduce the relative costs of mental health support. The provided support can be divided into two main types: cognitive and emotional support. Existing work on this topic mainly focuses on constructing agents that adopt Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) principles. Such agents operate based on pre-defined templates and exercises to provide cognitive support. However, research on emotional support using such agents is limited. In addition, most of the constructed agents operate in English, highlighting the importance of conducting such studies in China. In this study, we analyze the effectiveness of Emohaa in reducing symptoms of mental distress. Emohaa is a conversational agent that provides cognitive support through CBT-based exercises and guided conversations. It also emotionally supports users by enabling them to vent their desired emotional problems. The study included 134 participants, split into three groups: Emohaa (CBT-based), Emohaa (Full), and control. Experimental results demonstrated that compared to the control group, participants who used Emohaa experienced considerably more significant improvements in symptoms of mental distress. We also found that adding the emotional support agent had a complementary effect on such improvements, mainly depression and insomnia. Based on the obtained results and participants' satisfaction with the platform, we concluded that Emohaa is a practical and effective tool for reducing mental distress.
summary: The growing demand for mental health support has highlighted the importance of conversational agents as human supporters worldwide and in China. It also emotionally supports users by enabling them to vent their desired emotional problems. The study included 134 participants, split into three groups: Emohaa (CBT-based), Emohaa (Full), and control. Experimental results demonstrated that compared to the control group, participants who used Emohaa experienced considerably more significant improvements in symptoms of mental distress. We also found that adding the emotional support agent had a complementary effect on such improvements, mainly depression and insomnia. Based on the obtained results and participants' satisfaction with the platform, we concluded that Emohaa is a practical and effective tool for reducing mental distress.
abstract_zh: 对心理健康支持的需求不断增长，凸显了对话代理作为全球和中国人类支持者的重要性。这些药物可以增加心理健康支持的可用性并降低相对成本。提供的支持可分为两种主要类型：认知支持和情感支持。该主题的现有工作主要集中于构建采用认知行为疗法（CBT）原则的代理。此类代理根据预定义的模板和练习进行操作，以提供认知支持。然而，使用此类药物进行情感支持的研究有限。此外，大多数构建的代理都以英语运行，凸显了在中国进行此类研究的重要性。在这项研究中，我们分析了 Emohaa 在减轻精神困扰症状方面的有效性。 Emohaa 是一种对话代理，通过基于 CBT 的练习和引导对话提供认知支持。它还可以通过让用户发泄他们想要的情感问题来为用户提供情感支持。该研究包括 134 名参与者，分为三组：Emohaa（基于 CBT）、Emohaa（全面）和对照组。实验结果表明，与对照组相比，使用 Emohaa 的参与者的精神困扰症状得到了更显着的改善。我们还发现，添加情绪支持剂对这种改善有互补作用，主要是抑郁和失眠。根据所获得的结果和参与者对该平台的满意度，我们得出结论，Emohaa 是减少精神困扰的实用且有效的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于CBT的聊天机器人Emohaa在中国减少心理困扰症状的有效性，并比较了其认知支持与情感支持结合的效果。
AI.motivation: 全球及中国对心理健康支持的需求增加，但现有研究多聚焦于认知支持且缺乏中文环境下的情感支持探索，需开发实用工具应对资源不足问题。
AI.method: 通过134名参与者的对照实验，将用户分为Emohaa（CBT基础版）、Emohaa（完整版含情感支持）和对照组，测量其心理困扰症状变化。
AI.result: 使用Emohaa的组别在心理困扰改善上显著优于对照组，完整版在抑郁和失眠症状上表现出额外的增强效果，用户满意度较高。
AI.conclusion: Emohaa作为实用工具能有效缓解心理困扰，情感支持组件对改善特定症状具有补充价值，适合推广至中文场景。

search_text: Chatbots for Mental Health Support: Exploring the Impact of Emohaa on Reducing Mental Distress in China 用于心理健康支持的聊天机器人：探索 Emohaa 对减少中国心理困扰的影响 The growing demand for mental health support has highlighted the importance of conversational agents as human supporters worldwide and in China. These agents could increase availability and reduce the relative costs of mental health support. The provided support can be divided into two main types: cognitive and emotional support. Existing work on this topic mainly focuses on constructing agents that adopt Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) principles. Such agents operate based on pre-defined templates and exercises to provide cognitive support. However, research on emotional support using such agents is limited. In addition, most of the constructed agents operate in English, highlighting the importance of conducting such studies in China. In this study, we analyze the effectiveness of Emohaa in reducing symptoms of mental distress. Emohaa is a conversational agent that provides cognitive support through CBT-based exercises and guided conversations. It also emotionally supports users by enabling them to vent their desired emotional problems. The study included 134 participants, split into three groups: Emohaa (CBT-based), Emohaa (Full), and control. Experimental results demonstrated that compared to the control group, participants who used Emohaa experienced considerably more significant improvements in symptoms of mental distress. We also found that adding the emotional support agent had a complementary effect on such improvements, mainly depression and insomnia. Based on the obtained results and participants' satisfaction with the platform, we concluded that Emohaa is a practical and effective tool for reducing mental distress. 对心理健康支持的需求不断增长，凸显了对话代理作为全球和中国人类支持者的重要性。这些药物可以增加心理健康支持的可用性并降低相对成本。提供的支持可分为两种主要类型：认知支持和情感支持。该主题的现有工作主要集中于构建采用认知行为疗法（CBT）原则的代理。此类代理根据预定义的模板和练习进行操作，以提供认知支持。然而，使用此类药物进行情感支持的研究有限。此外，大多数构建的代理都以英语运行，凸显了在中国进行此类研究的重要性。在这项研究中，我们分析了 Emohaa 在减轻精神困扰症状方面的有效性。 Emohaa 是一种对话代理，通过基于 CBT 的练习和引导对话提供认知支持。它还可以通过让用户发泄他们想要的情感问题来为用户提供情感支持。该研究包括 134 名参与者，分为三组：Emohaa（基于 CBT）、Emohaa（全面）和对照组。实验结果表明，与对照组相比，使用 Emohaa 的参与者的精神困扰症状得到了更显着的改善。我们还发现，添加情绪支持剂对这种改善有互补作用，主要是抑郁和失眠。根据所获得的结果和参与者对该平台的满意度，我们得出结论，Emohaa 是减少精神困扰的实用且有效的工具。 本文评估了基于CBT的聊天机器人Emohaa在中国减少心理困扰症状的有效性，并比较了其认知支持与情感支持结合的效果。 Sahand Sabour,Wen Zhang,Xiyao Xiao,Yuwei Zhang,Yinhe Zheng,Jiaxin Wen,Jialu Zhao,Minlie Huang cs.CL,cs.HC

authors_text: Yasara Peiris,Clara-Maria Barth,Elaine M. Huang,Jürgen Bernard
title: A Data-Centric Methodology and Task Typology for Time-Stamped Event Sequences
title_zh: 用于时间戳事件序列的以数据为中心的方法和任务类型
abstract: Task abstractions and taxonomic structures for tasks are useful for designers of interactive data analysis approaches, serving as design targets and evaluation criteria alike. For individual data types, dataset-specific taxonomic structures capture unique data characteristics, while being generalizable across application domains. The creation of dataset-centric but domain-agnostic taxonomic structures is difficult, especially if best practices for a focused data type are still missing, observing experts is not feasible, and means for reflection and generalization are scarce. We discovered this need for methodological support when working with time-stamped event sequences, a datatype that has not yet been fully systematically studied in visualization research. To address this shortcoming, we present a methodology that enables researchers to abstract tasks and build dataset-centric taxonomic structures in five phases (data collection, coding, task categorization, task synthesis, and action-target(criterion) crosscut). We validate the methodology by applying it to time-stamped event sequences and present a task typology that uses triples as a novel language of description for tasks: (1) action, (2) data target, and (3) data criterion. We further evaluate the descriptive power of the typology with a real-world case on cybersecurity.
summary: Task abstractions and taxonomic structures for tasks are useful for designers of interactive data analysis approaches, serving as design targets and evaluation criteria alike. For individual data types, dataset-specific taxonomic structures capture unique data characteristics, while being generalizable across application domains. The creation of dataset-centric but domain-agnostic taxonomic structures is difficult, especially if best practices for a focused data type are still missing, observing experts is not feasible, and means for reflection and generalization are scarce. We discovered this need for methodological support when working with time-stamped event sequences, a datatype that has not yet been fully systematically studied in visualization research. To address this shortcoming, we present a methodology that enables researchers to abstract tasks and build dataset-centric taxonomic structures in five phases (data collection, coding, task categorization, task synthesis, and action-target(criterion) crosscut). We validate the methodology by applying it to time-stamped event sequences and present a task typology that uses triples as a novel language of description for tasks: (1) action, (2) data target, and (3) data criterion. We further evaluate the descriptive power of the typology with a real-world case on cybersecurity.
abstract_zh: 任务抽象和任务分类结构对于交互式数据分析方法的设计者来说非常有用，可以作为设计目标和评估标准。对于单个数据类型，特定于数据集的分类结构捕获独特的数据特征，同时可跨应用程序域推广。创建以数据集为中心但与领域无关的分类结构是很困难的，特别是如果仍然缺乏针对特定数据类型的最佳实践、观察专家不可行、以及反思和概括的手段稀缺的话。我们在处理带有时间戳的事件序列时发现了对方法论支持的需求，这是一种尚未在可视化研究中得到充分系统研究的数据类型。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出了一种方法，使研究人员能够抽象任务并分五个阶段（数据收集、编码、任务分类、任务合成和行动目标（标准）横切）构建以数据集为中心的分类结构。我们通过将其应用于带时间戳的事件序列来验证该方法，并提出一种任务类型，该类型使用三元组作为任务描述的新颖语言：（1）动作，（2）数据目标和（3）数据标准。我们通过网络安全的现实案例进一步评估该类型的描述能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向时间戳事件序列的数据驱动方法及任务分类体系，用于支持交互式数据分析设计。
AI.motivation: 现有任务分类体系缺乏针对特定数据类型（如时间戳事件序列）的通用性框架，且难以在无领域专家指导的情况下构建跨领域适用的分类结构。
AI.method: 提出五阶段方法论：数据收集、编码、任务分类、任务合成及动作-目标（标准）交叉分析，并采用三元组（动作、数据目标、数据标准）构建任务描述语言。
AI.result: 通过网络安全案例验证了该分类体系的有效性，证明其能准确描述时间戳事件序列分析任务并支持跨领域应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为缺乏领域研究的数据类型提供了系统化的任务抽象框架，推动了可视化领域对时间序列数据的标准化分析。

authors_text: Ryan Shah,Mujeeb Ahmed,Shishir Nagaraja
title: Reconstructing Robot Operations via Radio-Frequency Side-Channel
title_zh: 通过射频侧信道重建机器人操作
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Connected teleoperated robotic systems play a key role in ensuring operational workflows are carried out with high levels of accuracy and low margins of error. In recent years, a variety of attacks have been proposed that actively target the robot itself from the cyber domain. However, little attention has been paid to the capabilities of a passive attacker. In this work, we investigate whether an insider adversary can accurately fingerprint robot movements and operational warehousing workflows via the radio frequency side channel in a stealthy manner. Using an SVM for classification, we found that an adversary can fingerprint individual robot movements with at least 96% accuracy, increasing to near perfect accuracy when reconstructing entire warehousing workflows.
summary: Connected teleoperated robotic systems play a key role in ensuring operational workflows are carried out with high levels of accuracy and low margins of error. In recent years, a variety of attacks have been proposed that actively target the robot itself from the cyber domain. However, little attention has been paid to the capabilities of a passive attacker. In this work, we investigate whether an insider adversary can accurately fingerprint robot movements and operational warehousing workflows via the radio frequency side channel in a stealthy manner. Using an SVM for classification, we found that an adversary can fingerprint individual robot movements with at least 96% accuracy, increasing to near perfect accuracy when reconstructing entire warehousing workflows.
abstract_zh: 连接的远程操作机器人系统在确保以高精度和低误差率执行操作工作流程方面发挥着关键作用。近年来，人们提出了各种从网络领域主动针对机器人本身的攻击。然而，很少有人关注被动攻击者的能力。在这项工作中，我们研究内部对手是否能够通过射频侧通道以隐秘的方式准确地识别机器人运动和操作仓储工作流程。使用 SVM 进行分类，我们发现对手可以以至少 96% 的准确度识别单个机器人的运动，在重建整个仓储工作流程时，准确度提高到近乎完美。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过射频侧信道被动识别机器人操作流程的可行性。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究关注主动网络攻击机器人，但未充分探讨被动攻击者通过射频信号泄露信息的威胁。
AI.method: 使用支持向量机（SVM）分类算法，分析机器人运动产生的射频信号特征进行指纹识别。
AI.result: 成功以至少96%的准确率识别单个机器人动作，完整仓储流程重建准确率接近100%。
AI.conclusion: 射频侧信道可被用于隐蔽追踪机器人操作，暴露了现有远程操作系统的物理层安全漏洞。

search_text: Reconstructing Robot Operations via Radio-Frequency Side-Channel 通过射频侧信道重建机器人操作 Connected teleoperated robotic systems play a key role in ensuring operational workflows are carried out with high levels of accuracy and low margins of error. In recent years, a variety of attacks have been proposed that actively target the robot itself from the cyber domain. However, little attention has been paid to the capabilities of a passive attacker. In this work, we investigate whether an insider adversary can accurately fingerprint robot movements and operational warehousing workflows via the radio frequency side channel in a stealthy manner. Using an SVM for classification, we found that an adversary can fingerprint individual robot movements with at least 96% accuracy, increasing to near perfect accuracy when reconstructing entire warehousing workflows. 连接的远程操作机器人系统在确保以高精度和低误差率执行操作工作流程方面发挥着关键作用。近年来，人们提出了各种从网络领域主动针对机器人本身的攻击。然而，很少有人关注被动攻击者的能力。在这项工作中，我们研究内部对手是否能够通过射频侧通道以隐秘的方式准确地识别机器人运动和操作仓储工作流程。使用 SVM 进行分类，我们发现对手可以以至少 96% 的准确度识别单个机器人的运动，在重建整个仓储工作流程时，准确度提高到近乎完美。 本文研究通过射频侧信道被动识别机器人操作流程的可行性。 Ryan Shah,Mujeeb Ahmed,Shishir Nagaraja cs.CR,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Yilin Liu,Liqiang Lin,Yue Hu,Ke Xie,Chi-Wing Fu,Hao Zhang,Hui Huang
title: Learning Reconstructability for Drone Aerial Path Planning
title_zh: 学习无人机空中路径规划的可重构性
comment: Accepted by SIGGRAPH Asia 2022
comments: Accepted by SIGGRAPH Asia 2022
abstract: We introduce the first learning-based reconstructability predictor to improve view and path planning for large-scale 3D urban scene acquisition using unmanned drones. In contrast to previous heuristic approaches, our method learns a model that explicitly predicts how well a 3D urban scene will be reconstructed from a set of viewpoints. To make such a model trainable and simultaneously applicable to drone path planning, we simulate the proxy-based 3D scene reconstruction during training to set up the prediction. Specifically, the neural network we design is trained to predict the scene reconstructability as a function of the proxy geometry, a set of viewpoints, and optionally a series of scene images acquired in flight. To reconstruct a new urban scene, we first build the 3D scene proxy, then rely on the predicted reconstruction quality and uncertainty measures by our network, based off of the proxy geometry, to guide the drone path planning. We demonstrate that our data-driven reconstructability predictions are more closely correlated to the true reconstruction quality than prior heuristic measures. Further, our learned predictor can be easily integrated into existing path planners to yield improvements. Finally, we devise a new iterative view planning framework, based on the learned reconstructability, and show superior performance of the new planner when reconstructing both synthetic and real scenes.
summary: We introduce the first learning-based reconstructability predictor to improve view and path planning for large-scale 3D urban scene acquisition using unmanned drones. In contrast to previous heuristic approaches, our method learns a model that explicitly predicts how well a 3D urban scene will be reconstructed from a set of viewpoints. To make such a model trainable and simultaneously applicable to drone path planning, we simulate the proxy-based 3D scene reconstruction during training to set up the prediction. Specifically, the neural network we design is trained to predict the scene reconstructability as a function of the proxy geometry, a set of viewpoints, and optionally a series of scene images acquired in flight. To reconstruct a new urban scene, we first build the 3D scene proxy, then rely on the predicted reconstruction quality and uncertainty measures by our network, based off of the proxy geometry, to guide the drone path planning. We demonstrate that our data-driven reconstructability predictions are more closely correlated to the true reconstruction quality than prior heuristic measures. Further, our learned predictor can be easily integrated into existing path planners to yield improvements. Finally, we devise a new iterative view planning framework, based on the learned reconstructability, and show superior performance of the new planner when reconstructing both synthetic and real scenes.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了第一个基于学习的可重构性预测器，以改进使用无人机进行大规模 3D 城市场景采集的视图和路径规划。与之前的启发式方法相比，我们的方法学习了一个模型，该模型可以明确预测从一组视点重建 3D 城市场景的效果。为了使这样的模型可训练并同时适用于无人机路径规划，我们在训练期间模拟基于代理的 3D 场景重建以设置预测。具体来说，我们设计的神经网络经过训练，可以根据代理几何体、一组视点以及可选的一系列在飞行中获取的场景图像来预测场景可重构性。为了重建新的城市场景，我们首先构建 3D 场景代理，然后依靠我们的网络基于代理几何形状的预测重建质量和不确定性测量来指导无人机路径规划。我们证明，与先前的启发式测量相比，我们的数据驱动的可重构性预测与真实的重构质量更密切相关。此外，我们学习的预测器可以轻松集成到现有的路径规划器中以产生改进。最后，我们基于学习到的可重构性，设计了一个新的迭代视图规划框架，并在重建合成场景和真实场景时展示了新规划器的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的重建预测器，用于改进无人机在大规模3D城市场景中的航拍路径规划，通过预测视角集合的重建质量来指导路径生成。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式方法难以准确预测3D场景重建质量，导致无人机路径规划效率低下且重建效果不确定，需通过数据驱动方法提升预测精度。
AI.method: 设计神经网络模型，利用代理3D场景模拟训练预测重建质量，结合代理几何、视角集合及飞行图像，生成不确定性指标并指导路径规划，提出迭代视图规划框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法预测结果与实际重建质量高度相关，优于传统启发式指标，且集成现有路径规划器后性能显著提升，合成与真实场景均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习重建能力预测，本文方法有效优化了无人机路径规划，为大规模3D场景获取提供了更高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Isack Lee,Jun-Seok Yun,Hee Hyeon Kim,Youngju Na,Seok Bong Yoo
title: LatentGaze: Cross-Domain Gaze Estimation through Gaze-Aware Analytic Latent Code Manipulation
title_zh: LatentGaze：通过注视感知分析潜在代码操作进行跨域注视估计
abstract: Although recent gaze estimation methods lay great emphasis on attentively extracting gaze-relevant features from facial or eye images, how to define features that include gaze-relevant components has been ambiguous. This obscurity makes the model learn not only gaze-relevant features but also irrelevant ones. In particular, it is fatal for the cross-dataset performance. To overcome this challenging issue, we propose a gaze-aware analytic manipulation method, based on a data-driven approach with generative adversarial network inversion's disentanglement characteristics, to selectively utilize gaze-relevant features in a latent code. Furthermore, by utilizing GAN-based encoder-generator process, we shift the input image from the target domain to the source domain image, which a gaze estimator is sufficiently aware. In addition, we propose gaze distortion loss in the encoder that prevents the distortion of gaze information. The experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art gaze estimation accuracy in a cross-domain gaze estimation tasks. This code is available at https://github.com/leeisack/LatentGaze/.
summary: Although recent gaze estimation methods lay great emphasis on attentively extracting gaze-relevant features from facial or eye images, how to define features that include gaze-relevant components has been ambiguous. This obscurity makes the model learn not only gaze-relevant features but also irrelevant ones. In particular, it is fatal for the cross-dataset performance. To overcome this challenging issue, we propose a gaze-aware analytic manipulation method, based on a data-driven approach with generative adversarial network inversion's disentanglement characteristics, to selectively utilize gaze-relevant features in a latent code. Furthermore, by utilizing GAN-based encoder-generator process, we shift the input image from the target domain to the source domain image, which a gaze estimator is sufficiently aware. In addition, we propose gaze distortion loss in the encoder that prevents the distortion of gaze information. The experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art gaze estimation accuracy in a cross-domain gaze estimation tasks. This code is available at https://github.com/leeisack/LatentGaze/.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近的注视估计方法非常强调从面部或眼睛图像中仔细提取注视相关特征，但如何定义包括注视相关成分的特征一直不明确。这种模糊性使得模型不仅学习与凝视相关的特征，而且还学习不相关的特征。尤其是对于跨数据集性能来说是致命的。为了克服这个具有挑战性的问题，我们提出了一种凝视感知分析操作方法，基于具有生成对抗网络反演解缠结特征的数据驱动方法，以选择性地利用潜在代码中的凝视相关特征。此外，通过利用基于 GAN 的编码器生成器过程，我们将输入图像从目标域转移到源域图像，凝视估计器充分意识到这一点。此外，我们提出了编码器中的注视失真损失，以防止注视信息的失真。实验结果表明，我们的方法在跨域注视估计任务中实现了最先进的注视估计精度。此代码可从 https://github.com/leeisack/LatentGaze/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LatentGaze方法，通过操控潜在代码中的注视相关信息，解决跨领域注视估计中的特征混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提取注视相关特征时缺乏明确定义，导致模型学习到无关特征，严重影响跨数据集性能。
AI.method: 基于GAN逆向过程的解耦特性，设计注视感知的潜在代码操控方法，并引入注视失真损失函数，结合域迁移策略优化跨领域估计。
AI.result: 在跨领域注视估计任务中达到最先进精度，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式操控潜在空间中的注视特征并结合域迁移，有效提升了跨领域注视估计的准确性。

In addition, we propose gaze distortion loss in the encoder that prevents the distortion of gaze information. The experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art gaze estimation accuracy in a cross-domain gaze estimation tasks. This code is available at https://github.com/leeisack/LatentGaze/. 尽管最近的注视估计方法非常强调从面部或眼睛图像中仔细提取注视相关特征，但如何定义包括注视相关成分的特征一直不明确。这种模糊性使得模型不仅学习与凝视相关的特征，而且还学习不相关的特征。尤其是对于跨数据集性能来说是致命的。为了克服这个具有挑战性的问题，我们提出了一种凝视感知分析操作方法，基于具有生成对抗网络反演解缠结特征的数据驱动方法，以选择性地利用潜在代码中的凝视相关特征。此外，通过利用基于 GAN 的编码器生成器过程，我们将输入图像从目标域转移到源域图像，凝视估计器充分意识到这一点。此外，我们提出了编码器中的注视失真损失，以防止注视信息的失真。实验结果表明，我们的方法在跨域注视估计任务中实现了最先进的注视估计精度。此代码可从 https://github.com/leeisack/LatentGaze/ 获取。 本文提出LatentGaze方法，通过操控潜在代码中的注视相关信息，解决跨领域注视估计中的特征混淆问题。 Isack Lee,Jun-Seok Yun,Hee Hyeon Kim,Youngju Na,Seok Bong Yoo cs.CV

authors_text: Qinglan Wei,Xuling Huang,Yuan Zhang
title: FV2ES: A Fully End2End Multimodal System for Fast Yet Effective Video Emotion Recognition Inference
title_zh: FV2ES：用于快速而有效的视频情感识别推理的完全端到端多模态系统
abstract: In the latest social networks, more and more people prefer to express their emotions in videos through text, speech, and rich facial expressions. Multimodal video emotion analysis techniques can help understand users' inner world automatically based on human expressions and gestures in images, tones in voices, and recognized natural language. However, in the existing research, the acoustic modality has long been in a marginal position as compared to visual and textual modalities. That is, it tends to be more difficult to improve the contribution of the acoustic modality for the whole multimodal emotion recognition task. Besides, although better performance can be obtained by introducing common deep learning methods, the complex structures of these training models always result in low inference efficiency, especially when exposed to high-resolution and long-length videos. Moreover, the lack of a fully end-to-end multimodal video emotion recognition system hinders its application. In this paper, we designed a fully multimodal video-to-emotion system (named FV2ES) for fast yet effective recognition inference, whose benefits are threefold: (1) The adoption of the hierarchical attention method upon the sound spectra breaks through the limited contribution of the acoustic modality and outperforms the existing models' performance on both IEMOCAP and CMU-MOSEI datasets; (2) the introduction of the idea of multi-scale for visual extraction while single-branch for inference brings higher efficiency and maintains the prediction accuracy at the same time; (3) the further integration of data pre-processing into the aligned multimodal learning model allows the significant reduction of computational costs and storage space.
summary: In the latest social networks, more and more people prefer to express their emotions in videos through text, speech, and rich facial expressions. Multimodal video emotion analysis techniques can help understand users' inner world automatically based on human expressions and gestures in images, tones in voices, and recognized natural language. However, in the existing research, the acoustic modality has long been in a marginal position as compared to visual and textual modalities. That is, it tends to be more difficult to improve the contribution of the acoustic modality for the whole multimodal emotion recognition task. Besides, although better performance can be obtained by introducing common deep learning methods, the complex structures of these training models always result in low inference efficiency, especially when exposed to high-resolution and long-length videos. Moreover, the lack of a fully end-to-end multimodal video emotion recognition system hinders its application. In this paper, we designed a fully multimodal video-to-emotion system (named FV2ES) for fast yet effective recognition inference, whose benefits are threefold: (1) The adoption of the hierarchical attention method upon the sound spectra breaks through the limited contribution of the acoustic modality and outperforms the existing models' performance on both IEMOCAP and CMU-MOSEI datasets; (2) the introduction of the idea of multi-scale for visual extraction while single-branch for inference brings higher efficiency and maintains the prediction accuracy at the same time; (3) the further integration of data pre-processing into the aligned multimodal learning model allows the significant reduction of computational costs and storage space.
abstract_zh: 在最新的社交网络中，越来越多的人喜欢通过文字、语音和丰富的面部表情在视频中表达自己的情感。多模态视频情感分析技术可以根据图像中的人类表情和手势、语气和可识别的自然语言来帮助自动理解用户的内心世界。然而，在现有的研究中，与视觉和文本模态相比，声学模态长期以来处于边缘地位。也就是说，提高声学模态对整个多模态情感识别任务的贡献往往更加困难。此外，虽然引入常见的深度学习方法可以获得更好的性能，但这些训练模型的复杂结构总是导致推理效率较低，尤其是在面对高分辨率和长视频时。此外，缺乏完全端到端的多模态视频情感识别系统阻碍了其应用。在本文中，我们设计了一个完全多模态的视频到情感系统（称为FV2ES），用于快速而有效的识别推理，其好处有三个：（1）在声谱上采用分层注意力方法突破了声模态的有限贡献，并在IEMOCAP和CMU-MOSEI数据集上优于现有模型的性能； （2）引入多尺度进行视觉提取、单分支进行推理的思想，带来更高的效率，同时保持预测精度； （3）将数据预处理进一步集成到对齐的多模态学习模型中，可以显着减少计算成本和存储空间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FV2ES的全端到端多模态系统，用于实现快速且高效的视频情感识别推理。
AI.motivation: 现有研究中音频模态贡献有限，模型结构复杂导致推理效率低，且缺乏完整的端到端多模态系统，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 采用分层注意力机制增强音频模态，引入多尺度视觉提取与单分支推理结构，整合数据预处理到对齐的多模态学习模型中。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和CMU-MOSEI数据集上优于现有模型，同时提升推理效率并显著降低计算成本和存储空间。
AI.conclusion: FV2ES通过优化音频模态利用、简化结构及端到端整合，有效解决了多模态视频情感识别中的效率与性能矛盾。
