authors_text: Shuang Zhou,Xiao Huang,Ninghao Liu,Fu-Lai Chung,Long-Kai Huang
title: Improving Generalizability of Graph Anomaly Detection Models via Data Augmentation
title_zh: 通过数据增强提高图异常检测模型的通用性
comment: The updated version is accepted by TKDE 2023. Please refer to arXiv:2306.10534v1
comments: The updated version is accepted by TKDE 2023. Please refer to arXiv:2306.10534v1
abstract: Graph anomaly detection (GAD) is a vital task since even a few anomalies can pose huge threats to benign users. Recent semi-supervised GAD methods, which can effectively leverage the available labels as prior knowledge, have achieved superior performances than unsupervised methods. In practice, people usually need to identify anomalies on new (sub)graphs to secure their business, but they may lack labels to train an effective detection model. One natural idea is to directly adopt a trained GAD model to the new (sub)graph for testing. However, we find that existing semi-supervised GAD methods suffer from poor generalization issue, i.e., well-trained models could not perform well on an unseen area (i.e., not accessible in training) of the same graph. It may cause great troubles. In this paper, we base on the phenomenon and propose a general and novel research problem of generalized graph anomaly detection that aims to effectively identify anomalies on both the training-domain graph and unseen testing graph to eliminate potential dangers. Nevertheless, it is a challenging task since only limited labels are available, and the normal background may differ between training and testing data. Accordingly, we propose a data augmentation method named \textit{AugAN} (\uline{Aug}mentation for \uline{A}nomaly and \uline{N}ormal distributions) to enrich training data and boost the generalizability of GAD models. Experiments verify the effectiveness of our method in improving model generalizability.
summary: Graph anomaly detection (GAD) is a vital task since even a few anomalies can pose huge threats to benign users. Recent semi-supervised GAD methods, which can effectively leverage the available labels as prior knowledge, have achieved superior performances than unsupervised methods. In practice, people usually need to identify anomalies on new (sub)graphs to secure their business, but they may lack labels to train an effective detection model. One natural idea is to directly adopt a trained GAD model to the new (sub)graph for testing. However, we find that existing semi-supervised GAD methods suffer from poor generalization issue, i.e., well-trained models could not perform well on an unseen area (i.e., not accessible in training) of the same graph. It may cause great troubles. In this paper, we base on the phenomenon and propose a general and novel research problem of generalized graph anomaly detection that aims to effectively identify anomalies on both the training-domain graph and unseen testing graph to eliminate potential dangers. Nevertheless, it is a challenging task since only limited labels are available, and the normal background may differ between training and testing data. Accordingly, we propose a data augmentation method named \textit{AugAN} (\uline{Aug}mentation for \uline{A}nomaly and \uline{N}ormal distributions) to enrich training data and boost the generalizability of GAD models. Experiments verify the effectiveness of our method in improving model generalizability.
abstract_zh: 图异常检测（GAD）是一项至关重要的任务，因为即使是少数异常也可能对良性用户构成巨大威胁。最近的半监督 GAD 方法可以有效地利用可用标签作为先验知识，取得了比无监督方法更优越的性能。在实践中，人们通常需要识别新（子）图上的异常情况以保护他们的业务，但他们可能缺乏标签来训练有效的检测模型。一个自然的想法是直接采用经过训练的 GAD 模型到新（子）图进行测试。然而，我们发现现有的半监督 GAD 方法存在泛化能力差的问题，即训练有素的模型无法在同一图的不可见区域（即在训练中不可访问）上表现良好。可能会带来很大的麻烦。在本文中，我们基于这一现象，提出了广义图异常检测的通用且新颖的研究问题，旨在有效识别训练域图和未见过的测试图上的异常，以消除潜在的危险。然而，这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为只有有限的标签可用，并且训练和测试数据之间的正常背景可能不同。因此，我们提出了一种名为 \textit{AugAN} 的数据增强方法（\uline{A}正态分布和 \uline{N} 正态分布的 \uline{Aug}mentation）来丰富训练数据并提高 GAD 模型的通用性。实验验证了我们的方法在提高模型泛化性方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过数据增强方法AugAN提升图异常检测模型的泛化能力，使其在训练图和未见过的测试图上均能有效识别异常。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督图异常检测方法在面对新图时泛化能力不足，导致模型无法在未见过的区域有效检测异常，而实际场景中标签稀缺且训练与测试数据的正常背景可能不同。
AI.method: 提出AugAN数据增强方法，通过同时增强异常和正常分布的数据，丰富训练数据以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验验证了AugAN方法在提升图异常检测模型泛化能力上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AugAN方法有效解决了图异常检测模型的泛化问题，为实际应用中标签有限且数据分布差异的场景提供了可行方案。

Nevertheless, it is a challenging task since only limited labels are available, and the normal background may differ between training and testing data. Accordingly, we propose a data augmentation method named \textit{AugAN} (\uline{Aug}mentation for \uline{A}nomaly and \uline{N}ormal distributions) to enrich training data and boost the generalizability of GAD models. Experiments verify the effectiveness of our method in improving model generalizability. 图异常检测（GAD）是一项至关重要的任务，因为即使是少数异常也可能对良性用户构成巨大威胁。最近的半监督 GAD 方法可以有效地利用可用标签作为先验知识，取得了比无监督方法更优越的性能。在实践中，人们通常需要识别新（子）图上的异常情况以保护他们的业务，但他们可能缺乏标签来训练有效的检测模型。一个自然的想法是直接采用经过训练的 GAD 模型到新（子）图进行测试。然而，我们发现现有的半监督 GAD 方法存在泛化能力差的问题，即训练有素的模型无法在同一图的不可见区域（即在训练中不可访问）上表现良好。可能会带来很大的麻烦。在本文中，我们基于这一现象，提出了广义图异常检测的通用且新颖的研究问题，旨在有效识别训练域图和未见过的测试图上的异常，以消除潜在的危险。然而，这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为只有有限的标签可用，并且训练和测试数据之间的正常背景可能不同。因此，我们提出了一种名为 \textit{AugAN} 的数据增强方法（\uline{A}正态分布和 \uline{N} 正态分布的 \uline{Aug}mentation）来丰富训练数据并提高 GAD 模型的通用性。实验验证了我们的方法在提高模型泛化性方面的有效性。 本文提出通过数据增强方法AugAN提升图异常检测模型的泛化能力，使其在训练图和未见过的测试图上均能有效识别异常。 Shuang Zhou,Xiao Huang,Ninghao Liu,Fu-Lai Chung,Long-Kai Huang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jun-Seok Yun,Youngju Na,Hee Hyeon Kim,Hyung-Il Kim,Seok Bong Yoo
title: HAZE-Net: High-Frequency Attentive Super-Resolved Gaze Estimation in Low-Resolution Face Images
title_zh: HAZE-Net：低分辨率人脸图像中的高频注意力超分辨率注视估计
abstract: Although gaze estimation methods have been developed with deep learning techniques, there has been no such approach as aim to attain accurate performance in low-resolution face images with a pixel width of 50 pixels or less. To solve a limitation under the challenging low-resolution conditions, we propose a high-frequency attentive super-resolved gaze estimation network, i.e., HAZE-Net. Our network improves the resolution of the input image and enhances the eye features and those boundaries via a proposed super-resolution module based on a high-frequency attention block. In addition, our gaze estimation module utilizes high-frequency components of the eye as well as the global appearance map. We also utilize the structural location information of faces to approximate head pose. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method exhibits robust gaze estimation performance even in low-resolution face images with 28x28 pixels. The source code of this work is available at https://github.com/dbseorms16/HAZE_Net/.
summary: Although gaze estimation methods have been developed with deep learning techniques, there has been no such approach as aim to attain accurate performance in low-resolution face images with a pixel width of 50 pixels or less. To solve a limitation under the challenging low-resolution conditions, we propose a high-frequency attentive super-resolved gaze estimation network, i.e., HAZE-Net. Our network improves the resolution of the input image and enhances the eye features and those boundaries via a proposed super-resolution module based on a high-frequency attention block. In addition, our gaze estimation module utilizes high-frequency components of the eye as well as the global appearance map. We also utilize the structural location information of faces to approximate head pose. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method exhibits robust gaze estimation performance even in low-resolution face images with 28x28 pixels. The source code of this work is available at https://github.com/dbseorms16/HAZE_Net/.
abstract_zh: 尽管利用深度学习技术开发了注视估计方法，但还没有一种方法能够在像素宽度为 50 像素或更小的低分辨率人脸图像中获得准确的性能。为了解决具有挑战性的低分辨率条件下的限制，我们提出了一种高频注意力超分辨率注视估计网络，即 HAZE-Net。我们的网络通过基于高频注意块的超分辨率模块提高了输入图像的分辨率并增强了眼睛特征和这些边界。此外，我们的注视估计模块利用眼睛的高频分量以及全局外观图。我们还利用面部的结构位置信息来近似头部姿势。实验结果表明，即使在 28x28 像素的低分辨率人脸图像中，所提出的方法也表现出鲁棒的注视估计性能。这项工作的源代码可在 https://github.com/dbseorms16/HAZE_Net/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAZE-Net网络，旨在解决低分辨率（50像素以下）人脸图像中精准注视估计的难题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以处理低分辨率人脸图像中的注视估计问题，尤其在28x28像素等极低分辨率下存在性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计包含高频率注意力块的超分辨率模块，增强图像分辨率与眼部特征边界；结合高频率眼部成分与全局外观图进行注视估计，并利用面部结构信息近似头部姿态。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在28x28像素低分辨率图像上仍能保持稳健的注视估计性能。
AI.conclusion: HAZE-Net通过超分辨率与高频率注意力机制有效提升了低分辨率场景下的注视估计精度，为相关应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xiaolin Zheng,Jiajie Su,Weiming Liu,Chaochao Chen
title: DDGHM: Dual Dynamic Graph with Hybrid Metric Training for Cross-Domain Sequential Recommendation
title_zh: DDGHM：具有混合度量训练的双动态图，用于跨域顺序推荐
abstract: Sequential Recommendation (SR) characterizes evolving patterns of user behaviors by modeling how users transit among items. However, the short interaction sequences limit the performance of existing SR. To solve this problem, we focus on Cross-Domain Sequential Recommendation (CDSR) in this paper, which aims to leverage information from other domains to improve the sequential recommendation performance of a single domain. Solving CDSR is challenging. On the one hand, how to retain single domain preferences as well as integrate cross-domain influence remains an essential problem. On the other hand, the data sparsity problem cannot be totally solved by simply utilizing knowledge from other domains, due to the limited length of the merged sequences. To address the challenges, we propose DDGHM, a novel framework for the CDSR problem, which includes two main modules, i.e., dual dynamic graph modeling and hybrid metric training. The former captures intra-domain and inter-domain sequential transitions through dynamically constructing two-level graphs, i.e., the local graphs and the global graph, and incorporating them with a fuse attentive gating mechanism. The latter enhances user and item representations by employing hybrid metric learning, including collaborative metric for achieving alignment and contrastive metric for preserving uniformity, to further alleviate data sparsity issue and improve prediction accuracy. We conduct experiments on two benchmark datasets and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of DDHMG.
summary: Sequential Recommendation (SR) characterizes evolving patterns of user behaviors by modeling how users transit among items. However, the short interaction sequences limit the performance of existing SR. To solve this problem, we focus on Cross-Domain Sequential Recommendation (CDSR) in this paper, which aims to leverage information from other domains to improve the sequential recommendation performance of a single domain. Solving CDSR is challenging. On the one hand, how to retain single domain preferences as well as integrate cross-domain influence remains an essential problem. On the other hand, the data sparsity problem cannot be totally solved by simply utilizing knowledge from other domains, due to the limited length of the merged sequences. To address the challenges, we propose DDGHM, a novel framework for the CDSR problem, which includes two main modules, i.e., dual dynamic graph modeling and hybrid metric training. The former captures intra-domain and inter-domain sequential transitions through dynamically constructing two-level graphs, i.e., the local graphs and the global graph, and incorporating them with a fuse attentive gating mechanism. The latter enhances user and item representations by employing hybrid metric learning, including collaborative metric for achieving alignment and contrastive metric for preserving uniformity, to further alleviate data sparsity issue and improve prediction accuracy. We conduct experiments on two benchmark datasets and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of DDHMG.
abstract_zh: 顺序推荐 (SR) 通过对用户如何在项目之间转换进行建模来表征用户行为的演变模式。然而，短交互序列限制了现有SR的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们在本文中关注跨域顺序推荐（CDSR），其目的是利用来自其他域的信息来提高单个域的顺序推荐性能。解决 CDSR 具有挑战性。一方面，如何保留单一领域偏好并整合跨领域影响力仍然是一个重要问题。另一方面，由于合并序列的长度有限，仅仅利用其他领域的知识并不能完全解决数据稀疏问题。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 DDGHM，一种针对 CDSR 问题的新颖框架，其中包括两个主要模块，即对偶动态图建模和混合度量训练。前者通过动态构建两级图（即局部图和全局图）并将它们与熔断注意门控机制相结合来捕获域内和域间顺序转换。后者通过采用混合度量学习来增强用户和项目表示，包括用于实现对齐的协作度量和用于保持均匀性的对比度量，以进一步缓解数据稀疏问题并提高预测准确性。我们在两个基准数据集上进行了实验，结果证明了 DDHMG 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DDGHM框架，通过双动态图建模和混合度量训练解决跨领域序列推荐中的数据稀疏性和领域偏好融合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有序列推荐方法因交互序列过短效果受限，跨领域推荐需平衡单领域偏好与跨领域影响，同时面临合并序列长度不足导致的数据稀疏性挑战。
AI.method: 构建双动态图（局部图与全局图）捕捉领域内/间时序转移，并通过融合注意力门机制整合信息；采用协作度量（对齐）与对比度量（保持一致性）的混合训练策略增强表示学习。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上的实验验证了DDGHM在预测准确率上的有效性，优于现有跨领域序列推荐方法。
AI.conclusion: DDGHM通过双动态图建模与混合度量训练有效缓解跨领域推荐中的数据稀疏性问题，提升了跨领域序列推荐性能。

search_text: DDGHM: Dual Dynamic Graph with Hybrid Metric Training for Cross-Domain Sequential Recommendation DDGHM：具有混合度量训练的双动态图，用于跨域顺序推荐 Sequential Recommendation (SR) characterizes evolving patterns of user behaviors by modeling how users transit among items. However, the short interaction sequences limit the performance of existing SR. The former captures intra-domain and inter-domain sequential transitions through dynamically constructing two-level graphs, i.e., the local graphs and the global graph, and incorporating them with a fuse attentive gating mechanism. The latter enhances user and item representations by employing hybrid metric learning, including collaborative metric for achieving alignment and contrastive metric for preserving uniformity, to further alleviate data sparsity issue and improve prediction accuracy. We conduct experiments on two benchmark datasets and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of DDHMG. 顺序推荐 (SR) 通过对用户如何在项目之间转换进行建模来表征用户行为的演变模式。然而，短交互序列限制了现有SR的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们在本文中关注跨域顺序推荐（CDSR），其目的是利用来自其他域的信息来提高单个域的顺序推荐性能。解决 CDSR 具有挑战性。一方面，如何保留单一领域偏好并整合跨领域影响力仍然是一个重要问题。另一方面，由于合并序列的长度有限，仅仅利用其他领域的知识并不能完全解决数据稀疏问题。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 DDGHM，一种针对 CDSR 问题的新颖框架，其中包括两个主要模块，即对偶动态图建模和混合度量训练。前者通过动态构建两级图（即局部图和全局图）并将它们与熔断注意门控机制相结合来捕获域内和域间顺序转换。后者通过采用混合度量学习来增强用户和项目表示，包括用于实现对齐的协作度量和用于保持均匀性的对比度量，以进一步缓解数据稀疏问题并提高预测准确性。我们在两个基准数据集上进行了实验，结果证明了 DDHMG 的有效性。 本文提出DDGHM框架，通过双动态图建模和混合度量训练解决跨领域序列推荐中的数据稀疏性和领域偏好融合问题。 Xiaolin Zheng,Jiajie Su,Weiming Liu,Chaochao Chen cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Heng Zhou,Chunna Tian,Zhenxi Zhang,Chengyang Li,Yuxuan Ding,Yongqiang Xie,Zhongbo Li
title: Position-Aware Relation Learning for RGB-Thermal Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于 RGB 热显着物体检测的位置感知关系学习
abstract: RGB-Thermal salient object detection (SOD) combines two spectra to segment visually conspicuous regions in images. Most existing methods use boundary maps to learn the sharp boundary. These methods ignore the interactions between isolated boundary pixels and other confident pixels, leading to sub-optimal performance. To address this problem,we propose a position-aware relation learning network (PRLNet) for RGB-T SOD based on swin transformer. PRLNet explores the distance and direction relationships between pixels to strengthen intra-class compactness and inter-class separation, generating salient object masks with clear boundaries and homogeneous regions. Specifically, we develop a novel signed distance map auxiliary module (SDMAM) to improve encoder feature representation, which takes into account the distance relation of different pixels in boundary neighborhoods. Then, we design a feature refinement approach with directional field (FRDF), which rectifies features of boundary neighborhood by exploiting the features inside salient objects. FRDF utilizes the directional information between object pixels to effectively enhance the intra-class compactness of salient regions. In addition, we constitute a pure transformer encoder-decoder network to enhance multispectral feature representation for RGB-T SOD. Finally, we conduct quantitative and qualitative experiments on three public benchmark datasets.The results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: RGB-Thermal salient object detection (SOD) combines two spectra to segment visually conspicuous regions in images. Most existing methods use boundary maps to learn the sharp boundary. These methods ignore the interactions between isolated boundary pixels and other confident pixels, leading to sub-optimal performance. To address this problem,we propose a position-aware relation learning network (PRLNet) for RGB-T SOD based on swin transformer. PRLNet explores the distance and direction relationships between pixels to strengthen intra-class compactness and inter-class separation, generating salient object masks with clear boundaries and homogeneous regions. Specifically, we develop a novel signed distance map auxiliary module (SDMAM) to improve encoder feature representation, which takes into account the distance relation of different pixels in boundary neighborhoods. Then, we design a feature refinement approach with directional field (FRDF), which rectifies features of boundary neighborhood by exploiting the features inside salient objects. FRDF utilizes the directional information between object pixels to effectively enhance the intra-class compactness of salient regions. In addition, we constitute a pure transformer encoder-decoder network to enhance multispectral feature representation for RGB-T SOD. Finally, we conduct quantitative and qualitative experiments on three public benchmark datasets.The results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: RGB-热显着目标检测 (SOD) 结合两个光谱来分割图像中视觉上显着的区域。大多数现有方法使用边界图来学习尖锐边界。这些方法忽略了孤立边界像素和其他置信像素之间的相互作用，导致性能次优。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 swin Transformer 的 RGB-T SOD 位置感知关系学习网络（PRLNet）。 PRLNet 探索像素之间的距离和方向关系，以加强类内紧凑性和类间分离，生成具有清晰边界和均匀区域的显着对象掩模。具体来说，我们开发了一种新颖的符号距离图辅助模块（SDMAM）来改进编码器特征表示，该模块考虑了边界邻域中不同像素的距离关系。然后，我们设计了一种具有方向场（FRDF）的特征细化方法，该方法通过利用显着对象内部的特征来校正边界邻域的特征。 FRDF利用对象像素之间的方向信息来有效增强显着区域的类内紧凑性。此外，我们构建了一个纯 Transformer 编码器-解码器网络来增强 RGB-T SOD 的多光谱特征表示。最后，我们对三个公共基准数据集进行了定量和定性实验。结果表明，我们提出的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于位置感知关系学习的RGB-热显著目标检测方法PRLNet，通过改进特征表示和边界区域处理提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-热显著目标检测方法依赖边界图学习，但忽视了孤立边界像素与其他置信像素的交互关系，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计了基于Swin Transformer的PRLNet网络，包含：1) 签名距离图辅助模块(SDMAM)增强编码器特征表示；2) 方向场特征精修模块(FRDF)利用方向信息提升类内紧凑性；3) 纯Transformer编解码器增强多光谱特征。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的定量和定性实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过位置感知的关系学习机制，有效提升了RGB-热显著目标检测的边界清晰度和区域一致性。

authors_text: Zihui Guo,Yonghong Hou,Pichao Wang,Zhimin Gao,Mingliang Xu,Wanqing Li
title: FT-HID: A Large Scale RGB-D Dataset for First and Third Person Human Interaction Analysis
title_zh: FT-HID：用于第一人称和第三人称人类交互分析的大规模 RGB-D 数据集
abstract: Analysis of human interaction is one important research topic of human motion analysis. It has been studied either using first person vision (FPV) or third person vision (TPV). However, the joint learning of both types of vision has so far attracted little attention. One of the reasons is the lack of suitable datasets that cover both FPV and TPV. In addition, existing benchmark datasets of either FPV or TPV have several limitations, including the limited number of samples, participant subjects, interaction categories, and modalities. In this work, we contribute a large-scale human interaction dataset, namely, FT-HID dataset. FT-HID contains pair-aligned samples of first person and third person visions. The dataset was collected from 109 distinct subjects and has more than 90K samples for three modalities. The dataset has been validated by using several existing action recognition methods. In addition, we introduce a novel multi-view interaction mechanism for skeleton sequences, and a joint learning multi-stream framework for first person and third person visions. Both methods yield promising results on the FT-HID dataset. It is expected that the introduction of this vision-aligned large-scale dataset will promote the development of both FPV and TPV, and their joint learning techniques for human action analysis. The dataset and code are available at \href{https://github.com/ENDLICHERE/FT-HID}{here}.
summary: Analysis of human interaction is one important research topic of human motion analysis. It has been studied either using first person vision (FPV) or third person vision (TPV). However, the joint learning of both types of vision has so far attracted little attention. One of the reasons is the lack of suitable datasets that cover both FPV and TPV. In addition, existing benchmark datasets of either FPV or TPV have several limitations, including the limited number of samples, participant subjects, interaction categories, and modalities. In this work, we contribute a large-scale human interaction dataset, namely, FT-HID dataset. FT-HID contains pair-aligned samples of first person and third person visions. The dataset was collected from 109 distinct subjects and has more than 90K samples for three modalities. The dataset has been validated by using several existing action recognition methods. In addition, we introduce a novel multi-view interaction mechanism for skeleton sequences, and a joint learning multi-stream framework for first person and third person visions. Both methods yield promising results on the FT-HID dataset. It is expected that the introduction of this vision-aligned large-scale dataset will promote the development of both FPV and TPV, and their joint learning techniques for human action analysis. The dataset and code are available at \href{https://github.com/ENDLICHERE/FT-HID}{here}.
abstract_zh: 人体交互分析是人体运动分析的重要研究课题之一。已经使用第一人称视觉（FPV）或第三人称视觉（TPV）对其进行了研究。然而，两种视觉的联合学习迄今为止还没有引起人们的关注。原因之一是缺乏涵盖 FPV 和 TPV 的合适数据集。此外，现有的 FPV 或 TPV 基准数据集都存在一些局限性，包括样本数量、参与者主体、交互类别和模式有限。在这项工作中，我们贡献了一个大规模的人类交互数据集，即 FT-HID 数据集。 FT-HID 包含第一人称和第三人称视觉的配对样本。该数据集收集自 109 名不同的受试者，并拥有三种模式的超过 90K 样本。该数据集已通过使用几种现有的动作识别方法进行了验证。此外，我们还引入了一种新颖的骨架序列多视图交互机制，以及针对第一人称和第三人称视觉的联合学习多流框架。这两种方法在 FT-HID 数据集上都产生了有希望的结果。预计这种与视觉相关的大规模数据集的引入将促进 FPV 和 TPV 及其用于人类行为分析的联合学习技术的发展。数据集和代码可在 \href{https://github.com/ENDLICHERE/FT-HID}{here} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模RGB-D数据集FT-HID，用于第一人称和第三人称视角下的人类交互分析。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏同时覆盖第一人称（FPV）和第三人称（TPV）视角的数据，且样本量、参与人数、交互类别和模态种类有限。
AI.method: 构建包含109名受试者、超9万样本的FT-HID数据集，并提出多视角交互机制与联合学习多流框架。
AI.result: 数据集通过现有动作识别方法验证，所提方法在FT-HID上表现良好，数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该对齐视角的大规模数据集有望推动FPV与TPV及其联合学习技术的发展。

authors_text: Radhwan Adnan Dakhil,Ali Retha Hasoon Khayeat
title: Review On Deep Learning Technique For Underwater Object Detection
title_zh: 水下目标检测深度学习技术综述
comment: 15 pages, with 9 figures,3rd International Conference on Data Science and Machine Learning (DSML 2022)
comments: 15 pages, with 9 figures,3rd International Conference on Data Science and Machine Learning (DSML 2022)
abstract: Repair and maintenance of underwater structures as well as marine science rely heavily on the results of underwater object detection, which is a crucial part of the image processing workflow. Although many computer vision-based approaches have been presented, no one has yet developed a system that reliably and accurately detects and categorizes objects and animals found in the deep sea. This is largely due to obstacles that scatter and absorb light in an underwater setting. With the introduction of deep learning, scientists have been able to address a wide range of issues, including safeguarding the marine ecosystem, saving lives in an emergency, preventing underwater disasters, and detecting, spooring, and identifying underwater targets. However, the benefits and drawbacks of these deep learning systems remain unknown. Therefore, the purpose of this article is to provide an overview of the dataset that has been utilized in underwater object detection and to present a discussion of the advantages and disadvantages of the algorithms employed for this purpose.
summary: Repair and maintenance of underwater structures as well as marine science rely heavily on the results of underwater object detection, which is a crucial part of the image processing workflow. Although many computer vision-based approaches have been presented, no one has yet developed a system that reliably and accurately detects and categorizes objects and animals found in the deep sea. This is largely due to obstacles that scatter and absorb light in an underwater setting. With the introduction of deep learning, scientists have been able to address a wide range of issues, including safeguarding the marine ecosystem, saving lives in an emergency, preventing underwater disasters, and detecting, spooring, and identifying underwater targets. However, the benefits and drawbacks of these deep learning systems remain unknown. Therefore, the purpose of this article is to provide an overview of the dataset that has been utilized in underwater object detection and to present a discussion of the advantages and disadvantages of the algorithms employed for this purpose.
abstract_zh: 水下结构的修复和维护以及海洋科学在很大程度上依赖于水下物体检测的结果，这是图像处理工作流程的重要组成部分。尽管已经提出了许多基于计算机视觉的方法，但还没有人开发出一种能够可靠、准确地检测和分类深海中发现的物体和动物的系统。这主要是由于水下环境中的障碍物会散射和吸收光线。随着深度学习的引入，科学家们已经能够解决一系列广泛的问题，包括保护海洋生态系统、在紧急情况下拯救生命、预防水下灾难以及探测、发现和识别水下目标。然而，这些深度学习系统的优点和缺点仍然未知。因此，本文的目的是概述水下物体检测中使用的数据集，并讨论用于此目的的算法的优缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习技术在水下物体检测中的应用，讨论了相关数据集及算法的优缺点。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉方法在深海环境中因光线散射和吸收问题难以准确检测物体，需探索深度学习技术的潜力与局限性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分析现有水下物体检测数据集及深度学习算法的应用情况。
AI.result: 总结了当前常用数据集特点，并对比了不同深度学习算法在水下检测中的优势与不足。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习虽提升水下检测能力，但环境复杂性仍需进一步研究以优化算法性能。

search_text: Review On Deep Learning Technique For Underwater Object Detection 水下目标检测深度学习技术综述 Repair and maintenance of underwater structures as well as marine science rely heavily on the results of underwater object detection, which is a crucial part of the image processing workflow. Although many computer vision-based approaches have been presented, no one has yet developed a system that reliably and accurately detects and categorizes objects and animals found in the deep sea. This is largely due to obstacles that scatter and absorb light in an underwater setting. With the introduction of deep learning, scientists have been able to address a wide range of issues, including safeguarding the marine ecosystem, saving lives in an emergency, preventing underwater disasters, and detecting, spooring, and identifying underwater targets. However, the benefits and drawbacks of these deep learning systems remain unknown. Therefore, the purpose of this article is to provide an overview of the dataset that has been utilized in underwater object detection and to present a discussion of the advantages and disadvantages of the algorithms employed for this purpose. 水下结构的修复和维护以及海洋科学在很大程度上依赖于水下物体检测的结果，这是图像处理工作流程的重要组成部分。尽管已经提出了许多基于计算机视觉的方法，但还没有人开发出一种能够可靠、准确地检测和分类深海中发现的物体和动物的系统。这主要是由于水下环境中的障碍物会散射和吸收光线。随着深度学习的引入，科学家们已经能够解决一系列广泛的问题，包括保护海洋生态系统、在紧急情况下拯救生命、预防水下灾难以及探测、发现和识别水下目标。然而，这些深度学习系统的优点和缺点仍然未知。因此，本文的目的是概述水下物体检测中使用的数据集，并讨论用于此目的的算法的优缺点。 本文综述了深度学习技术在水下物体检测中的应用，讨论了相关数据集及算法的优缺点。 Radhwan Adnan Dakhil,Ali Retha Hasoon Khayeat cs.CV

authors_text: Zhenhua Xu,Yuxuan Liu,Yuxiang Sun,Ming Liu,Lujia Wang
title: RNGDet++: Road Network Graph Detection by Transformer with Instance Segmentation and Multi-scale Features Enhancement
title_zh: RNGDet++：使用实例分割和多尺度特征增强的 Transformer 进行道路网络图检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: The road network graph is a critical component for downstream tasks in autonomous driving, such as global route planning and navigation. In the past years, road network graphs are usually annotated by human experts manually, which is time-consuming and labor-intensive. To annotate road network graphs effectively and efficiently, automatic algorithms for road network graph detection are demanded. Most existing methods either adopt a post-processing step on semantic segmentation maps to produce road network graphs, or propose graph-based algorithms to directly predict the graphs. However, these works suffer from hard-coded algorithms and inferior performance. To enhance the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) method RNGDet, we add an instance segmentation head to better supervise the training, and enable the network to leverage multi-scale features of the backbone. Since the new proposed approach is improved from RNGDet, we name it RNGDet++. Experimental results show that our RNGDet++ outperforms baseline methods in terms of almost all evaluation metrics on two large-scale public datasets. Our code and supplementary materials are available at \url{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/RNGDetPlusPlus/}.

To enhance the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) method RNGDet, we add an instance segmentation head to better supervise the training, and enable the network to leverage multi-scale features of the backbone. Since the new proposed approach is improved from RNGDet, we name it RNGDet++. Experimental results show that our RNGDet++ outperforms baseline methods in terms of almost all evaluation metrics on two large-scale public datasets. Our code and supplementary materials are available at \url{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/RNGDetPlusPlus/}.
abstract_zh: 路网图是自动驾驶下游任务（例如全局路线规划和导航）的关键组成部分。过去几年，路网图通常由人类专家手动标注，耗时耗力。为了有效且高效地注释道路网络图，需要用于道路网络图检测的自动算法。大多数现有方法要么采用语义分割图的后处理步骤来生成道路网络图，要么提出基于图的算法来直接预测图。然而，这些作品都存在硬编码算法和性能较差的问题。为了增强之前最先进（SOTA）方法 RNGDet，我们添加了实例分割头以更好地监督训练，并使网络能够利用主干的多尺度特征。由于新提出的方法是从 RNGDet 改进而来的，我们将其命名为 RNGDet++。实验结果表明，我们的 RNGDet++ 在两个大型公共数据集上的几乎所有评估指标方面都优于基线方法。我们的代码和补充材料可在 \url{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/RNGDetPlusPlus/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RNGDet++方法，结合实例分割与多尺度特征增强，利用Transformer架构提升道路网络图检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统道路网络图检测依赖人工标注或存在硬编码算法，效率低且性能不足，需更高效的自动化方法。
AI.method: 在RNGDet基础上添加实例分割头，增强多尺度特征利用，通过Transformer架构实现端到端检测。
AI.result: 在两个大规模数据集上，RNGDet++在多数评估指标中优于基线方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: RNGDet++通过实例分割与多尺度特征增强，显著提升道路网络图检测性能，为自动驾驶提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: Yoshihisa Tsurumine,Takamitsu Matsubara
title: Goal-Aware Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning from Imperfect Demonstration for Robotic Cloth Manipulation
title_zh: 从机器人布料操作的不完美演示中进行目标感知生成对抗性模仿学习
comment: Accepted by Robotics and Autonomous Systems
comments: Accepted by Robotics and Autonomous Systems
abstract: Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) can learn policies without explicitly defining the reward function from demonstrations. GAIL has the potential to learn policies with high-dimensional observations as input, e.g., images. By applying GAIL to a real robot, perhaps robot policies can be obtained for daily activities like washing, folding clothes, cooking, and cleaning. However, human demonstration data are often imperfect due to mistakes, which degrade the performance of the resulting policies. We address this issue by focusing on the following features: 1) many robotic tasks are goal-reaching tasks, and 2) labeling such goal states in demonstration data is relatively easy. With these in mind, this paper proposes Goal-Aware Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GA-GAIL), which trains a policy by introducing a second discriminator to distinguish the goal state in parallel with the first discriminator that indicates the demonstration data. This extends a standard GAIL framework to more robustly learn desirable policies even from imperfect demonstrations through a goal-state discriminator that promotes achieving the goal state. Furthermore, GA-GAIL employs the Entropy-maximizing Deep P-Network (EDPN) as a generator, which considers both the smoothness and causal entropy in the policy update, to achieve stable policy learning from two discriminators. Our proposed method was successfully applied to two real-robotic cloth-manipulation tasks: turning a handkerchief over and folding clothes. We confirmed that it learns cloth-manipulation policies without task-specific reward function design. Video of the real experiments are available at https://youtu.be/h_nII2ooUrE.
summary: Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) can learn policies without explicitly defining the reward function from demonstrations. GAIL has the potential to learn policies with high-dimensional observations as input, e.g., images. By applying GAIL to a real robot, perhaps robot policies can be obtained for daily activities like washing, folding clothes, cooking, and cleaning. However, human demonstration data are often imperfect due to mistakes, which degrade the performance of the resulting policies. We address this issue by focusing on the following features: 1) many robotic tasks are goal-reaching tasks, and 2) labeling such goal states in demonstration data is relatively easy. With these in mind, this paper proposes Goal-Aware Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GA-GAIL), which trains a policy by introducing a second discriminator to distinguish the goal state in parallel with the first discriminator that indicates the demonstration data. This extends a standard GAIL framework to more robustly learn desirable policies even from imperfect demonstrations through a goal-state discriminator that promotes achieving the goal state. Furthermore, GA-GAIL employs the Entropy-maximizing Deep P-Network (EDPN) as a generator, which considers both the smoothness and causal entropy in the policy update, to achieve stable policy learning from two discriminators. Our proposed method was successfully applied to two real-robotic cloth-manipulation tasks: turning a handkerchief over and folding clothes. We confirmed that it learns cloth-manipulation policies without task-specific reward function design. Video of the real experiments are available at https://youtu.be/h_nII2ooUrE.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗性模仿学习（GAIL）可以学习策略，而无需从演示中明确定义奖励函数。 GAIL 有潜力以高维观察作为输入（例如图像）来学习策略。通过将 GAIL 应用到真实的机器人上，或许可以获得用于洗衣、叠衣服、做饭和清洁等日常活动的机器人策略。然而，人类示范数据往往由于错误而并不完美，从而降低了最终政策的绩效。我们通过关注以下功能来解决这个问题：1）许多机器人任务都是实现目标的任务，2）在演示数据中标记此类目标状态相对容易。考虑到这些，本文提出了目标感知生成对抗性模仿学习（GA-GAIL），它通过引入第二个判别器来训练策略，以与指示演示数据的第一个判别器并行区分目标状态。这扩展了标准 GAIL 框架，甚至可以通过促进实现目标状态的目标状态判别器从不完美的演示中更稳健地学习所需的策略。此外，GA-GAIL采用熵最大化深度P网络（EDPN）作为生成器，在策略更新中同时考虑平滑性和因果熵，以实现两个判别器的稳定策略学习。我们提出的方法成功应用于两个真实的机器人布料操作任务：翻转手帕和折叠衣服。我们确认它可以在没有特定任务奖励函数设计的情况下学习布料操纵策略。真实实验的视频可在 https://youtu.be/h_nII2ooUrE 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种目标感知的生成对抗模仿学习方法（GA-GAIL），用于从不完美的示范数据中学习机器人布料操作策略，无需显式设计奖励函数。
AI.motivation: 传统GAIL在处理不完美人类示范数据时性能下降，而许多机器人任务（如布料操作）具有明确的目标状态，且目标状态标注相对容易，因此需要改进方法以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过引入第二个判别器区分目标状态，并结合熵最大化深度P网络（EDPN）作为生成器，同时考虑策略更新的平滑性和因果熵，实现从两个判别器中稳定学习策略。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于两个真实机器人布料操作任务（手帕翻转和衣服折叠），验证了无需任务特定奖励函数即可学习有效策略的能力。
AI.conclusion: GA-GAIL通过目标状态判别器和EDPN生成器的结合，能够从不完美示范中学习鲁棒的机器人策略，为复杂日常任务提供了可行方案。

conclusion: GA-GAIL通过目标状态判别器和EDPN生成器的结合，能够从不完美示范中学习鲁棒的机器人策略，为复杂日常任务提供了可行方案。
search_text: Goal-Aware Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning from Imperfect Demonstration for Robotic Cloth Manipulation 从机器人布料操作的不完美演示中进行目标感知生成对抗性模仿学习 Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) can learn policies without explicitly defining the reward function from demonstrations. GAIL has the potential to learn policies with high-dimensional observations as input, e.g., images. By applying GAIL to a real robot, perhaps robot policies can be obtained for daily activities like washing, folding clothes, cooking, and cleaning. However, human demonstration data are often imperfect due to mistakes, which degrade the performance of the resulting policies. We address this issue by focusing on the following features: 1) many robotic tasks are goal-reaching tasks, and 2) labeling such goal states in demonstration data is relatively easy. With these in mind, this paper proposes Goal-Aware Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GA-GAIL), which trains a policy by introducing a second discriminator to distinguish the goal state in parallel with the first discriminator that indicates the demonstration data. This extends a standard GAIL framework to more robustly learn desirable policies even from imperfect demonstrations through a goal-state discriminator that promotes achieving the goal state. Furthermore, GA-GAIL employs the Entropy-maximizing Deep P-Network (EDPN) as a generator, which considers both the smoothness and causal entropy in the policy update, to achieve stable policy learning from two discriminators. Our proposed method was successfully applied to two real-robotic cloth-manipulation tasks: turning a handkerchief over and folding clothes. We confirmed that it learns cloth-manipulation policies without task-specific reward function design. Video of the real experiments are available at https://youtu.be/h_nII2ooUrE. 生成对抗性模仿学习（GAIL）可以学习策略，而无需从演示中明确定义奖励函数。 GAIL 有潜力以高维观察作为输入（例如图像）来学习策略。通过将 GAIL 应用到真实的机器人上，或许可以获得用于洗衣、叠衣服、做饭和清洁等日常活动的机器人策略。然而，人类示范数据往往由于错误而并不完美，从而降低了最终政策的绩效。我们通过关注以下功能来解决这个问题：1）许多机器人任务都是实现目标的任务，2）在演示数据中标记此类目标状态相对容易。考虑到这些，本文提出了目标感知生成对抗性模仿学习（GA-GAIL），它通过引入第二个判别器来训练策略，以与指示演示数据的第一个判别器并行区分目标状态。这扩展了标准 GAIL 框架，甚至可以通过促进实现目标状态的目标状态判别器从不完美的演示中更稳健地学习所需的策略。此外，GA-GAIL采用熵最大化深度P网络（EDPN）作为生成器，在策略更新中同时考虑平滑性和因果熵，以实现两个判别器的稳定策略学习。我们提出的方法成功应用于两个真实的机器人布料操作任务：翻转手帕和折叠衣服。我们确认它可以在没有特定任务奖励函数设计的情况下学习布料操纵策略。真实实验的视频可在 https://youtu.be/h_nII2ooUrE 上找到。 本文提出了一种目标感知的生成对抗模仿学习方法（GA-GAIL），用于从不完美的示范数据中学习机器人布料操作策略，无需显式设计奖励函数。 Yoshihisa Tsurumine,Takamitsu Matsubara cs.RO

authors_text: Kendra Walker,Ben Moscona,Kelsey Jack,Seema Jayachandran,Namrata Kala,Rohini Pande,Jiani Xue,Marshall Burke
title: Detecting Crop Burning in India using Satellite Data
title_zh: 使用卫星数据检测印度农作物燃烧情况
abstract: Crop residue burning is a major source of air pollution in many parts of the world, notably South Asia. Policymakers, practitioners and researchers have invested in both measuring impacts and developing interventions to reduce burning. However, measuring the impacts of burning or the effectiveness of interventions to reduce burning requires data on where burning occurred. These data are challenging to collect in the field, both in terms of cost and feasibility. We take advantage of data from ground-based monitoring of crop residue burning in Punjab, India to explore whether burning can be detected more effectively using accessible satellite imagery. Specifically, we used 3m PlanetScope data with high temporal resolution (up to daily) as well as publicly-available Sentinel-2 data with weekly temporal resolution but greater depth of spectral information. Following an analysis of the ability of different spectral bands and burn indices to separate burned and unburned plots individually, we built a Random Forest model with those determined to provide the greatest separability and evaluated model performance with ground-verified data. Our overall model accuracy of 82-percent is favorable given the challenges presented by the measurement. Based on insights from this process, we discuss technical challenges of detecting crop residue burning from satellite imagery as well as challenges to measuring impacts, both of burning and of policy interventions.
summary: Crop residue burning is a major source of air pollution in many parts of the world, notably South Asia. Policymakers, practitioners and researchers have invested in both measuring impacts and developing interventions to reduce burning. However, measuring the impacts of burning or the effectiveness of interventions to reduce burning requires data on where burning occurred. These data are challenging to collect in the field, both in terms of cost and feasibility. We take advantage of data from ground-based monitoring of crop residue burning in Punjab, India to explore whether burning can be detected more effectively using accessible satellite imagery. Specifically, we used 3m PlanetScope data with high temporal resolution (up to daily) as well as publicly-available Sentinel-2 data with weekly temporal resolution but greater depth of spectral information. Following an analysis of the ability of different spectral bands and burn indices to separate burned and unburned plots individually, we built a Random Forest model with those determined to provide the greatest separability and evaluated model performance with ground-verified data. Our overall model accuracy of 82-percent is favorable given the challenges presented by the measurement. Based on insights from this process, we discuss technical challenges of detecting crop residue burning from satellite imagery as well as challenges to measuring impacts, both of burning and of policy interventions.
abstract_zh: 农作物秸秆燃烧是世界许多地区空气污染的主要来源，尤其是南亚。政策制定者、从业者和研究人员在衡量影响和制定减少燃烧的干预措施方面进行了投资。然而，衡量燃烧的影响或减少燃烧的干预措施的有效性需要有关燃烧发生地点的数据。无论是在成本还是可行性方面，这些数据在现场收集都具有挑战性。我们利用印度旁遮普省农作物残留物燃烧的地面监测数据来探索是否可以使用可访问的卫星图像更有效地检测燃烧。具体来说，我们使用了具有高时间分辨率（最高可达每日）的 3m PlanetScope 数据以及具有每周时间分辨率但光谱信息深度更大的公开可用的 Sentinel-2 数据。在分析了不同光谱带和燃烧指数分别分离燃烧和未燃烧地块的能力后，我们建立了一个随机森林模型，其中确定提供最大的可分离性，并使用地面验证的数据评估模型性能。考虑到测量带来的挑战，我们的整体模型准确度为 82%，这是有利的。基于这一过程的见解，我们讨论了通过卫星图像检测农作物残留物燃烧的技术挑战，以及衡量燃烧和政策干预影响的挑战。

AI.tldr: 利用高分辨率卫星数据检测印度作物燃烧，评估其有效性及技术挑战
AI.motivation: 解决实地数据收集困难，提供有效监测方法以评估政策干预效果
AI.method: 结合高时间分辨率PlanetScope和高光谱Sentinel-2数据，分析光谱波段及燃烧指数，构建随机森林模型并用实地数据验证
AI.result: 模型总体准确率达82%，验证了卫星数据的有效性
AI.conclusion: 尽管准确率较高，但检测作物燃烧仍面临技术挑战，且测量燃烧及政策干预的影响存在困难

authors_text: Sangwon Suh,Sunjong Park
title: The ReturnZero System for VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022
title_zh: 2022 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛的 ReturnZero 系统
comment: 4 pages, 4 tables, technical report
comments: 4 pages, 4 tables, technical report
abstract: In this paper, we describe the top-scoring submissions for team RTZR VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22) in the closed dataset, speaker verification Track 1. The top performed system is a fusion of 7 models, which contains 3 different types of model architectures. We focus on training models to learn extra-temporal information. Therefore, all models were trained with 4-6 second frames for each utterance. Also, we apply the Large Margin Fine-tuning strategy which has shown good performance on the previous challenges for some of our fusion models. While the evaluation process, we apply the scoring methods with adaptive symmetric normalization (AS-Norm) and matrix score average (MSA). Finally, we mix up models with logistic regression to fuse all the trained models. The final submission achieves 0.165 DCF and 2.912% EER on the VoxSRC22 test set.
summary: In this paper, we describe the top-scoring submissions for team RTZR VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022 (VoxSRC-22) in the closed dataset, speaker verification Track 1. The top performed system is a fusion of 7 models, which contains 3 different types of model architectures. We focus on training models to learn extra-temporal information. Therefore, all models were trained with 4-6 second frames for each utterance. Also, we apply the Large Margin Fine-tuning strategy which has shown good performance on the previous challenges for some of our fusion models. While the evaluation process, we apply the scoring methods with adaptive symmetric normalization (AS-Norm) and matrix score average (MSA). Finally, we mix up models with logistic regression to fuse all the trained models. The final submission achieves 0.165 DCF and 2.912% EER on the VoxSRC22 test set.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了 RTZR VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 2022 (VoxSRC-22) 团队在封闭数据集说话人验证轨道 1 中得分最高的提交内容。表现最好的系统是 7 个模型的融合，其中包含 3 种不同类型的模型架构。我们专注于训练模型来学习超时域信息。因此，所有模型的每个话语都使用 4-6 秒的帧进行训练。此外，我们应用了大裕度微调策略，该策略在我们的一些融合模型之前的挑战中表现出了良好的性能。在评估过程中，我们应用自适应对称归一化（AS-Norm）和矩阵平均得分（MSA）的评分方法。最后，我们将模型与逻辑回归混合以融合所有经过训练的模型。最终提交的内容在 VoxSRC22 测试集上实现了 0.165 DCF 和 2.912% EER。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2022封闭数据集说话人验证Track 1中得分最高的ReturnZero系统，通过多模型融合策略实现高精度语音识别。
AI.motivation: 为提升说话人识别准确率，聚焦于挖掘语音信号的时序特征并优化模型融合策略。
AI.method: 融合7种不同架构模型，采用4-6秒语音片段训练，结合大边缘微调策略，使用AS-Norm和MSA评分方法，最终通过逻辑回归融合模型。
AI.result: 在VoxSRC22测试集上达到0.165 DCF和2.912% EER的指标。
AI.conclusion: 多模型架构融合与时序特征优化策略有效提升了说话人识别性能，验证了方法在挑战赛场景下的竞争力。

authors_text: Jihyeon Lee,Taehee Kim,Yunwon Tae,Cheonbok Park,Jaegul Choo
title: PePe: Personalized Post-editing Model utilizing User-generated Post-edits
title_zh: PePe：利用用户生成的译后编辑的个性化译后编辑模型
comment: Accepted to EACL'23
comments: Accepted to EACL'23
abstract: Incorporating personal preference is crucial in advanced machine translation tasks. Despite the recent advancement of machine translation, it remains a demanding task to properly reflect personal style. In this paper, we introduce a personalized automatic post-editing framework to address this challenge, which effectively generates sentences considering distinct personal behaviors. To build this framework, we first collect post-editing data that connotes the user preference from a live machine translation system. Specifically, real-world users enter source sentences for translation and edit the machine-translated outputs according to the user's preferred style. We then propose a model that combines a discriminator module and user-specific parameters on the APE framework. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms other baseline models on four different metrics (i.e., BLEU, TER, YiSi-1, and human evaluation).
summary: Incorporating personal preference is crucial in advanced machine translation tasks. Despite the recent advancement of machine translation, it remains a demanding task to properly reflect personal style. In this paper, we introduce a personalized automatic post-editing framework to address this challenge, which effectively generates sentences considering distinct personal behaviors. To build this framework, we first collect post-editing data that connotes the user preference from a live machine translation system. Specifically, real-world users enter source sentences for translation and edit the machine-translated outputs according to the user's preferred style. We then propose a model that combines a discriminator module and user-specific parameters on the APE framework. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms other baseline models on four different metrics (i.e., BLEU, TER, YiSi-1, and human evaluation).
abstract_zh: 在高级机器翻译任务中，结合个人偏好至关重要。尽管机器翻译最近取得了进步，但正确反映个人风格仍然是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们引入了一种个性化的自动后期编辑框架来应对这一挑战，该框架可以根据不同的个人行为有效地生成句子。为了构建这个框架，我们首先从实时机器翻译系统收集表示用户偏好的后期编辑数据。具体来说，现实世界的用户输入源句子进行翻译，并根据用户喜欢的风格编辑机器翻译的输出。然后，我们提出了一个在 APE 框架上结合了鉴别器模块和用户特定参数的模型。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在四个不同指标（即 BLEU、TER、YiSi-1 和人类评估）上优于其他基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种个性化自动后编辑框架PePe，通过利用用户生成的后编辑数据，生成符合个人风格的翻译结果。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器翻译技术已取得进展，但如何准确反映用户的个性化表达风格仍存在挑战，需通过个性化方法提升翻译质量。
AI.method: 构建包含判别器模块和用户特定参数的框架，首先收集用户对机器翻译结果的后编辑数据，再通过模型学习用户偏好并生成符合其风格的文本。
AI.result: 在BLEU、TER、YiSi-1指标及人工评估中，PePe均优于其他基线模型，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效生成符合用户个性化风格的翻译，为个性化机器翻译提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多应用场景。

authors_text: Taichi Nishimura,Atsushi Hashimoto,Yoshitaka Ushiku,Hirotaka Kameko,Shinsuke Mori
title: Recipe Generation from Unsegmented Cooking Videos
title_zh: 从未分段的烹饪视频生成食谱
comment: Accepted at ACM TOMM; ACM Transactions on Multimedia Computing, Communications, and Applications
comments: Accepted at ACM TOMM; ACM Transactions on Multimedia Computing, Communications, and Applications
abstract: This paper tackles recipe generation from unsegmented cooking videos, a task that requires agents to (1) extract key events in completing the dish and (2) generate sentences for the extracted events. Our task is similar to dense video captioning (DVC), which aims at detecting events thoroughly and generating sentences for them. However, unlike DVC, in recipe generation, recipe story awareness is crucial, and a model should extract an appropriate number of events in the correct order and generate accurate sentences based on them. We analyze the output of the DVC model and confirm that although (1) several events are adoptable as a recipe story, (2) the generated sentences for such events are not grounded in the visual content. Based on this, we set our goal to obtain correct recipes by selecting oracle events from the output events and re-generating sentences for them. To achieve this, we propose a transformer-based multimodal recurrent approach of training an event selector and sentence generator for selecting oracle events from the DVC's events and generating sentences for them. In addition, we extend the model by including ingredients to generate more accurate recipes. The experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art DVC models. We also confirm that, by modeling the recipe in a story-aware manner, the proposed model outputs the appropriate number of events in the correct order.
summary: This paper tackles recipe generation from unsegmented cooking videos, a task that requires agents to (1) extract key events in completing the dish and (2) generate sentences for the extracted events. Our task is similar to dense video captioning (DVC), which aims at detecting events thoroughly and generating sentences for them. However, unlike DVC, in recipe generation, recipe story awareness is crucial, and a model should extract an appropriate number of events in the correct order and generate accurate sentences based on them. We analyze the output of the DVC model and confirm that although (1) several events are adoptable as a recipe story, (2) the generated sentences for such events are not grounded in the visual content. Based on this, we set our goal to obtain correct recipes by selecting oracle events from the output events and re-generating sentences for them. To achieve this, we propose a transformer-based multimodal recurrent approach of training an event selector and sentence generator for selecting oracle events from the DVC's events and generating sentences for them. In addition, we extend the model by including ingredients to generate more accurate recipes. The experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art DVC models. We also confirm that, by modeling the recipe in a story-aware manner, the proposed model outputs the appropriate number of events in the correct order.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了从未分段的烹饪视频中生成菜谱的问题，该任务要求智能体（1）提取完成菜肴的关键事件，以及（2）为提取的事件生成句子。我们的任务类似于密集视频字幕（DVC），旨在彻底检测事件并为其生成句子。然而，与 DVC 不同的是，在菜谱生成中，菜谱故事意识至关重要，模型应该以正确的顺序提取适当数量的事件，并根据它们生成准确的句子。我们分析了 DVC 模型的输出，并确认虽然 (1) 有几个事件可以作为食谱故事，(2) 为这些事件生成的句子并不以视觉内容为基础。基于此，我们的目标是通过从输出事件中选择预言事件并为其重新生成句子来获得正确的食谱。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的多模态循环方法，用于训练事件选择器和句子生成器，以便从 DVC 的事件中选择预言事件并为其生成句子。此外，我们还通过包含成分来扩展模型，以生成更准确的食谱。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的 DVC 模型。我们还确认，通过以故事感知的方式对菜谱进行建模，所提出的模型以正确的顺序输出适当数量的事件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从未分割烹饪视频中生成食谱的方法，需提取关键事件并生成符合故事顺序的句子。
AI.motivation: 现有密集视频字幕模型生成的句子缺乏视觉内容关联，且未考虑食谱故事性所需的事件顺序与数量控制。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的多模态循环框架，包含事件选择器（筛选DVC事件）与句子生成器，并引入食材信息增强准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明方法优于SOTA DVC模型，能输出符合故事逻辑的正确事件序列及准确句子。
AI.conclusion: 通过故事感知建模，模型可有效生成结构合理、视觉关联性强的食谱描述。

authors_text: Gokul Yenduri,Thippa Reddy Gadekallu
title: A Systematic Literature Review of Soft Computing Techniques for Software Maintainability Prediction: State-of-the-Art, Challenges and Future Directions
title_zh: 软件可维护性预测软计算技术的系统文献综述：最新技术、挑战和未来方向
comment: Submitted for peer review
comments: Submitted for peer review
abstract: The software is changing rapidly with the invention of advanced technologies and methodologies. The ability to rapidly and successfully upgrade software in response to changing business requirements is more vital than ever. For the long-term management of software products, measuring software maintainability is crucial. The use of soft computing techniques for software maintainability prediction has shown immense promise in software maintenance process by providing accurate prediction of software maintainability. To better understand the role of soft computing techniques for software maintainability prediction, we aim to provide a systematic literature review of soft computing techniques for software maintainability prediction. Firstly, we provide a detailed overview of software maintainability. Following this, we explore the fundamentals of software maintainability and the reasons for adopting soft computing methodologies for predicting software maintainability. Later, we examine the soft computing approaches employed in the process of software maintainability prediction. Furthermore, we discuss the difficulties and potential solutions associated with the use of soft computing techniques to predict software maintainability. Finally, we conclude the review with some promising future directions to drive further research innovations and developments in this promising area.

abstract_zh: 随着先进技术和方法的发明，软件正在迅速变化。快速、成功地升级软件以响应不断变化的业务需求的能力比以往任何时候都更加重要。对于软件产品的长期管理，衡量软件的可维护性至关重要。使用软计算技术进行软件可维护性预测通过提供软件可维护性的准确预测在软件维护过程中显示出巨大的前景。为了更好地理解软计算技术在软件可维护性预测中的作用，我们的目标是对软计算技术在软件可维护性预测中的系统性文献综述。首先，我们提供软件可维护性的详细概述。接下来，我们探讨软件可维护性的基础知识以及采用软计算方法来预测软件可维护性的原因。随后，我们研究了软件可维护性预测过程中采用的软计算方法。此外，我们讨论了与使用软计算技术来预测软件可维护性相关的困难和潜在的解决方案。最后，我们总结了一些有前景的未来方向，以推动这一有前景领域的进一步研究创新和发展。

AI.tldr: 本文对软计算技术在软件可维护性预测中的应用进行了系统文献综述，分析了现状、挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 随着软件技术的快速发展，准确预测软件可维护性对长期管理至关重要，而软计算技术为此提供了有效手段，需系统梳理其应用现状与问题。
AI.method: 通过系统文献综述方法，梳理软件可维护性概念，分析软计算技术的应用场景、方法及挑战，并总结现有研究的不足。
AI.result: 明确了软计算技术（如神经网络、模糊逻辑等）在预测软件可维护性中的关键作用，指出现有研究在数据质量、模型泛化能力等方面存在局限。
AI.conclusion: 未来需结合新兴技术（如深度学习）优化预测模型，并建立更全面的评估指标体系以推动该领域发展。

search_text: A Systematic Literature Review of Soft Computing Techniques for Software Maintainability Prediction: State-of-the-Art, Challenges and Future Directions 软件可维护性预测软计算技术的系统文献综述：最新技术、挑战和未来方向 The software is changing rapidly with the invention of advanced technologies and methodologies. The ability to rapidly and successfully upgrade software in response to changing business requirements is more vital than ever. For the long-term management of software products, measuring software maintainability is crucial. The use of soft computing techniques for software maintainability prediction has shown immense promise in software maintenance process by providing accurate prediction of software maintainability. To better understand the role of soft computing techniques for software maintainability prediction, we aim to provide a systematic literature review of soft computing techniques for software maintainability prediction. Firstly, we provide a detailed overview of software maintainability. Following this, we explore the fundamentals of software maintainability and the reasons for adopting soft computing methodologies for predicting software maintainability. Later, we examine the soft computing approaches employed in the process of software maintainability prediction. Furthermore, we discuss the difficulties and potential solutions associated with the use of soft computing techniques to predict software maintainability. Finally, we conclude the review with some promising future directions to drive further research innovations and developments in this promising area. 随着先进技术和方法的发明，软件正在迅速变化。快速、成功地升级软件以响应不断变化的业务需求的能力比以往任何时候都更加重要。对于软件产品的长期管理，衡量软件的可维护性至关重要。使用软计算技术进行软件可维护性预测通过提供软件可维护性的准确预测在软件维护过程中显示出巨大的前景。为了更好地理解软计算技术在软件可维护性预测中的作用，我们的目标是对软计算技术在软件可维护性预测中的系统性文献综述。首先，我们提供软件可维护性的详细概述。接下来，我们探讨软件可维护性的基础知识以及采用软计算方法来预测软件可维护性的原因。随后，我们研究了软件可维护性预测过程中采用的软计算方法。此外，我们讨论了与使用软计算技术来预测软件可维护性相关的困难和潜在的解决方案。最后，我们总结了一些有前景的未来方向，以推动这一有前景领域的进一步研究创新和发展。 本文对软计算技术在软件可维护性预测中的应用进行了系统文献综述，分析了现状、挑战及未来方向。 Gokul Yenduri,Thippa Reddy Gadekallu cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Dangxing Chen,Weicheng Ye,Jiahui Ye
title: Interpretable Selective Learning in Credit Risk
title_zh: 信用风险中的可解释选择性学习
abstract: The forecasting of the credit default risk has been an important research field for several decades. Traditionally, logistic regression has been widely recognized as a solution due to its accuracy and interpretability. As a recent trend, researchers tend to use more complex and advanced machine learning methods to improve the accuracy of the prediction. Although certain non-linear machine learning methods have better predictive power, they are often considered to lack interpretability by financial regulators. Thus, they have not been widely applied in credit risk assessment. We introduce a neural network with the selective option to increase interpretability by distinguishing whether the datasets can be explained by the linear models or not. We find that, for most of the datasets, logistic regression will be sufficient, with reasonable accuracy; meanwhile, for some specific data portions, a shallow neural network model leads to much better accuracy without significantly sacrificing the interpretability.
summary: The forecasting of the credit default risk has been an important research field for several decades. Traditionally, logistic regression has been widely recognized as a solution due to its accuracy and interpretability. As a recent trend, researchers tend to use more complex and advanced machine learning methods to improve the accuracy of the prediction. Although certain non-linear machine learning methods have better predictive power, they are often considered to lack interpretability by financial regulators. Thus, they have not been widely applied in credit risk assessment. We introduce a neural network with the selective option to increase interpretability by distinguishing whether the datasets can be explained by the linear models or not. We find that, for most of the datasets, logistic regression will be sufficient, with reasonable accuracy; meanwhile, for some specific data portions, a shallow neural network model leads to much better accuracy without significantly sacrificing the interpretability.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，信用违约风险的预测一直是一个重要的研究领域。传统上，逻辑回归因其准确性和可解释性而被广泛认为是一种解决方案。作为最近的趋势，研究人员倾向于使用更复杂和更先进的机器学习方法来提高预测的准确性。尽管某些非线性机器学习方法具有更好的预测能力，但金融监管机构通常认为它们缺乏可解释性。因此，它们在信用风险评估中尚未得到广泛应用。我们引入了一种具有选择性选项的神经网络，通过区分数据集是否可以用线性模型解释来提高可解释性。我们发现，对于大多数数据集，逻辑回归就足够了，并且具有合理的准确性；同时，对于某些特定的数据部分，浅层神经网络模型可以带来更好的准确性，而不会显着牺牲可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的选择性学习方法，结合逻辑回归与浅层神经网络以提升信用风险预测的准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统逻辑回归虽具可解释性但准确性有限，复杂机器学习模型虽更准确却缺乏可解释性，难以满足金融监管要求。
AI.method: 设计具有选择性机制的神经网络，判断数据是否可用线性模型解释，对多数数据使用逻辑回归，对特定部分采用浅层神经网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，逻辑回归可满足多数数据集的合理准确性，而浅层神经网络在特定数据部分显著提升准确性且未明显牺牲可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了模型准确性与可解释性，为符合监管要求的信用风险评估提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Tomás Crisol,Joel Ermantraut,Adrián Rostagno,Santiago L. Aggio,Javier Iparraguirre
title: Exploring Modulated Detection Transformer as a Tool for Action Recognition in Videos
title_zh: 探索调制检测变压器作为视频中动作识别的工具
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 1 results chart
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, 1 results chart
abstract: During recent years transformers architectures have been growing in popularity. Modulated Detection Transformer (MDETR) is an end-to-end multi-modal understanding model that performs tasks such as phase grounding, referring expression comprehension, referring expression segmentation, and visual question answering. One remarkable aspect of the model is the capacity to infer over classes that it was not previously trained for. In this work we explore the use of MDETR in a new task, action detection, without any previous training. We obtain quantitative results using the Atomic Visual Actions dataset. Although the model does not report the best performance in the task, we believe that it is an interesting finding. We show that it is possible to use a multi-modal model to tackle a task that it was not designed for. Finally, we believe that this line of research may lead into the generalization of MDETR in additional downstream tasks.
summary: During recent years transformers architectures have been growing in popularity. Modulated Detection Transformer (MDETR) is an end-to-end multi-modal understanding model that performs tasks such as phase grounding, referring expression comprehension, referring expression segmentation, and visual question answering. One remarkable aspect of the model is the capacity to infer over classes that it was not previously trained for. In this work we explore the use of MDETR in a new task, action detection, without any previous training. We obtain quantitative results using the Atomic Visual Actions dataset. Although the model does not report the best performance in the task, we believe that it is an interesting finding. We show that it is possible to use a multi-modal model to tackle a task that it was not designed for. Finally, we believe that this line of research may lead into the generalization of MDETR in additional downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，变压器架构越来越受欢迎。调制检测变压器 (MDETR) 是一种端到端多模态理解模型，可执行相位接地、指代表达理解、指代表达分割和视觉问答等任务。该模型的一个显着方面是能够推断之前未训练过的类。在这项工作中，我们探索了 MDETR 在新任务（动作检测）中的使用，无需任何先前的训练。我们使用原子视觉动作数据集获得定量结果。尽管该模型没有报告任务中的最佳性能，但我们认为这是一个有趣的发现。我们证明可以使用多模态模型来解决其设计之外的任务。最后，我们相信这一研究方向可能会导致 MDETR 在其他下游任务中的推广。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了无需预训练即可将多模态模型MDETR应用于视频动作识别任务的可行性。
AI.motivation: 验证MDETR模型能否泛化到未设计的下游任务（动作检测），并探索其跨任务适应能力。
AI.method: 直接在Atomic Visual Actions数据集上应用未经过动作检测任务训练的MDETR模型进行测试。
AI.result: 模型在动作检测任务中未取得最优性能，但成功证明了多模态模型处理非原生任务的可能性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为MDETR在更多下游任务中的泛化应用提供了理论支持和实验依据。

authors_text: Ryosho Nakane,Akira Hirose,Gouhei Tanaka
title: Performance enhancement of a spin-wave-based reservoir computing system utilizing different physical conditions
title_zh: 利用不同物理条件增强基于自旋波的储层计算系统的性能
abstract: The authors have numerically studied how to enhance reservoir computing performance by thoroughly extracting their spin-wave device potential for higher-dimensional information generation. The reservoir device has a 1-input exciter and 120-output detectors on the top of a continuous magnetic garnet film for spin-wave transmission. For various nonlinear and fading-memory dynamic phenomena distributing in the film space, small in-plane magnetic fields were used to prepare stripe domain structures and various damping constants at the film sides and bottom were explored. The ferromagnetic resonant frequency and relaxation time of spin precession clearly characterized the change in spin dynamics with the magnetic field and damping constant. The common input signal for reservoir computing was a 1 GHz cosine wave with random 6-valued amplitude modulation. A basic 120-dimensional reservoir output vector was obtained from time-series signals at the 120 output detectors under each of the three magnetic field conditions. Then, 240- and 360-dimensional reservoir output vectors were also constructed by concatenating two and three basic ones, respectively. In nonlinear autoregressive moving average (NARMA) prediction tasks, the computational performance was enhanced as the dimension of the reservoir output vector becomes higher and a significantly low prediction error was achieved for the 10th-order NARMA using the 360-dimensional vector and optimum damping constant. The results are clear evidence that the collection of diverse output signals efficiently increases the dimensionality effective for reservoir computing, i.e., reservoir-state richness. This paper demonstrates that performance enhancement through various configuration settings is a practical approach for on-chip reservoir computing devices with small numbers of real output nodes.
summary: The authors have numerically studied how to enhance reservoir computing performance by thoroughly extracting their spin-wave device potential for higher-dimensional information generation. The reservoir device has a 1-input exciter and 120-output detectors on the top of a continuous magnetic garnet film for spin-wave transmission. For various nonlinear and fading-memory dynamic phenomena distributing in the film space, small in-plane magnetic fields were used to prepare stripe domain structures and various damping constants at the film sides and bottom were explored. The ferromagnetic resonant frequency and relaxation time of spin precession clearly characterized the change in spin dynamics with the magnetic field and damping constant. The common input signal for reservoir computing was a 1 GHz cosine wave with random 6-valued amplitude modulation. A basic 120-dimensional reservoir output vector was obtained from time-series signals at the 120 output detectors under each of the three magnetic field conditions. Then, 240- and 360-dimensional reservoir output vectors were also constructed by concatenating two and three basic ones, respectively. In nonlinear autoregressive moving average (NARMA) prediction tasks, the computational performance was enhanced as the dimension of the reservoir output vector becomes higher and a significantly low prediction error was achieved for the 10th-order NARMA using the 360-dimensional vector and optimum damping constant. The results are clear evidence that the collection of diverse output signals efficiently increases the dimensionality effective for reservoir computing, i.e., reservoir-state richness. This paper demonstrates that performance enhancement through various configuration settings is a practical approach for on-chip reservoir computing devices with small numbers of real output nodes.
abstract_zh: 作者对如何通过彻底挖掘自旋波器件产生高维信息的潜力来增强储层计算性能进行了数值研究。该储存装置在连续磁性石榴石薄膜的顶部有一个 1 输入激励器和 120 个输出探测器，用于自旋波传输。针对分布在薄膜空间中的各种非线性和衰落记忆动态现象，利用小面内磁场制备条状畴结构，并探索了薄膜侧面和底部的各种阻尼常数。自旋进动的铁磁谐振频率和弛豫时间清楚地表征了自旋动力学随磁场和阻尼常数的变化。储层计算的常见输入信号是具有随机 6 值幅度调制的 1 GHz 余弦波。在三种磁场条件下，从 120 个输出探测器的时间序列信号中获得基本的 120 维储层输出矢量。然后，还分别通过连接两个和三个基本向量来构造 240 维和 360 维储层输出向量。在非线性自回归移动平均（NARMA）预测任务中，随着水库输出向量维数的增加，计算性能得到增强，并且使用360维向量和最佳阻尼常数的10阶NARMA实现了显着较低的预测误差。结果清楚地表明，不同输出信号的收集有效地增加了储层计算的有效维数，即储层状态丰富度。本文证明，通过各种配置设置来增强性能对于具有少量实际输出节点的片上储层计算设备来说是一种实用的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调节磁膜中的磁場和阻尼常數，利用不同物理條件提升自旋波基礎的儲備計算系統性能。
AI.motivation: 儲備計算系統的性能受限於輸出維度和動態特性，需探索物理參數配置以提高資訊處理能力。
AI.method: 在連續磁鐵氧體薄膜上構建1輸入120輸出的自旋波裝置，通過調整磁場強度與阻尼常數生成多維輸出向量，並在NARMA預測任務中驗證性能。
AI.result: 360維輸出向量結合最佳阻尼常數使10階NARMA任務預測誤差顯著降低，證明多樣化輸出信號有效提升儲備狀態豐富度。
AI.conclusion: 通過物理參數配置提升儲備計算維度是實現高效率小型化裝置的可行方法。

search_text: Performance enhancement of a spin-wave-based reservoir computing system utilizing different physical conditions 利用不同物理条件增强基于自旋波的储层计算系统的性能 The authors have numerically studied how to enhance reservoir computing performance by thoroughly extracting their spin-wave device potential for higher-dimensional information generation. The reservoir device has a 1-input exciter and 120-output detectors on the top of a continuous magnetic garnet film for spin-wave transmission. For various nonlinear and fading-memory dynamic phenomena distributing in the film space, small in-plane magnetic fields were used to prepare stripe domain structures and various damping constants at the film sides and bottom were explored. The ferromagnetic resonant frequency and relaxation time of spin precession clearly characterized the change in spin dynamics with the magnetic field and damping constant. The common input signal for reservoir computing was a 1 GHz cosine wave with random 6-valued amplitude modulation. A basic 120-dimensional reservoir output vector was obtained from time-series signals at the 120 output detectors under each of the three magnetic field conditions. Then, 240- and 360-dimensional reservoir output vectors were also constructed by concatenating two and three basic ones, respectively. In nonlinear autoregressive moving average (NARMA) prediction tasks, the computational performance was enhanced as the dimension of the reservoir output vector becomes higher and a significantly low prediction error was achieved for the 10th-order NARMA using the 360-dimensional vector and optimum damping constant. The results are clear evidence that the collection of diverse output signals efficiently increases the dimensionality effective for reservoir computing, i.e., reservoir-state richness. This paper demonstrates that performance enhancement through various configuration settings is a practical approach for on-chip reservoir computing devices with small numbers of real output nodes. 作者对如何通过彻底挖掘自旋波器件产生高维信息的潜力来增强储层计算性能进行了数值研究。该储存装置在连续磁性石榴石薄膜的顶部有一个 1 输入激励器和 120 个输出探测器，用于自旋波传输。针对分布在薄膜空间中的各种非线性和衰落记忆动态现象，利用小面内磁场制备条状畴结构，并探索了薄膜侧面和底部的各种阻尼常数。自旋进动的铁磁谐振频率和弛豫时间清楚地表征了自旋动力学随磁场和阻尼常数的变化。储层计算的常见输入信号是具有随机 6 值幅度调制的 1 GHz 余弦波。在三种磁场条件下，从 120 个输出探测器的时间序列信号中获得基本的 120 维储层输出矢量。然后，还分别通过连接两个和三个基本向量来构造 240 维和 360 维储层输出向量。在非线性自回归移动平均（NARMA）预测任务中，随着水库输出向量维数的增加，计算性能得到增强，并且使用360维向量和最佳阻尼常数的10阶NARMA实现了显着较低的预测误差。结果清楚地表明，不同输出信号的收集有效地增加了储层计算的有效维数，即储层状态丰富度。本文证明，通过各种配置设置来增强性能对于具有少量实际输出节点的片上储层计算设备来说是一种实用的方法。 本文通过调节磁膜中的磁場和阻尼常數，利用不同物理條件提升自旋波基礎的儲備計算系統性能。 Ryosho Nakane,Akira Hirose,Gouhei Tanaka physics.comp-ph,cs.ET,physics.app-ph

authors_text: Won Kyung Do,Bianca Jurewicz,Monroe Kennedy III
title: DenseTact 2.0: Optical Tactile Sensor for Shape and Force Reconstruction
title_zh: DenseTact 2.0：用于形状和力重建的光学触觉传感器
abstract: Collaborative robots stand to have an immense impact on both human welfare in domestic service applications and industrial superiority in advanced manufacturing with dexterous assembly. The outstanding challenge is providing robotic fingertips with a physical design that makes them adept at performing dexterous tasks that require high-resolution, calibrated shape reconstruction and force sensing. In this work, we present DenseTact 2.0, an optical-tactile sensor capable of visualizing the deformed surface of a soft fingertip and using that image in a neural network to perform both calibrated shape reconstruction and 6-axis wrench estimation. We demonstrate the sensor accuracy of 0.3633mm per pixel for shape reconstruction, 0.410N for forces, 0.387Nmm for torques, and the ability to calibrate new fingers through transfer learning, which achieves comparable performance with only 12% of the non-transfer learning dataset size.
summary: Collaborative robots stand to have an immense impact on both human welfare in domestic service applications and industrial superiority in advanced manufacturing with dexterous assembly. The outstanding challenge is providing robotic fingertips with a physical design that makes them adept at performing dexterous tasks that require high-resolution, calibrated shape reconstruction and force sensing. In this work, we present DenseTact 2.0, an optical-tactile sensor capable of visualizing the deformed surface of a soft fingertip and using that image in a neural network to perform both calibrated shape reconstruction and 6-axis wrench estimation. We demonstrate the sensor accuracy of 0.3633mm per pixel for shape reconstruction, 0.410N for forces, 0.387Nmm for torques, and the ability to calibrate new fingers through transfer learning, which achieves comparable performance with only 12% of the non-transfer learning dataset size.
abstract_zh: 协作机器人将对家庭服务应用中的人类福祉和灵巧装配的先进制造中的工业优势产生巨大影响。突出的挑战是为机器人指尖提供物理设计，使其能够擅长执行需要高分辨率、校准形状重建和力传感的灵巧任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DenseTact 2.0，这是一种光学触觉传感器，能够可视化柔软指尖的变形表面，并在神经网络中使用该图像来执行校准形状重建和 6 轴扳手估计。我们展示了每像素 0.3633mm 的形状重建传感器精度、0.410N 的力精度、0.387Nmm 的扭矩精度，以及通过迁移学习校准新手指的能力，仅用非迁移学习数据集大小的 12% 即可实现可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DenseTact 2.0光学触觉传感器，通过软指尖变形图像实现形状重建和六轴力矩估计。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人需要高精度触觉感知以完成精细操作任务，但现有方案难以同时实现高分辨率形状重建与力感知。
AI.method: 利用光学成像捕捉软指尖变形表面，结合神经网络进行形状重建与六轴 wrench 估计，并通过迁移学习实现新手指快速校准。
AI.result: 形状重建精度达0.3633mm/像素，力检测误差0.410N，扭矩误差0.387Nmm，迁移学习仅需12%数据量即可达到相近性能。
AI.conclusion: DenseTact 2.0为机器人触觉感知提供了高精度解决方案，迁移学习显著降低校准成本，推动协作机器人在服务与制造领域的应用。

authors_text: Hersh Sanghvi
title: Recent Approaches for Perceptive Legged Locomotion
title_zh: 感知腿部运动的最新方法
comment: 40 pages, 11 figures
comments: 40 pages, 11 figures
abstract: As both legged robots and embedded compute have become more capable, researchers have started to focus on field deployment of these robots. Robust autonomy in unstructured environments requires perception of the world around the robot in order to avoid hazards. However, incorporating perception online while maintaining agile motion is more challenging for legged robots than other mobile robots due to the complex planners and controllers required to handle the dynamics of locomotion. This report will compare three recent approaches for perceptive locomotion and discuss the different ways in which vision can be used to enable legged autonomy.
summary: As both legged robots and embedded compute have become more capable, researchers have started to focus on field deployment of these robots. Robust autonomy in unstructured environments requires perception of the world around the robot in order to avoid hazards. However, incorporating perception online while maintaining agile motion is more challenging for legged robots than other mobile robots due to the complex planners and controllers required to handle the dynamics of locomotion. This report will compare three recent approaches for perceptive locomotion and discuss the different ways in which vision can be used to enable legged autonomy.
abstract_zh: 随着腿式机器人和嵌入式计算的能力变得越来越强大，研究人员开始关注这些机器人的现场部署。非结构化环境中的强大自主性需要机器人感知周围的世界，以避免危险。然而，由于处理运动动态所需的复杂规划器和控制器，对于腿式机器人来说，在保持敏捷运动的同时结合在线感知比其他移动机器人更具挑战性。本报告将比较最近三种感知运动的方法，并讨论利用视觉实现腿部自主性的不同方式。

AI.tldr: 本文主要比较三种近期用于感知式腿式运动的方法，探讨视觉在实现腿式机器人自主性中的不同应用方式。
AI.motivation: 随着腿式机器人和嵌入式计算能力的提升，研究者希望在复杂环境中实现稳健自主性，但在线融合感知与敏捷运动存在挑战，需探索有效方法。
AI.method: 通过比较三种近期的感知式运动方法，分析视觉技术在腿式机器人自主性中的不同应用方式。
AI.result: 总结了不同方法在处理动态环境中的优势与局限性，并评估了视觉感知对提升腿式机器人自主性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在复杂环境中的感知与运动控制仍需优化，未来需进一步整合多模态感知与高效控制器。

tldr: 本文主要比较三种近期用于感知式腿式运动的方法，探讨视觉在实现腿式机器人自主性中的不同应用方式。
motivation: 随着腿式机器人和嵌入式计算能力的提升，研究者希望在复杂环境中实现稳健自主性，但在线融合感知与敏捷运动存在挑战，需探索有效方法。
method: 通过比较三种近期的感知式运动方法，分析视觉技术在腿式机器人自主性中的不同应用方式。
result: 总结了不同方法在处理动态环境中的优势与局限性，并评估了视觉感知对提升腿式机器人自主性的有效性。
conclusion: 当前方法在复杂环境中的感知与运动控制仍需优化，未来需进一步整合多模态感知与高效控制器。
search_text: Recent Approaches for Perceptive Legged Locomotion 感知腿部运动的最新方法 As both legged robots and embedded compute have become more capable, researchers have started to focus on field deployment of these robots. Robust autonomy in unstructured environments requires perception of the world around the robot in order to avoid hazards. However, incorporating perception online while maintaining agile motion is more challenging for legged robots than other mobile robots due to the complex planners and controllers required to handle the dynamics of locomotion. This report will compare three recent approaches for perceptive locomotion and discuss the different ways in which vision can be used to enable legged autonomy. 随着腿式机器人和嵌入式计算的能力变得越来越强大，研究人员开始关注这些机器人的现场部署。非结构化环境中的强大自主性需要机器人感知周围的世界，以避免危险。然而，由于处理运动动态所需的复杂规划器和控制器，对于腿式机器人来说，在保持敏捷运动的同时结合在线感知比其他移动机器人更具挑战性。本报告将比较最近三种感知运动的方法，并讨论利用视觉实现腿部自主性的不同方式。 本文主要比较三种近期用于感知式腿式运动的方法，探讨视觉在实现腿式机器人自主性中的不同应用方式。 Hersh Sanghvi cs.RO

authors_text: Wenqi Fan,Xiangyu Zhao,Xiao Chen,Jingran Su,Jingtong Gao,Lin Wang,Qidong Liu,Yiqi Wang,Han Xu,Lei Chen,Qing Li
title: A Comprehensive Survey on Trustworthy Recommender Systems
title_zh: 值得信赖的推荐系统的综合调查
abstract: As one of the most successful AI-powered applications, recommender systems aim to help people make appropriate decisions in an effective and efficient way, by providing personalized suggestions in many aspects of our lives, especially for various human-oriented online services such as e-commerce platforms and social media sites. In the past few decades, the rapid developments of recommender systems have significantly benefited human by creating economic value, saving time and effort, and promoting social good. However, recent studies have found that data-driven recommender systems can pose serious threats to users and society, such as spreading fake news to manipulate public opinion in social media sites, amplifying unfairness toward under-represented groups or individuals in job matching services, or inferring privacy information from recommendation results. Therefore, systems' trustworthiness has been attracting increasing attention from various aspects for mitigating negative impacts caused by recommender systems, so as to enhance the public's trust towards recommender systems techniques. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive overview of Trustworthy Recommender systems (TRec) with a specific focus on six of the most important aspects; namely, Safety & Robustness, Nondiscrimination & Fairness, Explainability, Privacy, Environmental Well-being, and Accountability & Auditability. For each aspect, we summarize the recent related technologies and discuss potential research directions to help achieve trustworthy recommender systems in the future.

Therefore, systems' trustworthiness has been attracting increasing attention from various aspects for mitigating negative impacts caused by recommender systems, so as to enhance the public's trust towards recommender systems techniques. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive overview of Trustworthy Recommender systems (TRec) with a specific focus on six of the most important aspects; namely, Safety & Robustness, Nondiscrimination & Fairness, Explainability, Privacy, Environmental Well-being, and Accountability & Auditability. For each aspect, we summarize the recent related technologies and discuss potential research directions to help achieve trustworthy recommender systems in the future.
abstract_zh: 作为最成功的人工智能应用之一，推荐系统旨在通过在我们生活的许多方面提供个性化建议，特别是电子商务平台和社交媒体网站等各种以人为本的在线服务，帮助人们以有效且高效的方式做出适当的决策。在过去的几十年里，推荐系统的快速发展通过创造经济价值、节省时间和精力、促进社会公益等极大地造福了人类。然而，最近的研究发现，数据驱动的推荐系统可能对用户和社会构成严重威胁，例如在社交媒体网站上传播假新闻来操纵舆论，在就业匹配服务中放大对代表性不足的群体或个人的不公平，或者从推荐结果中推断隐私信息。因此，系统的可信度越来越受到各方面的关注，以减轻推荐系统带来的负面影响，从而增强公众对推荐系统技术的信任。在本次调查中，我们对可信推荐系统 (TRec) 进行了全面概述，特别关注六个最重要的方面；即安全与稳健、非歧视与公平、可解释性、隐私、环境福祉以及责任与审计。对于每个方面，我们总结了最新的相关技术并讨论了潜在的研究方向，以帮助未来实现值得信赖的推荐系统。

AI.tldr: 综述可信推荐系统（TRec）的六个关键方面，探讨其技术与未来方向
AI.motivation: 提升推荐系统的可信度以减少负面影响，增强公众信任
AI.method: 系统综述六个关键方面，总结现有技术并探讨研究方向
AI.result: 全面概述TRec的六个方面，总结技术并提出未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 需跨学科合作解决可信推荐系统的挑战，推动技术发展
